Name: FedEx
Description:
FedEx connects people and possibilities through our worldwide portfolio of shipping, transportation, e-commerce and digital supply chain services. For decades, we’ve been innovating to deliver more for you. Strengthening supply chains with our global network. Simplifying logistics. Enhancing tracking and visibility. And using data from every journey to make your experience better. 

Our people are the foundation of our success, and FedEx has consistently ranked among the world’s most admired and trusted employers. We inspire our global workforce of more than 575,000 team members to remain absolutely, positively focused on safety, the highest ethical and professional standards, and the needs of their customers and communities.

Day one: 186 deliveries. Today: About 14.5 million.

Name: Loggi
Description:
Through technology (mobile, AI, automation, IOT), we have created, in an unprecedented way, a next generation logistics network in Brazil that is a fast, cost-effective and reliable solution.

By the end of 2020, we want to be present in all Brazilian cities and reach the milestone of 5 million deliveries per day for the next 5 years.

With SoftBank, Microsoft, GGV Capital and others, the new investment round has brought Loggi’s valuation up to US$1 billion!

Name: Federal Express Corporation
Description: We began our company by creating the world's next big thing from the ground up - and we've never slowed down, never stopped innovating, never stopped inventing. And today we’re still leading the charge, pushing the envelope, connecting our customers and team members to unprecedented opportunities and changing what’s possible along the way.

Name: Jamef Transportes
Description:
A história da Jamef é fruto do compromisso permanente com a satisfação de seus clientes e com a inovação para que  toda  operação seja cada vez mais ágil e segura. Para isso, se baseia na tradição de quem conhece o mercado há mais de quatro décadas.
.   
A trajetória de sucesso da empresa começou em 1963, quando José Alves Martins e seus filhos fundaram a Transportadora Divinópolis, com um único caminhão, no qual transportavam café entre Belo Horizonte e Divinópolis. 

Com o novo nome de Jamef, a união das iniciais de José Alves Martins e Filhos, a transportadora inicia sua expansão e em 1975 abre sua primeira filial em São Paulo e, logo em seguida, no Rio de Janeiro. 

A empresa decide se especializar em encomendas urgentes e inova ao implementar um setor exclusivo para o atendimento personalizado ao cliente. Em 1988  inicia-se a padronização de toda a frota que já conta com mais de cem caminhões. Cinco anos depois ela passa a trabalhar também com transporte aéreo.

Pensando novamente na imagem corporativa, a Jamef passa por um processo de revitalização que inclui novidades em sua logomarca, a troca da cor amarela pela branca e passa a investir em segurança,  com  toda sua carga monitorada via satélite, 24 horas por dia, sete dias por semana.

A estrutura da empresa cresce ainda mais e, em 2007, a matriz ganhou  uma nova sede própria em Contagem, Minas Gerais.  

Hoje, com gestão profissionalizada e 46 anos de sucesso, a Jamef possui uma frota que ultrapassa a marca de 700 veículos, doze filiais, um centro de distribuição, mais de 2.500 colaboradores e planos contínuos para a expansão dos negócios.

Name: Canada Post / Postes Canada
Description:
As the country's postal service and leading ecommerce delivery company, we’re committed to serving Canadians and Canadian businesses, working for the greener good, and delivering a stronger Canada.

We are the only delivery organization with the network and commitment to serve all of the more than 17 million addresses across Canada. We operate the largest retail network in Canada, with almost 5,900 post offices in every corner of the country. Our nearly 68,000 employees connect us with Canadians and are proud to serve the communities where they live and work.

Canadians are at the heart of everything we do. We are dedicated to meeting their rapidly evolving needs and expectations. Our purpose, A Stronger Canada – Delivered, is anchored in our commitment to provide a service all Canadians can count on; demonstrate environmental and social leadership; and create a safe and welcoming workplace for all employees.

En tant que service postal et chef de file de la livraison des colis du cybercommerce au pays, nous sommes déterminés à servir la population et les entreprises d’ici, et à être porteurs d’un Canada plus fort et plus vert.

Grâce à notre réseau de livraison inégalé, nous avons la responsabilité de servir plus de 17 millions d’adresses d’un océan à l’autre. Avec près de 5 900 bureaux de poste, nous exploitons le plus vaste réseau de vente au détail au pays. Nos gens – quelque 68 000 employées et employés – servent fièrement les collectivités où ils vivent et travaillent, et nous relient à la population.

Les Canadiennes et les Canadiens sont au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons, et nous mettons tout en œuvre pour répondre à leurs besoins et à leurs attentes qui évoluent rapidement. Notre raison d’être, Porteurs d’un Canada plus fort, repose sur notre volonté d’offrir un service sur lequel tout le monde peut compter, de faire preuve de leadership en matière d’environnement et de responsabilité sociale, et de créer un milieu de travail sécuritaire et accueillant.

Name: TNT
Description:
TNT Express was acquired by FedEx in 2016. 

FedEx connects people and possibilities through a worldwide portfolio of shipping, transportation, e-commerce and business services. FedEx offers integrated business applications through collaboratively managed operating companies — collectively delivering extraordinary service to customers — using the expertise and reliability represented by the FedEx brand. Our people are the foundation of our success, and FedEx has consistently ranked among the world’s most admired and trusted employers. FedEx inspires the global workforce of more than 400,000 team members to remain absolutely, positively focused on safety, the highest ethical and professional standards, and the needs of customers and communities. 
FedEx owes its success as an industry leader to the more than 400,000 global team members who deliver exceptional customer service experiences day-in and day-out. Want to be part of this dynamic team? Check out open positions located on the Careers Site on Fedex.com: http://careers.van.fedex.com/

Follow FedEx for updates, service information, operating company news and regular content: https://www.linkedin.com/company/fedex/

Name: Africa Global Logistics
Description:
Acteur majeur du transport et de la logistique à l’international.
 Au cœur des transformation de l'Afrique 
 Transport, logistique, supply chain... 
 Pour plus d'informations sur AGL

Name: BNSF Railway
Description:
BNSF Railway operates one of the largest railroad networks in North America, with about 32,500 route miles in 28 states and three Canadian provinces. The railway is among the world's top transporters of intermodal traffic, serves more grain-producing regions than any other railroad, and transports the components of many of the products we depend on daily. BNSF Railway is an Equal Opportunity Employer Minorities/Women/Veterans/Disabled.

On Feb. 12, 2010, Burlington Northern Santa Fe Corporation was acquired by Berkshire Hathaway Inc. (NYSE: BRK)

Name: Royal Mail
Description: At Royal Mail we connect companies, customers and communities across the UK, delivering a ‘one-price-goes-anywhere’ universal postal service to over 29 million addresses. As one of the UK's leading companies, we are focused on being recognised as the best delivery company in the UK and across Europe.

Name: RAM Hand to Hand Couriers
Description:
Established in 1988, we have grown into a slick network of over 40 hubs across South Africa, a fleet over 1 800 fully-serviced vehicles, and a passionate team of over 3 200 personnel. 

Offering industry-specific, ultramodern technology solutions and logistics infrastructure, we service every type of business with our fully-integrated solutions. Paperless, secure and timeous, we handle every delivery as if it were our own. 

We pride ourselves on being an end-to-end provider committed to delivering for our customers. From A to B, seamlessly.

Name: Mandaê
Description:
Mandaê is creating the future of parcel logistics. We organize data on Brazil’s logistics players, connecting them intelligently to construct the best routes for each package shipped by our customers. 

What we’re doing has never been done before, anywhere in the world. It’s why we’re well-funded with backing from some of Latin America and the world’s best investors, including the World Bank’s IFC Group, UPS, Monashees, Qualcomm Ventures, Mercado Libre, Performa, Valor Capital, Tekton Ventures, FJ Labs, Hans Hickler (former CEO of DHL Express-USA) and others.

Mandaê won the “Top Startups” award in 2018 by LinkedIn as one of the top 25 most desired startups in Brazil, and was selected by the World Economic Forum as one of the top 50 startups creating the most impact in Latin America.  

We’re looking for extremely talented people who are motivated by difficult challenges and find meaning in impactful work. If this is you, check out our jobs at  jobs.kenoby.com/mandae/

Name: SICEPAT EKSPRES INDONESIA
Description: PT SiCepat Ekspres adalah perusahaan ekspedisi yang berdiri sejak tahun 2014, dimana pengiriman 15Jam Sampai untuk wilayah Jabodetabek dan Bandung serta pengiriman 1hari Sampai untuk kota besar seluruh wilayah Indonesia merupakan focus utama dalam pelayanannnya. Berbasis sistem teknologi terkini, SiCepat Ekspres mempunyai cabang dan gerai yang tersebar di seluruh kota di Indonesia, mempunyai slogan Ketika Semua Jadi Mudah, dimana SiCepat Ekspres menjawab segala kebutuhan dan keinginan pelaku bisnis e-commerce.

Name: FedEx Canada
Description:
Most people know FedEx Canada as a reliable shipper, committed to getting your package - large or small - to its destination on time. But FedEx Canada is also a technological innovator, a supporter of community and global charities, a dedicated employer and much more. We connect 90% of the world's GDP with door-to-door, customs-cleared service, all backed by our money-back guarantee.*  Visit fedex.ca to learn more.

Community Guidelines – https://www.fedex.com/en-ca/about/social-community-guidelines.html
---------------------------------------------------------------------
La plupart des gens connaissent FedEx Canada en tant qu’expéditeur fiable, qui s'engage à livrer les colis à destination à temps, peu importe leurs dimensions. Mais FedEx Canada est aussi une entreprise aux technologies novatrices, un commanditaire d’organismes de bienfaisance locaux et internationaux, un employeur engagé et bien plus. L'entreprise relie 90 % du PIB mondial grâce à ses services de livraison porte-à-porte et dédouanés, assortis de sa garantie de remboursement*. Pour plus d’informations, visitez fedex.ca.

Directives pour la communauté –
https://www.fedex.com/fr-ca/about/social-community-guidelines.html

Name: The Courier Guy
Description: With 200 nationwide Kiosks, 2500 drivers and a network of 1200 smart lockers, The Courier Guy has you and South Africa covered. We would love to handle your package!

Name: PT. Tiki Jalur Nugraha Ekakurir (JNE)
Description: PT. Tiki Jalur Nugraha Eka Kurir, atau lebih dikenal dengan JNE EXPRESS, adalah sebuah perusahaan logistik dan ekspedisi barang asli Indonesia yang berkantor pusat di Jalan Tomang Raya No. 11, Jakarta Barat. JNE dikenal sebagai salah satu perusahaan ekspedisi barang terbesar di Indonesia, berkat jaringan dan jangkauan area distribusinya yang mencakup lebih dari 83.000 kota, termasuk kabupaten, desa, dan pulau terluar, dengan gerai penjualan berjumlah lebih dari 8.000 titik dan mempekerjakan lebih dari 50.000 karyawan di seluruh Indonesia.

Name: Worldwide Express
Description:
Worldwide Express, a part of WWEX Group, is a top-rated third-party logistics provider, helping more than 113,000 small to medium-sized businesses ship smarter. We are a part of the largest authorized UPS  reseller in the nation, as well as the second-largest privately held freight brokerage in the country, arranging the delivery of 53 million small package, LTL and truckload shipments annually.   

When you work with Worldwide Express you’ll have a proactive logistics expert on your team, who’s ready to provide you with practical ideas to save your business time and money. You’ll benefit from a streamlined shipping platform that allows you to quickly create and track your shipments and access an impressive portfolio of more than 75 top freight carriers 45K+ full truckload carriers and the nation’s leading small-package carrier, UPS . 

Follow us to learn more, and visit our website, www.wwex.com. Find us on X (@CorporateWWE), Instagram (@WorldwideExpress), and Facebook (@WorldwideExpress) for more insights into the benefits of Worldwide Express and the #WWEXlife.

Name: Inter Rapidísimo
Description:
En Inter Rapidísimo contamos con una red logística integral, en la cual prestamos servicios de MENSAJERÍA Y CARGA con los más altos estándares de calidad.  

Entregamos lo mejor de cada colombiano en los 1.103 municipios de Colombia, con la mayor cobertura en el exterior a través de grandes alianzas estratégicas. En la actualidad nuestra compañía ha crecido un 78%   llegando a más de 1.300 centros de recepción moderna, flota de vehículos adecuada para el transporte de mercancías y convenios con las mejores aerolíneas.

Name: Purolator Inc.
Description:
Purolator Inc. is a leading integrated freight, package and logistics solutions provider. Delivering its customers’ promises since 1960, Purolator continues to expand its reach and renowned service levels and reliability to more people, more businesses and more places across the country and the world. Purolator is proud of its Canadian heritage and is focused on sustainably positioning itself for future growth and success. Purolator is also committed to contributing to the well-being of the communities it serves and where more than 14,000 of its employees love, work and play.  

Purolator's Social Media Guidelines: https://www.purolator.com/sites/default/files/2022-06/social-media-guidelines.pdf

À propos de Purolator
PurolatorInc. est un fournisseur de pointe de solutions intégrées de logistique et d’expédition de fret et de colis. Permettant à ses clients de tenir leurs promesses depuis1960, Purolator continue d’élargir sa portée, sa fiabilité et ses niveaux de service réputés pour joindre davantage de particuliers, d’entreprises et de localités, partout au pays et dans le monde entier. Purolator est fière de son héritage canadien et veille à assurer sa durabilité, se positionnant pour croître et prospérer. Elle est également vouée à contribuer au bien-être des collectivités qu’elle sert, et dans lesquelles vivent, travaillent et se détendent ses plus de14000 employés.

Name: BRT Corriere Espresso
Description:
Fin dalla sua fondazione nel 1928, BRT è un’organizzazione capillare e flessibile, in grado di soddisfare le esigenze di distribuzione e di logistica integrata delle aziende che ricercano un unico interlocutore per
il trasporto espresso, lo stoccaggio, la movimentazione, e la consegna delle loro spedizioni in Italia, in Europa e nel Mondo.

Una capillarità sul territorio nazionale che si articola in:
- oltre 200 filiali
- oltre 7.500 punti BRT-fermopoint

Dal 2017, BRT è entrata a far parte di Geopost, uno dei leader mondiali nel trasporto, che combina tecnologia, innovazione e conoscenza dei mercati locali per fornire a clienti e destinatari un servizio flessibile e su misura.

Name: LBC Express, Inc.
Description:
Our Company
 
Luzon Brokerage Corporation (LBC) was founded in the 1950's as a brokerage and air cargo event. LBC initially operated as an air cargo forwarding service provider and was the first to introduce 24-hour air cargo delivery service in the country. LBC soon became a respected leader offering fast and reliable Express Courier and Money Remittance service throughout the Philippines. Today, LBC offers the widest coverage and network with over 1,000 strategically located branches nationwide.

Our Global Expansion
 
LBC's continuous and aggressive growth in the domestic market made it clear what the next major move needed to be: setting foot overseas. Thus, in 1985 the first LBC branch outside the country was established in San Francisco, California. Since then, we never stopped moving. Today, you'll find us all over North America, the Middle East, Asia Pacific, Europe and Oceania, establishing more than 3,000 branches and affiliations worldwide.

Name: Anteraja
Description:
Anteraja is a company that moves within delivery service and logistics, spanning over the far-east of Indonesia to the far-west. Of course, it’s only necessary that every service that we offer come with an app, and it doesn’t stop there–– our system is fully automated by a network of artificial intelligence (AI).

Not only we care about intellects and talents of our human resources, we also care about giving back to the community. Our culture is stemmed from the notion of #JadiOrangBaik, which directly translates to ‘be a person of kindness’. We believe in democratizing our services and to help independent businesses grow with the tools that we offer to them.

Our investors include PT Adi Sarana Armada. Tbk, PT Semangat Bambu Runcing, and Time Prestige International, Ltd.

Name: DPD France
Description:
Transport de colis et documents pour les entreprises.

Créé en 1995, Exapaq est le spécialiste routier du transport rapide de colis et documents de moins de 30 kilos en BtoB, J+1 non garanti pour le national et de J+1 à J+5 en DPD Classic pour l'export.

- prés de 2000 collaborateurs
- 56 agences
- 5 centres de tris
- Entreprise certifiée Iso 9001 et Certipharm

Name: DC LOGISTICS BRASIL
Description:
Desde 1994 movemos cargas, culturas, negócios, pessoas e sonhos ao redor do mundo. Hoje, temos 300 colaboradores e 12 escritórios espalhados pelo Brasil. Atuamos em todo o Globo e transportamos os mais diversos produtos tendo como missão agregar valor aos negócios de nossos clientes com soluções logísticas inovadoras e otimizadas.

A DC busca impulsionar aquilo que mais valoriza: as pessoas. Profissionais que fazem a diferença, levando o nosso propósito adiante. É pensando nas pessoas que nos tornamos GPTW! 

São as pessoas que movem a DC, pessoas como essa grande e talentosa equipe. Parte importante da DC é saber valorizá-las, empoderar, desenvolver e dar oportunidades a quem está conosco.

Conheça mais sobre nós e sobre nossas oportunidades: https://dclogisticsbrasil.com/contato/carreira/

Entre para o time de #pessoasmovempessoas

Name: Nejoum Al Jazeera
Description:
Shipping your Cars from
all American Auctions
Working day and night to facilitate your car transportation starting from providing buyer accounts, towing, shipping, clearance and tracking it at all times

Name: Poste Maroc (Barid Al Maghrib)
Description:
Groupe Marocain de services détenu par l’Etat, Poste Maroc est une entreprise multi-métiers créée en tant qu’établissement public par le Dahir n°1-97-162 du 7 août 1997 portant promulgation de la loi n°24-96 relative à la poste et aux télécommunications. En 2010, Poste Maroc a été transformée en société anonyme conformément au Dahir n°1-10-09 du 26 Safar 1431  portant promulgation de la loi n°07-08. 

Opérant dans le courrier, la messagerie-colis, les services financiers, le transport, la logistique et les nouvelles formes d’identification numérique et de communication, telles que la certification électronique pour les échanges dématérialisés et les services eGov, Poste Maroc a pour mission de rapprocher les citoyens, les administrations et les entreprises à travers des solutions innovantes, son large réseau de distribution et en s’appuyant sur les expertises de ses quatre filiales : Al Barid Bank, EMS Chronopost International Maroc, Société Marocaine de Distribution et Transport de Marchandises et de Messageries et Barid Media.

Considérée comme l’un des principaux employeurs au Maroc avec 9 000 collaborateurs, le Groupe a réalisé en 2016 un chiffre d’affaires de 2,45 milliards de Dirhams.

Name: CTT Express Paquetería Urgente
Description:
CTT Express es la empresa ibérica líder de envíos en 24 horas.

Ofrecemos calidad, fiabilidad y flexibilidad gracias a que apostamos por invertir en tecnología e innovación.

Contamos con máquinas de alta capacidad de clasificación que nos ayuda a repartir más de 200.000 envíos diarios.

Nos integramos con tu tienda y tu portal online para que no tengas que preocuparte por nada. 

Y entregamos tus compras online con un 98% de calidad. En tu casa, en tu trabajo y donde tú quieras. 

Puedes contactarnos en el  900 110 898 

Y también por correo electrónico hrs.sac@cttexpress.com (Pon LinkedIn en el asunto)

Name: Zajel_official
Description:
At ZAJEL, we pride ourselves on delivering tomorrow’s innovation today. Our mission is to redefine logistics through cutting-edge technology, reliable global solutions, and a customer-first approach. Since our journey began in 2008, we have grown to become one of the UAE’s fastest-growing logistics companies, trusted by enterprises, SMEs, and individuals alike.

We specialise in express courier, freight, special projects, and government services, delivering tailored, cost-effective solutions—from domestic and international logistics to sector-specific expertise—empowering businesses to thrive efficiently at every step.

As a proud member of the International Chamber of Digital Economy (ICDE), we stay ahead of industry trends, driving forward-thinking solutions that go beyond boundaries. 

By combining trust, innovation, and advanced systems, we are committed to creating a smarter, more connected logistics future for our customers—delivering excellence, everywhere.

Name: SMSA
Description:
SMSA Express is a market leader in the courier industry. It boasts a solid business platform through which it have provided services to tens of thousands of businesses and individuals since 1994.
Since commencing business, SMSA Express has developed a range of services, including international and domestic express transportation, road, sea and airfreight, customs clearance, e-commerce solutions, special services for the health care sector, special delivery channel, mailroom management and many other services that qualify SMSA Express as the ideal logistics partner for prominent companies.
SMSA provides its distinctive services to numerous organizations and governmental entities, which depend on time sensitive service and security compliance. It is proud to serve businesses that demand a high level of care and quality.
SMSA Express, which, apart from its specialized logistics services, strives to meet the needs of citizens and businesses for domestic and international parcel delivery. SMSA Express has established a vast network that connects 230 countries together.
SMSA provides the best, most cost-effective, diverse express, freight, outbound and inbound shipping services available. In addition to SMSA’s parcel pick-up and delivery services, freight forwarding services, logistics services and tailor-made solutions, the operations are supported by a dedicated customs clearance department for clearing all incoming shipments either by air, road or sea.

Name: UniUni
Description:
Founded in 2019 and headquartered in Richmond, B.C., Canada, UniUni is a leading technology-enabled logistics company revolutionizing the last-mile delivery landscape for the e-commerce industry. 

As a platform that seamlessly integrates advanced technology with efficient delivery solutions, UniUni enables businesses to provide a superior online shopping experience, ensuring unparalleled efficiency and customer satisfaction. 

UniUni serves a diverse range of clients—from e-commerce platforms to online retailers and brands—and offers exceptional service across North America.

Name: Pos Malaysia Berhad
Description:
Pos Malaysia Berhad [199101019653 (229990-M)] is the national postal and parcel service provider and sole licensee for universal postal services in Malaysia. With a history of over 200 years, the company has diversified beyond the traditional provision of mail and parcel delivery to also offer retail, logistics, and aviation products and services. It has also pivoted from a mail company that also delivers parcels, to a parcel delivery company that also delivers mail. 

Pos Malaysia has the most extensive last-mile reach, delivering to more than 11 million addresses nationwide. It also has a network of more than 3,800 touchpoints with presence across the country providing Malaysians the most comprehensive retail network. 

Pos Malaysia is majority-owned by conglomerate DRB-HICOM Berhad.

Name: Lion Parcel
Description:
Lion Parcel (PT Lion Express) is a logistics company established on 14 February 2013 serving first and last mile for both domestic and international deliveries. 

Supported by more than 7,000 agents, 15,000 delivery couriers, and 3.000 fleets, Lion Parcel’s delivery network currently reaches 98% of sub-districts across 34 provinces in Indonesia. Lion Parcel is also supported by Lion Group’s network and infrastructure to connect people without time and distance limitations. 

With the vision to build the most reliable and seamless logistic company, Lion Parcel strives to continuously innovate and adapt together with more than 1,000 staff aiming to provide best delivery services for Indonesian customers.

Name: NACEX
Description:
NACEX es una compañía líder en el segmento de la mensajería exprés en España, Portugal, Andorra y Benelux, y forma parte de Logista.

Desde su fundación en 1995, NACEX está especializada en la mensajería urgente de paquetería y documentación entre empresas (B2B) y particulares (B2C), y ofrece una amplia gama de servicios nacionales, internacionales y de valor añadido que se adaptan a las necesidades de entrega más exigentes del mercado. 

NACEX ha consolidado una red de franquicias en exclusiva en España, Andorra y Portugal que garantizan una total cobertura, herramientas tecnológicas de última generación que permiten, entre otras cosas, la trazabilidad de los envíos en tiempo real, y sistemas de comunicación con los clientes que están a la vanguardia del sector, respondiendo de esta forma a los requerimientos de cada uno de ellos.

NACEX cubre las necesidades de transporte con total garantía de calidad.

Name: DHL Express Italy
Description:
Presente in oltre 220 Paesi nel mondo con proprie sedi e persone, la nostra azienda è in grado di unire alla capillarità del network la conoscenza approfondita dei mercati locali, delle procedure doganali e delle caratteristiche di trasporto e distribuzione specifiche dei diversi Paesi.

Ogni giorno in ogni luogo del mondo, offriamo servizi di trasporto personalizzabili in base alle specifiche esigenze delle imprese, dialoghiamo con gli Enti Doganali e gli attori del mercato per trovare soluzioni sempre più rapide, in grado di rispettare le scadenze anche nei luoghi più remoti e cerchiamo soluzioni per rendere il nostro lavoro sempre più sostenibile verso l'ambiente e la società.

Nel processo di Internazionalizzazione, siamo il partner delle imprese che sviluppano il proprio business all'estero, supportando e facilitando le operazioni di esportazione ed importazione.

Name: MRW
Description:
El Grupo MRW nace en 1977. De capital 100% nacional. Es la marca de transporte urgente para envíos nacionales e internacionales con mayor implantación, más de 10.000 personas están vinculadas a la marca en más de 550 oficinas y 56 plataformas logísticas en Andorra, España, Gibraltar y Portugal. El Grupo realiza una media de 62 millones de envíos anuales, aportando soluciones de negocio concretas para todo tipo de empresas y particulares. MRW ha sido pionera en la implantación del e-Commerce y se ha convertido en especialista del sector, así como de satisfacer la demanda de los clientes particulares. Valores diferenciales de MRW son Compromiso, Eficiencia, Transparencia, Innovación y el perfeccionamiento, día a día, de la calidad del servicio.

twitter.com/mrw_es
facebook.com/mrwespana
instagram.com/mrw_es/
youtube.com/MRWURGENTE
plus.google.com/+MRW

Name: Paack
Description:
At Paack, we develop technology-driven delivery solutions.
We help leading retailers and e-commerce brands offer flexible, sustainable and customer-centric deliveries.

Based in Barcelona, we’re redefining last-mile logistics and leading the shift toward sustainable urban delivery across Europe.

Name: GFL Logística
Description: Formado em um conceito inovador o Grupo GFL é composto de profissionais com ampla experiência em logística. Nossas operações são desenhadas para trazer simplicidade e segurança ao processo, sempre visando o melhor resultado  de custo e rentabilidade  para todas as partes integrantes - Embarcadores e Operadores. Como Operador Logístico atuamos em duas frentes: Clientes Diretos e Distribuição de Last Mile para Operadores Logísticos.

Name: D.B. Group
Description:
We design turn-key global freight-forwarding and logistics solutions through a customized range of transport services worldwide (air, sea, road and rail). 

With 48 subsidiaries in 20+ countries worldwide, we are a reliable partner for all logistics, shipping and supply chain management solutions. We manage the most complex problems of our clients through precise and innovative planning, always looking at our customers’ issues as if they were our own.

We believe in constant training, allowing our global team to gain expertise and acquire flexibility: a challenging working environment, a culture of cooperation and a push for constant personal and professional growth define employees’ experience in D.B. Group.

As players in a world-wide scenario, we are always looking for proactive, open minded, solution oriented and ready to travel people, capable to adhere to our clients’ needs.

Name: Anjun
Description:
A Anjun é uma empresa de logística global com foco no mercado crossborder e atuação no modelo full logistics. Um dos nossos grandes diferenciais é oferecer opções completas de serviços, de first a last mile.

Criada em 2011, se dedica aos interesse dos vendedores de e-commerce, integrando vários recursos de logística para uma entrega mais prática, rápida e simples
A proposta da Anjun é colocar no passado o pensamento de que a compra da China é sempre demorada. Com a logística adequada, os pedidos do outro lado do mundo estarão nas mãos do cliente mais rápido do que nunca.
A Anjun trabalha com mais de 30 mil sellers. A confiança na eficiência do nosso trabalho é o que atrai grupos tão grandes do mercado online internacional.

Name: NZ Post
Description:
NZ Post is New Zealand's delivery partner for a digital world. Every year we deliver almost 650 million items – parcels, packages and letters – around New Zealand and the world. And we're darn good at it.

Why? Because of everything else we deliver: continuous innovation, an agile mindset, a get-it-sorted culture, and a rock-solid capacity.

We collaborate with businesses to find unique solution to their challenges – from streamlining imports for start-ups to seamlessly integrating eCommerce fulfilment into back-end systems for retailers.

And behind all this is a world-class processing operation with a state-of-the art Network Management Centre, 120+ GPS-enabled line haul trucks, more than 700 couriers operating out of 26 branches and depots, and three Boeing 737-400 airfreighters.

The world has changed – and so have we.

V Česku máme nejširší síť výdejních míst a samoobslužných Z-BOXů. 

Díky využívání unikátních technologií a prozákaznickému přístupu jsme opakovaně získali ocenění Czech Superbrands, získali jsme několik Křišťálových Lup, ocenění Best Manager Company či 1. místo žebříčku 100 firem s nejlepší zákaznickou zkušeností v Česku. A moc nás těší i umístění v TOP 10 ankety nejlepší zaměstnavatel v ČR. Jestli tomu tak skutečně je, a patříme mezi nejlepší zaměstnavatele u nás, můžete vyzkoušet na vlastní kůži - každý rok raketově rosteme, a tak hledáme desítky nových kolegů do naší červené rodiny. Name: GLS France
Description:
Un réseau stable pour un service sans frontières

Après sa création fin 1999, GLS est parvenue en quelques années à mettre en place un réseau européen de colis d’une grande stabilité qui couvre aujourd’hui 37 pays. Des acquisitions et partenariats ont depuis lors jalonné l’histoire de la société et GLS a créé ses propres filiales dans de nombreux pays. Il s’agit souvent de réseaux complets qui n’ont pas tardé à devenir pleinement opérationnels.

L'entreprise propose des solutions de transport fiables, à la fois à l'échelle nationale et internationale, en Europe comme dans le monde entier. L'Europe est son principal marché, ses prestations de transport de colis y couvrent 37 pays, majoritairement au travers de ses propres filiales, le reste étant pris en charge par des partenaires fiables.

Le réseau France GLS France compte en France parmi les prestataires de transport de colis et express. La société met l’accent sur un haut niveau de qualité. Ses solutions IT modernes rendent la collaboration avec GLS à la fois simple, sûre et agréable. Les destinataires bénéficient des options de livraison attractives proposées par GLS France.

Evoluer ensemble : Carrière et formation chez GLS

Vous souhaitez travailler pour une entreprise dynamique et en pleine expansion ? Alors rejoignez GLS, l’un des principaux prestataires européens de transport de colis et express. Ce sont nos collaborateurs qui constituent notre potentiel. Notre potentiel, c’est vous. Découvrez notre large gamme d’emplois en logistique et envisagez une carrière offrant de nombreux avantages.

La calidad de servicio ofrecida está apoyada en una tecnología de vanguardia aplicada a los sistemas de clasificación, manipulación y seguimiento de envíos. Pero, sobre todo, un equipo de profesionales garantizan la mayor atención organizativa para que sus envíos lleguen siempre a su destino, en los plazos comprometidos y con la mejor información del resultado de la entrega.

Nuestro compromiso es ofrecerles los mejores servicios de transporte urgente con una óptima relación calidad-precio. En TIPSA encontrará una compañía ágil, dinámica y en continua evolución.

El cuidado por la calidad en el servicio da como resultado que más de 20.000 clientes confíen diariamente sus envíos a Tipsa.

Our difference is simple, we don't just deliver packages, we deliver reliability.

Il processo è interamente gestito tramite il portale web dedicato www.prontopacco.it che mette a disposizione punti di ritiro, come bar, edicole e negozi dislocati in tutta Italia. 
Attualmente ProntoPacco dispone di oltre 5.000 PDR in tutta Italia.
La Mission della società è quella di rendere più flessibile la consegna dei pacchi per chi acquista su internet e non ha la possibilità di farseli recapitare a casa.
Una soluzione efficace per l’utente che in questo modo non dovrà affrontare più estenuanti telefonate al corriere od odiose giacenze. 
I vantaggi si estendono anche ai Punti Ritiro perchè si potrà offrire e ricevere benefici sia dai suoi soliti clienti sia dai nuovi. ProntoPacco è l’unico servizio che permette al bar, al negozio o alla cartolibreria di estendere e guadagnare sempre sul flusso di pubblico in arrivo presso il Punto Ritiro. 
Con ProntoPacco ogni Punto Ritiro ottiene dei ricavi da ogni pacco gestito e ha l’opportunità di ampliare la propria comunità, grazie all’ingresso di un nuovo flusso di persone che potranno diventare dei potenziali clienti. 
Tra le ultime novità inserite c’è la possibilità di ingresso nella rete anche come privato cittadino mettendo a disposizione la propria abitazione come Punto Ritiro. 
Una soluzione semplice e sicura per le consegne che potrà permettere a chi è sempre a casa di mettersi a disposizione e al tempo stesso guadagnare qualcosa per sé.

Name: Kazmortransflot NMSC LLP
Description:
LLP “NMSK” Kazmotransflot “(KMTF) is the National Sea Carrier (Resolution of the Government of the Republic of Kazakhstan dated April 29, 2011 No. 462). The main activities are the Mission of KMTF:
– safe and reliable operation of the fleet;
– development of national sea trade and service fleets;
– increasing the profitability of shipping, both in the Caspian region and beyond.

The strategic goal of KMTF is:
–  increase in the state’s share in maritime transportation and in exploration at sea;
– formation of a unified state policy in the field of commercial navigation
– strengthening of international cooperation in the sphere of commercial navigation.

At present, KMTF has launched a large-scale project – participation in the Future Expansion Project of Tengizchevroil LLP. Thus, KMTF will increase the share of the Kazakhstan content in the FGP TCO, which in turn will allow the preparation of qualified domestic specialists with experience in multi-modal marine international transportation of oversized cargo.

Within the framework of the project, KMTF will transport about 75 modules for the construction of a new generation plant.

KMTF is a reliable service provider to Kazakhstan and foreign partners. The company owns the largest, as well as the most modern in the Republic of Kazakhstan fleet – tanker, tugboats, as well as vessels for transportation of bulky cargo and barges for various purposes.

KMTF is a highly efficient and highly profitable company, corresponding to the highest international standards of safety and quality of maritime navigation.

The company full name is – the limited liability partnership “National Maritime Shipping Company” Kazmortransflot “; abbreviated – LLP “NMSK” Kazmortransflot ” / KMTF.

Enjoy total control over the shipment through Online Tracking

Exceptional knowledge in shipping your goods in a wide range of vessels, container ships and bulk ships that will meet all of your specific needs - FCL, LCL, breakbulk, Ro/Ro, full or part charters.

We have the ability and expertise to take on any over-dimensional shipping project. 

Cross Trade Services

International Freight Consulting

Our core services include:

 Airfreight Services
Fast, reliable, and globally connected air cargo solutions. We handle time-sensitive shipments with precision and efficiency, ensuring your cargo arrives safely and on schedule.

 Sea freight Solutions
Affordable and dependable ocean shipping for all cargo sizes. From FCL to LCL, we provide seamless port-to-port coordination and complete documentation support.

Simplifying import and export clearance for faster deliveries. Our team ensures full compliance with customs regulations, saving you time and avoiding delays.
Keywords: customs clearance, import/export, compliance

Secure, flexible, and strategically located storage solutions. We provide inventory management and efficient distribution tailored to your logistics needs.
Keywords: warehousing, inventory management, logistics support

 Door-to-Door Deliveries
Complete logistics from pickup to final delivery. Our integrated network guarantees convenience, reliability, and real-time cargo tracking.
Keywords: door-to-door delivery, end-to-end logistics, transport solutions

Expert handling for oversized, heavy, or high-value cargo. Our team provides tailored logistics planning, route surveys, and end-to-end coordination to ensure safe and timely delivery of complex shipments — from industrial machinery to construction materials.
Keywords: project cargo, heavy lift, specialized logistics, oversized freight

Wij hebben ruime ervaring in het ontruimen en staan graag voor u klaar! Samen met u maken we een plan en zorgen we dat er geen waardevolle spullen verloren gaan. Het resultaat is een bezemschone oplevering van uw pand.

Heeft u behoefte aan professionele hulp bij uw verhuizing? Verhuizen is één van de grootste stressveroorzakers. We zijn er voor u om ervoor te zorgen dat de verhuizing zorgeloos verloopt.

Ontzorgen staat bij ons centraal. Niet alleen bij een ontruiming of verhuizing, maar we helpen u ook graag bij andere klussen in en om het huis. We komen graag bij u langs om onderhouds- of herstelwerkzaamheden met u te bespreken. Op deze manier stemmen we samen met u af wat er moet gebeuren om uw huis op te knappen.

ShipTime supports businesses of all sizes with the tools, savings, and reliability needed to Ship Smarter every day.

Description:
Norse Atlantic operate their routes with the Boeing 787-900 series being considered as one of the most modern, efficient aircraft in the skies. Norse Atlantic call their aircraft 'Longships', following the tradition of Norsemen and Norsewomen, who explored the world generations before.

Norse Atlantic's Longships feature a range of innovative technologies that make them more comfortable, greener and quieter and with 25% lower CO2 emissions and 50% quieter than the previous generation of aircraft still in operation with many major airlines globally.

Norse Atlantic's brand is inspired by the Oseberg longship in Oslo, a symbol of the long-lasting ingenuity of Viking explorers. In the same spirit of exploration, Norse Atlantic have named their own Boeing 787 Longships after National Parks worldwide, Nordic culture centres around the love for the outdoors and the freedom it represents.

Name: Paket Taxi
Description:
Paket Taxi, firmaların kurye ihtiyaçlarına çözüm üreten yenilikçi bir markadır. Lojistik konusunda hizmet verdiği firmaların ihtiyaçlarını hem motosiklet hem de ticari araçlarla başarıyla giderir; e-ticaret paketlerinden, restoran siparişlerine kadar pek çok alanda taşıma ve dağıtım hizmeti sunar. 

Paket Taxi, çok yüksek hassasiyete sahip teslimata da standart teslimata da aynı derece değer göstererek maksimum profesyonellikte taşımacılık yapar. Bu yüzden Paket Taxi ile iş ortaklığı yapan her firma teslimatlarında gönül rahatlığını yaşar. Böylece işletmeler, enerjilerini sadece kendi uzmanlık alanlarına harcar. Sadece İstanbul’da değil tüm Türkiye’de hizmet veren Paket Taxi, tüm teslimatlarını muazzam bir takip ve denetimle gerçekleştirir. Bölge sorumlusundan müşteri hizmetlerine, satış pazarlama departmanından kuryenin kendisine kadar her teslimat, tek bir kuryenin değil tüm Paket Taxi’nin sorumluluğunda ulaştırılır.

Her çalışanını hizmet verdiği müşterilerinin birer kahramanı olarak gören ve bu bilinçle günden güne başarıyla büyüyen Paket Taxi ailesine katılarak kazançlı bir kariyer sahibi olmak için başvuruda bulunabilirsiniz; https://www.pakettaxi.com/basvuru

Name: DELEEVFIRST
Description:
Fondée en 2019 par deux amis animés par une vision commune, Deleevfirst est bien plus qu'une entreprise de transport de marchandises. Nous avons créé notre société avec des valeurs fortes axées sur le salariat, la livraison écologique et l'excellence du service.

Depuis nos débuts, Deleevfirst a connu une croissance rapide et significative. Aujourd'hui, nous exploitons trois dépôts stratégiquement situés dans les zones clés : Paris (75020), Sucy-en-Brie (94460) et Courtry (77127). Cette infrastructure nous permet de couvrir efficacement un large territoire et de répondre aux besoins de nos clients de manière rapide et fiable.

Nous gérons plus de 100 tournées de livraison quotidiennement, grâce à une flotte de véhicules diversifiée, allant du vélo cargo aux camions de 20m3 électriques. Chez Deleevfirst, nous sommes engagés envers des pratiques de livraison écologiques, réduisant ainsi notre impact sur l'environnement tout en assurant la sécurité et l'intégrité des marchandises que nous transportons.

Nos services couvrent divers secteurs du transport de marchandises du dernier kilomètre, notamment la livraison de colis B2C, la collecte de marchandises B2B et les courses express de petits et grands volumes. Qu'il s'agisse de répondre aux besoins des consommateurs finaux ou d'assurer la logistique interne des entreprises, nous sommes là pour fournir des solutions adaptées et efficaces.

Chez Deleevfirst, la qualité de service est notre priorité absolue. Notre équipe dévouée et expérimentée est prête à répondre à vos exigences spécifiques en matière de transport, en offrant des solutions personnalisées et flexibles pour optimiser votre chaîne d'approvisionnement.

Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui pour découvrir comment Deleevfirst peut simplifier et améliorer vos opérations logistiques, tout en respectant vos valeurs et en assurant des livraisons ponctuelles et durables.

Como así también alianzas estratégicas con prestigiosas empresas que nos permiten llegar a todo nuestro País. 
Una de nuestras fortalezas, se encuentra en haber podido mantener durante todo este periodo un mismo plantel de personal, con lo cual además de desarrollar una importante experiencia y capacitación, nuestros empleados pudieron crecer junto con nosotros. De esta manera contamos con recursos humanos altamente motivados para satisfacer a nuestros clientes.
Por otra parte desarrollamos un sistema de atención personalizada a nuestros clientes, con una fluida comunicación y logrando de esta manera respuestas inmediatas y soluciones concretas.
Con todo esto logramos una elevada calidad en nuestros servicios manejando tarifas razonables con el objeto de que nuestros clientes puedan contar con el mejor servicio y los mejores precios.
NUESTROS VALORES
La confianza.
La eficiencia.
Innovación.
La seguridad de la entrega.
El trabajo en equipos.
Aprender.

Our approach is to identify, nurture, and invest in talent and ambition, allowing for significant growth within our ranks.

Driven not by financial gain or power but by shared success and mutual benefit, we have proudly supported several of our van drivers in obtaining their HGV Licences, facilitating their transition to operating our HGV fleet. Remarkably, even our Transport Manager, who oversees the HGV Department, and all our On-site Managers began their careers as delivery drivers. This inward focus on development and progression is a testament to our values and operational philosophy—if you commit to us, we commit to you. This principle is central to how we operate and what we believe in, offering a clear insight into our dedication to the growth and success of our team.

India is growing fast and so are its citizens, every time from every city someone is shifting to somewhere, companies are moving their offices, and other commercial transportation is happening around. Nos Valeurs

Name: Einstein Moving Company
Description:
Einstein changed the game with his theory of general relativity. We hope to do the same kind of thing, but with the moving industry! That means:

Building smarter moving technology (like our automated quote form!)
Using smarter moving equipment
Creating smarter moving processes
Hiring the smartest (and strongest) movers the industry has ever seen

Our core values:
Communicate clearly, professionally, and with kindness
Hustle but don't rush
Ownership over results
Innovate, adapt, and improve
Conscientious attention to detail
Elevate attitudes and have fun
Support one another generously

A bit about the owners — Paul Morin and Cameron Brown:

Our story begins long before they ever completed their first move.

It all started in Kindergarten, where we met and became fast friends. We grew up side by side, eventually becoming roommates and graduating together at Texas A&M University. In an attempt to put off using our degrees, we started a nutritional supplement company and even a Christmas tree business (long story). While pushing to get these other companies off the ground, we worked part-time for a moving company to pay the bills.

It wasn’t long before we realized that the moving industry was clunky, outdated, and deserved its bad reputation. We knew there was a need for a different kind of mover!
So, with an old pickup truck, a small business loan, and a whole bunch of hard work, we got to work filling that need. Over the years, we talked a lot of really smart and talented people into joining our team and together we got stronger. Eventually, everyone became completely obsessed with the moving industry and now we spend all day every day working on ways to make it better.

These days we are one of the most awarded moving companies in Texas and have recently expanded our moving expertise into Florida — and we keep getting better! If you are moving in either state, we hope you choose us and we sincerely look forward to serving you.

Bombino Express is one of the leading courier companies in India. It was formed in 1995 when industries and corporate expanding under the economic liberalization needed a dependable courier service, that had an extensive network and was time bound and trustworthy in its delivery; here Bombino’s excelled and it’s share in the market has grown by leaps and bounds. 
Bombino Express offers cost effective, door to door express and logistics services to and from India, USA, UK, Middle East and the rest of the world. 

We believe in keeping a constant tab on your needs as a customer, and in anticipating emerging trends, also expanding strategically and constantly updating cutting-edge technologies and state-of-the-art tracking systems. All this has given Bombino Express’ excellent reach speed, punctuality and above all competitive rate efficiencies. What's more, with our pre-clearance system, we send electronic copies of documents to foreign customs clearance even before the goods land; this ensures zero lag-time once the parcels reach their destinations.

“We aspire to become the globally preferred & admired Logistics solutions provider.”

Mission

Name: Aeropost
Description:
Our purpose: Empowering our communities by connecting them to global markets.

We are a Logistics Technology company committed to innovating the cross-border logistics experience. Aeropost is the prominent player in the Latin American and the Caribbean markets, supporting millions of consumers, businesses, retailers, and marketplaces in their cross-border logistics needs. 

Aeropost's roots trace back to the early 90s when we first started providing a logistics solution for US expatriates in Costa Rica. Today, we have evolved into an asset-based vertically integrated logistics solution provider for Latin America and the Caribbean, offering end-to-end services for cross-border purchases, payments, and deliveries in over 30+ countries.

We have a deep understanding of our customers and the unique demands of each market. From duty calculation and customs clearance to international shipping and last-mile delivery, Aeropost's expertise is unrivaled. Our local presence is prominent, with business entities, staff, assets, infrastructure, customer service, branded retail shops, lockers and an innovative local payments platform that facilitates purchases from US retailers.

Name: DHL Express Nederland
Description:
DHL Express zit inmiddels meer dan 50 jaar in Nederland. In deze periode is er veel veranderd, maar de inzet, mentaliteit en trots zijn nog altijd sterk aanwezig. Logistiek is meer dan vervoeren alleen. Met onze logistieke diensten verbinden wij jouw bedrijf met jouw klant. DHL Express begrijpt dat jouw zending meer is dan alleen een pakje. Wat je ook verstuurt, wij weten hoe jouw zending het verschil kan maken. Met ons wereldwijde netwerk levert DHL Express op tijd en op het juiste adres. Precies zoals jij aan jouw klant hebt beloofd!

Al onze medewerkers zijn door middel van een wereldwijd trainingsprogramma opgeleid tot Certified International Specialist. Hiermee heeft DHL een cultuur ontwikkeld waar inzet, passie en trots op DHL voorop staat en alles draait om de klant. Door het volgen van meerdere modules wordt kennis over internationaal expresvervoer vergroot. Hiermee kunnen wij jou als klant optimaal van dienst zijn en ondersteunen met internationaal zakendoen. Niet voor niets is DHL door het investeren in haar medewerkers weer gecertificeerd als ‘Top Employer’.

Name: FedEx Australia
Description:
FedEx Express is one of the world's largest express transportation companies, providing fast and reliable delivery to more than 220 countries and territories. 

FedEx Express uses a global air-and-ground network to speed delivery of time-sensitive shipments, by a definite time and date supported by a money-back guarantee.

In 2016, FedEx globally acquired the Dutch-owned TNT Express.  TNT originally, started its operations in Australia in 1946.  FedEx established its operations in Australia in 1989. 

As of April 1, 2021, the TNT and FedEx Express operating companies in Australia have been combined into one company.  

With a combined legacy of 74 years, FedEx Express offers a robust portfolio in Australia that is designed to make trade simple, fast and easy by providing a range of international and domestic services.

Name: Mobi Logística
Description:
Na MOBI, entendemos que a logística é mais do que simplesmente entregar produtos - é uma oportunidade de transformar negócios por meio da inovação. É por isso que investimos continuamente em tecnologia de ponta, com um foco incansável em inovar. 

Nossos dashboards intuitivos oferecem uma visão abrangente e em tempo real de suas entregas, desde a coleta até a entrega final, permitindo que você gerencie seus processos de forma prática e eficaz. 

Com soluções logísticas personalizadas para atender às necessidades exclusivas de cada negócio, estamos preparados para superar todas as suas expectativas. Desde serviços de coleta, distribuição, armazenamento, picking e packing, até uma equipe dedicada de tecnologia e profissionais de relacionamento com o cliente, estamos aqui para garantir agilidade, precisão e adaptação às suas necessidades em cada etapa do processo. 

E o melhor de tudo? Com uma cobertura nacional e transferência multimodal, estamos presentes em mais de 1.200 municípios, oferecendo rapidez e segurança em cada entrega. 

Explore mais sobre nossa história e descubra como podemos ajudar a impulsionar o seu negócio. Vem pra Mobi! Acesse https://mobi.com.br/ 

#SomosMobers #VamosJuntos

Description:
Courier Express has hinged its success on two primary areas: people and technology. 

We are led by a team of first-rate managers -- experts in their fields -- who are given the freedom and authority to run their operations the way they know best. From top to bottom, we have assembled an elite team of employees, with numerous years of experience in the courier, freight and warehousing industries. 

In addition to a team of exceptional employees, Courier Express is committed to investing in the latest technology, using state-of-the-art communication equipment and highly automated systems to provide our clients unparalleled service. Name: fiyuu
Description:
2016 yılında Türkiye’de ilk siparişini taşıyan fiyuu, kendisini “yeni nesil bir son teslimat platformu” olarak konumlandırmakta ve müşterilerine en iyi “uçtan uca teslimat” deneyimini sunma misyonuyla faaliyet göstermektedir. Adana’da hizmete başlayan fiyuu, bugün Türkiye genelinde 5.000’i aşkın kurye ağıyla, 1.600’den fazla noktadan ürün alarak aylık 3 milyondan fazla teslimat gerçekleştirmektedir.

Sektörün öncü markalarından biri olan fiyuu, sürekli gelişim anlayışıyla süreç ve sistemlerini yenileyerek, esnek, etkin, güvenli ve dijital olarak takip edilebilir bir teslimat ağı sunmaktadır. Bu özellikleri sayesinde sektörde kurumsallık ve köklü marka algısını pekiştirmektedir.

Müşteri deneyimi ve operasyonel verimliliği önceliklendiren fiyuu, iş ortaklarına “rasyonel teslimat çözümleri” sunarak, operasyonlarını daha etkin ve kaliteli hale getirmek için teknolojik altyapısına sürekli yatırım yapmaktadır. Özellikle saha dağıtım operasyonları için, öz kaynaklar ve üniversite iş birlikleriyle geliştirilen yapay zeka destekli atama algoritması, sektörde fark yaratan verimlilik avantajı sağlayarak optimum hizmet seviyesine ulaşılmasını mümkün kılmaktadır.

Kurye takip uygulaması, kuryelerin anlık izlenmesini sağlayarak operasyonel verimliliği ve hizmet kalitesini artırırken, platform bağımsız yapısı sayesinde restoran, market ve e-ticaret işletmelerine hızlı teslimat desteği sunmaktadır.

Yoğun şehir ve iş temposu içerisinde, tüketicilerin ihtiyaçlarını istedikleri zaman ve istedikleri noktaya güvenilir bir şekilde ulaştırmayı hedefleyen fiyuu, kurumsal sipariş teslimat çözümleriyle işletmelere katma değer sağlamaktadır. Yenilikçi ve verimlilik odaklı yaklaşımıyla büyümeye devam eden fiyuu, teknolojiyi odağına alarak sektördeki öncülüğünü sürdürmektedir.

Description:
We’re passionate about all things rail and locomotive related – and equally passionate about providing world-class quality and safety. Above all, we are committed to bringing fresh prospects, progress and new horizons to the people of Africa. We offer the following services:

Rail Operations
We offer full-service rail freight operations, rail network operations, locomotive operations, or leasing – Traxtion Sheltam will make sure that the wheels of your business keep turning. Traxtion Sheltam is RSR accredited and ISO9001 certified and a level 3 BBBEE provider.

Technical
We connect Africa, we move Africa. With a skilled team of in-house artisans and decades of experience in maintaining, rebuilding and overhauling locomotives to OEM standards.

HR & Training
We firmly believe in the power of human capital and we continue to invest in its development through motivation, training and inspiration. Our TETA accredited diesel-electric technical training centre in Gauteng puts apprentice artisans through an intensive 3-year course that culminates in a red seal trade test certificate. Our training centre also runs driver training and refresher courses.

Safety & Compliance
Reliability is our watchword. Decades of experience in our field and the insights gained from the constant refining of our own business enable us to provide our customers with invaluable guidance. Our practical advisory services include ISO 9001 accreditation, RSR compliance, safety management systems, full-spectrum safety and compliance audits and occupational health and safety.

Traxtion Leasing
A proud, black-owned company, Traxtion Leasing is committed to advancing Africa. We service the entire continent, providing cost-effective, innovative and reliable rolling stock lease solutions.

Traxtion Projects
We fund rail and power generation infrastructure across Africa. The group boasts strong shareholder equity and efficient debt funding.

Name: Tuffnells Parcels Express
Description:
Is your freight big, long, small or bulky? Whatever the shape or size — trust Tuffnells to deliver!

With over 100 years of experience, Tuffnells is the trusted delivery partner for businesses across the UK. Whether it's a small parcel, bulky item, irregular-sized consignment, or pallet load, we offer flexible and reliable delivery solutions that others simply can't match.

Our services include:

- Two Man Service:*Enjoy nationwide, white-glove, room-of-choice delivery — ideal for heavy or delicate items. Standard delivery is 3–5 days, but we also offer urgent same-day or next-day options.
  
- Dedicated Delivery Van Service: Our operations team expertly schedules our nationwide van network to maximise routing efficiency and keep your costs down.

- Tuffnells Everything Service: From small parcels to oversized items (up to 6 metres in length) and full pallets, we specialise in handling everything — no matter the size or complexity.

- Tuffnells Bulk: Our premium pallet delivery service includes exclusive options for lengths up to 4 metres through our pallet network.

- Tuffnells Smalls: Cost-effective and premium small parcel services, including economy and next-day delivery options.

For international needs, we also offer a dependable road-based service into Europe and a global Air Express option — making Tuffnells your complete distribution partner.

We make the complex simple. Trust Tuffnells to deliver — every time.

Name: SkyNet Worldwide Express
Description:
SkyNet Worldwide Express launched its first services in the USA in 1972.Through understanding customers various needs and in response to market changes we have become the largest independently owned express network in the world providing flexible and reliable door to door services. With major gateways in Dubai, Hong Kong, Johannesburg, London, New York, Miami, Singapore and Sydney.

As a single-source provider, we believe that with our flexible business model we maintain a competitive advantage by providing our customers consistent, worldwide, door-to-door delivery. Our team carries out and keeps up its success by creating effective, reliable, and flexible solutions that meet the market current and future needs. To succeed and expand in today’s marketplace, we use advanced information systems as a key component in providing high quality service.

Independently Owned And Locally Operated the SkyNet Worldwide Express Network is a unique international courier cooperative. It is composed of locally owned courier companies operating as SkyNet licensees.

Name: Servicios Postales Nacionales 4-72
Description:
4-72, La Red Postal de Colombia es la marca bajo la cual opera Servicios Postales Nacionales S.A., empresa a la cual le ha sido asignada la responsabilidad de garantizar y permitir a todos los ciudadanos un servicio postal de calidad, competitivo y de alcance universal.

4-72 ofrece un amplio portafolio de servicios de correo, especiales de correo y mensajería especializada, mediante la red de mayor cobertura nacional.

Colombia tiene presencia activa en la Unión Postal Universal - UPU, organismo especializado del cual hacen parte 191 países que conforman la red postal más amplia y extensa del mundo.

Name: Chronopost International Maroc
Description:
Filiale commune des groupes Barid Al Maghrib et de Geopost - DPDgroup (Groupe La Poste France), Chronopost International Maroc est le spécialiste marocain du transport et de la messagerie internationale depuis 2001. Elle met à la disposition de ses clients une Gamme complète de services de transport conçue spécialement pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de l’ensemble de ses clients. Par voie aérienne ou routière, à des délais express ou rapides, le client peut choisir le service répondant le mieux à son besoin ainsi qu’à son budget. 

Chronopost dispose d’un réseau de vente national de proximité fortement implanté à travers le pays constitué de plus de 1500 agences du réseau mutualisé de Barid Al Maghrib et de 11 agences à travers son réseau en propre. Elle bénéficie de l’avantage du réseau international DPDGroup, composé de plus de 32 filiales à travers le monde (desservant plus de 230 pays).

Chronopost est le premier opérateur de transport international Express au Maroc à être certifié ISO 9001 V 2015 et labélisé RSE (label Responsabilité Sociale de l’Entreprise délivré par la CGEM). Il détient le titre d’Opérateur Economique Agréé de classe A (OEA) délivré par l’Administration des Douanes et Impôts Indirects (ADII). Ce titre lui permet de bénéficier de simplifications en matière de formalités douanières et d'alléger les contrôles ce qui accélère l’opération de passage en douane. 
Représentant en douane enregistré, le service Transit de Chronopost est habilité à réaliser l’ensemble des opérations de dédouanement de ses clients.

Aujourd’hui, Chronopost est une référence sur le marché de transport et messagerie internationale au Maroc. Elle occupe la première place sur le segment grand public et la deuxième sur le marché marocain.

Name: DHL Express Belgium
Description:
The DHL Express Belgium adventure began in 1978 when we started delivering our first packages. With sky-high ambitions and innovation in mind, we set the logistics world on fire and became a market leader. For more than 40 years, we have been safely and reliably connecting people and businesses in more than 220 countries and territories. 
We are the world's leading company in the logistics sector and last year (2020), for the sixth time in a row, we were recognised as Global Top Employer. Our strong performance in the areas of Leadership Development and Talent Strategy played a major role in our nomination. 

Our 830 employees did not just join us randomly. For us, it is crucial that all our employees share the same values. We all have passion, speed, a can-do attitude and a bit of yellow blood running through our veins. At DHL, we like to invest in the next generation, which is necessary in a fast-evolving and innovative logistics industry. For instance, we have our Young Graduates program, which encourages young talent to grow into the next generation of leaders within DHL.

It is top priority for us as a company to treat our employees, the environment, social responsibility and the resources entrusted to us in a respectful and sustainable manner. Corporate Responsibility is an integral part of our business strategy. With "Living Responsibility" as our motto, we focus on environmental protection (GoGreen), disaster management (GoHelp), education (GoTeach) and support employee volunteering (Global Volunteer Day, Living Responsibility Fund). 

This has enabled us to contribute to sustainable and positive change in the world. In Belgium, we make this GoGreen approach very concrete by using bicycle couriers, sustainable aircraft, electric vehicles and driving on green energy (24% of our fleet). Since 2021, we are also the first logistics company to open a brand new CityHub in a circular, eco-effective business park.

Dengan jaringan operasional yang mencakup 69 kota besar, lebih dari 500 kantor perwakilan, 3.200 gerai, dan 12.000 karyawan, TIKI hadir untuk memenuhi kebutuhan pengiriman domestik maupun internasional.

Melalui semangat “Paketmu Duniaku,” TIKI terus bertransformasi menjadi brand yang relevan, adaptif, dan dekat dengan masyarakat di setiap generasi.

The GLS network consists of about 70 central and regional transshipment points and about 1,400 depots supported by about 28,000 delivery vehicles and about 4,000 trucks. Name: GLS Denmark
Description:

Vores vejledende leveringstider er mindre end 24 timer i Danmark og 24-96 timer i Europa. Skal det gå endnu hurtigere, eller har du brug for special-transport, tilbyder vi også kurer- og express ydelser.

Vi forbinder Danmark, og hver dag leverer vi alt fra kærlige hilsner til forretningshemmeligheder. Vi ved, hvor meget indholdet i pakkerne betyder, så vores mantra er: 

Er det vigtigt for dig, er det vigtigt for os. 

Det gælder ikke bare for hver eneste pakke, der sendes og modtages, men også i forhold til vores medarbejdere. Vi er en arbejdsplads, der løfter hinanden til nye niveauer – fagligt såvel som personligt. Hos os er der plads til alle.

As a strictly neutral consolidator, we afford our customers the protection and confidence to entrust their cargo to us, knowing that we exclusively serve freight forwarders.

Our global partner network, which shares our philosophy and strengths, guarantees the global reach and service integrity necessary to provide our customers with the best possible service.

In today's economic climate, characterized by challenges and market fluctuations, Contra's strength lies in its competitiveness in these situations.

With our head office based in Durban, additional offices across Africa, and partners spread across the globe, our team is fully prepared to deliver world-class service to you.

Description:
HEYSEN SHIPPING COMPANY, fue fundada en el año 2013, liderada por Ejecutivos de alto nivel con mas de 15 años de experiencia en el transporte de carga internacional, por aire, mar y tierra. Nuestro performance nos ha permitido ingresar y ganar nuestra cuota en el mercado, nuestros solidos valores han logrado generar la confiabilidad y fidelidad de nuestros clientes.

El transporte marítimo y aéreo Internacional esta afrontando constantes nuevos retos que nuestra compañía ha sabido manejar con éxito.

Nuestros servicios en logística internacional, abarcan desde el pick up de los productos en las empresas proveedoras en un país determinado, exportar dichos productos, realizando los trámites ante aduana del mismo país de origen, embarcar los productos, ya sea vía marítima FCL, o carga consolidada marítima LCL; o vía aérea, rastrear las cargas durante todo el transito marítimo o aéreo, hasta la llegada de la nave o avión al país de destino y también brindar servicios de importación de dichos productos, realizando los trámites aduaneros, ante la aduana de los países de destino, y entrega de los productos en la empresa de nuestros clientes.

Contamos con alianzas estratégicas con nuestros socios a nivel global, manejamos todos los puertos y aeropuertos del mundo, el cual nos da la facilidad de ofrecer nuestros servicios sin límites, Con el fin de reducir tiempo y costos; estando en constante comunicación y asesoramiento con nuestros clientes en el proceso que conlleva un embarque de carga internacional, una exportación o importación.

Description:
With Sogestran Logistics, organize your sustainable transport efficiently!

We are specialists in combined containerized river/rail/road transport and urban logistics.

We organise the combined door-to-door transport of your containers. We offer you a complete solution. We rely on our expertise in river transport in the North, on the Seine, the Rhône and the Rhine, and our integrated road service for pre- and post-carriage.

In urban logistics, in Paris, in Lyon and in Belgium, we handle the door-to-door transport of your goods all the way to the very core of the city (pre-/post-carriage and river mode).

Our customs expertise, for both import and export, and our efficient information workflow are designed to simplify your operations.

Our AEO and ISO 9001 certifications reflect the quality of our services.

Sogestran Logistics brings together:
- LOGI PORTS SHUTTLE, a specialist in combined container transport between seaports and inland ports on the Seine and Rhône for 30 years;
- NORD PORTS SHUTTLE, a specialist in container transport between ports and platforms in the northern basin;
- DUBBELMAN CONTAINER TRANSPORTEN, one of the most experienced container transport operators in the Upper Rhine region;
- BLUE LINE LOGISTICS, a specialist in urban logistics on inland waterways (Paris, Lyon, Antwerp).

Name: divoora.ch
Description:
Il mondo cambia velocemente e con lui mutano le nostre necessità: rispetto al passato si dedica sempre meno tempo e importanza nel fare la spesa, nel cucinare o nel procurarsi i prodotti necessari alle attività quotidiane. 

La frenesia della vita odierna ci impone giornate lunghe e stressanti, ritmi lavorativi frenetici, togliendoci di fatto l’energia per occuparci del nostro benessere personale. I servizi on-demand nascono con l’intento di alleggerirci da queste difficoltà dell’era moderna.

Divoora si pone l’obiettivo di raggiungere qualsiasi target di clientela: dal manager in carriera allo studente universitario, dal single al nucleo famigliare, dal giovane gruppo di amici sino a persone con qualche anno in più.

Non hai voglia di fare la spesa o non ne hai avuto il tempo? Sei uno stacanovista e rimani in ufficio fino a tardi? Sei malato e non hai le forze di uscire di casa per andare in farmacia? Inviti amici a casa ma non hai voglia di sporcare la cucina? Hai una famiglia numerosa e non riesci a trovare un accordo su cosa preparare per rendere tutti felici? Hai una cena galante, ma non hai tempo di passare dal fioraio?

Vai su Divoora.ch, seleziona il punto vendita e ordina ciò che vuoi, dove vuoi!

Name: STX Global Services
Description:
STX Global Services: transporte y logística integral
En STX Global Services sabemos que los retos de nuestros clientes en transporte, logística y mensajería urgente evolucionan continuamente. Nuestra experiencia como empresa líder en el sector nos permite diseñar soluciones a medida, totalmente personalizadas, e implementarlas en cada negocio. 

Transporte nacional e internacional, almacenaje integral, picking, packing, mensajería y transporte urgente, courier, logística especial… Adaptamos todos nuestros servicios para ofrecerle la mejor solución de logística integral. Hacemos de sus necesidades algo personal. 
Tanto grandes corporaciones como medianas y pequeñas empresas de distintos sectores ya lo han comprobado.

STX Global Services surge en enero de 2009 a raíz de la unión de las empresas de transporte STX Express Worldwide y STF Global Services, con el objetivo de responder a una doble exigencia del sector: diversificarse hacia la logística e impulsar la expansión territorial.
Para cumplir con el primer requisito, STX implementa el innovador concepto de Servicio Total, en el que destacan las características de integral y a medida. Almacenes dotados de las últimas tecnologías y cercanos a Madrid capital (y que suman una superficie de 10.000 m2) hacen posible que nuestros clientes monitoricen la gestión de sus mercancías.

Por otro lado, STX está inaugurando, en relación con la segunda demanda, Oficinas Dedicadas de Atención al Cliente en España y Portugal -hoy cuenta con 20-, consagradas a ofrecer servicios de transporte y logística integral y a medida, al tiempo que desarrolla su red de receptorías con el proyecto de apertura (actualmente en fase de ejecución) de más de 300 estratégicamente situadas. 
Así, STX Global Services presta un servicio de alto valor añadido a la vez que de coste racional, algo en lo que también tienen mucho que ver sus 73 distribuidores y delegados con más de 800 profesionales.

Name: Drivv powered by Courierboard
Description:
Drivv powered by Courierboard is the Online Delivery Network connecting individuals and companies with shipping needs to hundreds of professional courier companies throughout the U.S. and Canada.  Drivv has over 1,000 member courier companies handing deliveries in over 18,000 cities. Thousands of shippers use Drivv to get multiple delivery quotes online from courier companies across the country.  

Companies and individuals with shipments post delivery quote requests and delivery RFPs on Drivv to get competitive quotes easily in one cities or dozens.  .

Post a shipping quote request and courier companies will respond back to your directly with quotes.  

Go Green by Freight Pooling using Drivv powered by Courierboard.

Individuals and companies posting shipping quote requests on Drivv can save money and help the environment.  Post and get shipping quotes from multiple courier companies in your area that may have vehicles already delivering between the pickup/delivery location you require - who can freight pool your shipment with others on the same truck. 

Freight pooling give companies and individuals an economic benefit: gettting lower shipping rates, and helps the environment by filling available space on delivery trucks and vans. Reducing the number of vehicles on the road saves fuel and reduces carbon emissions.

With over 50 years of expertise, Hedley’s Group has established itself as a leading name in fine art and luxury logistics. We specialise in the secure and efficient transport of fine art, antiques and high-value items across the globe. Today, our services extend beyond traditional art handling to offer a full A–Z solution — including transportation, installation, packing, and storage — tailored for the worlds of interior design, contemporary furniture and collectible objects.

Headquartered in London, with offices in New York, Paris and the South of France — and supported by a global network of trusted agents — Hedley’s Group delivers a truly international logistics service. Our teams are not only experts in the handling and transportation of fragile and valuable pieces, but are also highly trained in gallery, exhibition, and interior design installations.

From major overseas projects to local deliveries, we manage every detail — including bespoke packing and international shipping, as well as import/export documentation — ensuring smooth transit and peace of mind for our clients.

Our specialist handling division holds accreditations from leading industry bodies including IATA (as a registered cargo agent), BIFA, BAR, and LAPADA. These affiliations enhance our ability to navigate regulatory landscapes, secure trusted partnerships, and access vital logistics intelligence.

Our purpose-built storage facilities and custom crating services complete our end-to-end offering. Whether supporting a single shipment or managing complex, multi-site installations, Hedley’s Group provides tailored solutions designed to protect your assets and minimise disruption at every stage.

Description:
Da ottant’anni le merci si spostano con noi.
G.I.D.D. S.r.l. Gruppo Italia Distribuzione Depositi nasce nel 1980 ad Agrate Brianza (Milano) dall’evoluzione di Gautier Corriere Espresso, azienda di trasporti fondata nel 1934 da Ubaldo Gautier e attualmente guidata da Walter e Umberto Gautier.

Esperienza e professionalità fanno di G.I.D.D. un partner di assoluta fiducia in grado di fornire servizi altamente qualificati e sicuri.

Il continuo rinnovamento tecnologico ha permesso a G.I.D.D. di offrire servizi decisamente all’avanguardia in termini di software di gestione e interazione con l’intervento umano.

Name: AB Texel France
Description:
La division AB Texel France est spécialisée dans le transport de pommes de terre et d'autres produits agricoles en France. L'entreprise est établie à un emplacement stratégique, à Neuville-en-Ferrain dans le nord de la France.

Vous pouvez vous adresser à AB Texel France pour toutes vos demandes de transport de produits agricoles, aussi bien en vrac qu'en unités emballées. Pour assurer ses missions, l'entreprise utilise les équipements les plus performants et les plus modernes, tels que des semi-remorques auto-déchargeuses et des semi-remorques à rideaux coulissants. Nos chauffeurs sont qualifiés et s'appuient souvent sur une expérience dans le domaine de l'agriculture. Ils ont tous la nationalité française et connaissent donc parfaitement le monde agricole français.
