Name: BURNSIDE
Description: We'll take the strain away by looking after your current and future warehousing and distribution needs. We are always innovative and proactive in our understanding of the logistics solutions you require, providing the detailed logistics requirements of a modern business.

Name: TTP transport
Description:
TTP est une société de transport léger,  basée à Préseau, près de Valenciennes dans les hauts-de-France. 

Notre société est spécialisée dans le transport de Fret (marchandises), transport express et messagerie. 

Nous desservons une large zone géographique en France (Haut de France, île de France, Paris intra muros, Grand Est, Normandie, etc…..). Nous  proposerons bientôt la Belgique , les Pays Bas ainsi que le Luxembourg. 

Pour toute demande de renseignement , tarif et zone, nous sommes joignable au 06.12.33.71.89 ou au ttp.transports59@gmail.com. 
Nous vous proposerons une offre adaptée, personnalisée, sur mesure en fonction de vos besoins.

A très vite !

Name: WorldCoverage Shipments & Cargo Ltd
Description:
World Coverage Shipment and Cargo Limited is a freight firm that offers total freight solutions in the areas of logistics, import, export, procurement, leasing, and chartering (freight brokers). Over the course of its history, the firm has built a reputation for excellence and an excellent freight portfolio, which can be linked to several states and cities both domestically and globally.

World Coverage Shipment and Cargo Limited was founded in Nigeria as a worldwide company that rigorously adheres to global freight procedures to achieve standard quality while also dominating freight services in Nigeria and beyond.

We would want to take this opportunity to express our interest in collaborating with your business in the aforementioned areas, which would be mutually advantageous to all of us.

Name: Embassy Freight Services - Italy is now General Noli
Description:
In July 2022 Embassy Freight Services merged with General Noli. 

Embassy Freight Services is a freight forwarding and logistics company that uses the best combination of technology, processes and people to support today’s global supply chain needs.

Name: FTL- Transnordestina
Description: A Ferrovia Transnordestina Logística (FTL) é uma empresa privada que transporta cargas ferroviárias há 22 anos, escoando produtos de forma segura, regular e com custos competitivos. Ela tem a concessão da Malha Nordeste da antiga Rede Ferroviária Federal S.A. que foi privatizada em 1997.

Name: Prosperity Cargo Management
Description: Empresa de agenciamento de cargas, que oferece serviços de logística nacional, internacional e despacho aduaneiro, incluindo frete aéreo, marítimo, remessa expressa (courier), frete rodoviário, despacho aduaneiro, licença de importação, EX tarifário, assessoria completa no que dizer respeito ao Comércio Exterior, com cadastro nas três modalidades do RADAR, etc.

Name: Transline International (Part of BTL Group)
Description:
Transline International Ltd part of BTL Group UAB which is a leading logistics and transport solutions provider, delivering excellence across the UK and Europe. With a fleet of over 1,500 trucks across the group and strategically located offices in Essex, Cardiff, Rugby, and Ipswich, we are well-positioned to support businesses with scalable, efficient, and reliable logistics services.

We specialise in end-to-end transport and distribution, tailored to meet the needs of a wide range of industries. Our commitment to innovation, safety, and customer satisfaction has earned us a trusted reputation in the logistics sector.

Whether you're looking for a long-term logistics partner or flexible support for your supply chain, Transline International is driven to deliver on time, every time.

Let’s move forward, together.

Name: The Supply Chain Services
Description:
Welcome to The Supply Chain Services!
We are committed to providing our clients with top-notch freight forwarding services that are both efficient and cost-effective. We understand that shipping goods can be a complicated and time-consuming process, which is why we strive to make it as simple and stress-free as possible. Whether you need to transport goods by air or sea, we have the expertise and resources to get your cargo to its destination on time and within budget.

At Supply Chain Services, we pride ourselves on our commitment to customer satisfaction. We work closely with each of our clients to understand their unique needs and develop customized solutions to meet their specific requirements. Our goal is to make the shipping process as seamless and stress-free as possible, so our clients can focus on running their business.

So whether you’re looking for reliable freight forwarding services, Import/Export consultancy, or both, you can count us to deliver the more value in your business. Contact us today to learn more about how we can help your business grow and succeed.

Name: Treeco – Naturalnie w paczce
Description:
Wypełniamy wolne przestrzenie w paczkach ekologicznym papierem
By pomimo wysokiej konsumpcji realizowanej drogą e-commerce dbać o Zielony Ład na planecie

Naturalnie w paczce
Naturalnie z TreECO

Jesteśmy partnerem dla e-commerce, wspieramy procesy logistyczne w tym biznesie. Dostarczamy kompleksowe rozwiązania do ekologicznego wypełniania oraz zabezpieczania przesyłek kurierskich: od dzierżawy sprzętu i dostaw papieru przez doradztwo w procesach optymalizacyjnych.

- Pomagamy w wyborze urządzenia dopasowanego do specyfiki biznesu
- Wdrażamy sprzęt na stanowisku pracy i przeprowadzamy szkolenia z obsługi maszyn
- Uczymy, jak obniżać koszty poprzez wydajne pakowanie i minimalne zużycie papieru oraz zastosowanie EKO-Taśm WAT
- Zapewniamy regularne dostawy papieru
- Zapewniamy serwis i konserwacje maszyn

Dostarczamy ekologiczne i jednocześnie ekonomiczne rozwiązania, optymalizujące prace związane z organizacją wysyłek paczek. Ograniczamy ślad węglowy, a jednocześnie szukamy oszczędności, które przekładają się na redukcję kosztów biznesowych podmiotów e-commerce.

Name: Epilog
Description:
Epilog débarque à Lyon ! Bienvenue sur notre nouvelle page !

Notre flotte :

3 triporteurs “Tenders” @Urban Arrow
Nos triporteurs offrent un important volume de chargement sans faire de compromis sur la souplesse de conduite. La longueur supplémentaire de la plateforme du vélo permet d’y disposer une palette Europe et beaucoup plus !

1 biporteur @Urban Arrow
Notre vélo cargo est quant à lui optimisé pour répondre à l’exigence des centres-villes. En combinant la capacité de chargement d’une camionnette à la flexibilité d’un vélo électrique, c’est le parfait véhicule écologique capable de franchir les derniers kilomètres de la ville.

1 fourgon 20m3 avec hayon (Iveco Daily) roulant au GNV, nous permettant de livrer les positions de + de 300kg et/ou les palettes hors gabarit dans la ZFE lyonnaise.

Notre histoire et notre équipe :

Avec le soutien des Triporteurs de l’Ouest, Epilog voit officiellement le jour en Juillet 2021 avec l’ambition de décarboner le dernier kilomètre dans le centre-ville de Lyon.

Simon et Jérôme : nous sommes 2 passionnés de vélo. De formation logistique pour l'un et commerciale pour l'autre, nos chemins se sont croisés sur les bancs de la formation à la mécanique vélo. Depuis, nous avons décidé de nous lancer dans cette aventure à 2 afin de proposer une nouvelle alternative à la logistique urbaine.

Nous serons ravis d'assurer la livraison au quotidien de vos colis, le tout avec le sourire !

https://www.epilog-lyon.com
https://www.facebook.com/epilog-lyon
https://instagram.com/epilog-lyon

Name: Express International Group
Description:
With over 130 employees, 52 years of experience and dedicated management team, EIG HAS mastered the sophisticated art of moving and relocation services. 
Locally and internationally and EIG is proud to be the premier service provider for some of the largest corporations in the world offering a variety of moving related services including warehousing, logistics activities, insurance, transportation, customs clearance, and full door to door shipping. 
EIG is also extremely proud to be a FIDI FAIM certified mover, guaranteeing its select clientele a worldwide network of professional agents to support all their moving and relocation requirements.

Name: JUMiNGO
Description:
JUMiNGO ist der ideale Versandpartner für weltweite Standard- und Expresssendungen, denn durch unsere Zusammenarbeit mit den renommierten Versanddienstleistern wie DHL Express, UPS, FedEx u.v.m. können wir unseren Kunden, das beste Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis für weltweite (Express-) Sendungen anbieten.
Mit der Vergleichs- und Buchungsmöglichkeit auf jumingo.com finden Geschäfts- sowie Privatkunden schnell und übersichtlich den besten Tarif und können bei Bedarf u.a. Zolldokumente oder eine Transportversicherung im Buchungsprozess hinzufügen. Nach der Buchung können alle Sendungen zentral an einem Ort verwaltet werden, die Sendungsverfolgung ist selbstverständlich integriert.
Unser Versandmanagementsystem bietet neben den klassischen eCommerce-Anbindungen wie bspw. Amazon, ebay, Shopify und woocommerce viele weitere Funktionen, um den Versand - vor allem für Geschäftskunden - zu vereinfachen, u.a. digitale Zollübermittlung, Datenimport, Teamfunktion etc. So können sich unsere Kunden auf ihr Kerngeschäft fokussieren.
Unsere Versandexperten können Geschäftskunden je nach Versandvolumen zusätzliche Sonderkonditionen anbieten. Sie beraten aber ebenfalls zu den Themen Zollauflagen, Transportversicherungen und Co.
Unser motivierter Kundenservice kümmert sich persönlich montags - freitags von 08:00-18:00 Uhr um Kundenanfragen.  

Jetzt kostenlos registrieren und bereits ab der ersten Sendung sparen: www.jumingo.com

Übrigens: Wir wurden mit dem Kununu Top Company Siegel ausgezeichnet als einer der beliebtesten Arbeitgeber Deutschlands 2024!

Name: TrazFavela
Description:
Nos somos Trazfavela é uma startup de impacto social que tem como um dos serviços um sistema de logística e delivery de quase tudo, que atua com comerciantes de dentro e fora das favelas, levando produtos de dentro da favela para fora, e de fora para dentro, e fortalecendo o comércio local.

Somos mas do que um delivery conceito. Ele busca fortalecer o comércio local, levando e trazendo produtos para dentro e fora das comunidades sem prejudicar a localização. O Trazfavela também gera oportunidades de trabalho para os moradores das áreas periféricas.

Name: JeP Transportes LTDA
Description: Somos uma empresa oficialmente fundada há 4 anos, entretanto atuando no ramo logístico e transportes como gestor de operações a mais de 15 anos. A J&P Transportes tem a missão de atender as mais diversas demandas dos clientes de forma ágil e pontual, além da flexibilidade exigida do setor de cargas rodoviárias.

Name: MITSAFETRANS TRASPORTI & LOGISTICA HI-TECH
Description: MITSafetrans, Technical Courier market Leader nel proprio mercato, opera a livello Nazionale ed Europeo in diversi settori di attrezzature Hi-Tech, svolgendo servizi ad alto valore aggiunto, totalmente integrati alla loro logistica, trasporto, posizionamento e montaggio. Healthcare, Banking, Copier&Grafica, Fitness&Wellness, Vending&Cooling, Gambling, Energy&Telco, Industrial&Professional, Marketing&Retail sono i maggiori settori ad Alta Tecnologia che richiedono a MIT servizi ad elevata complessità operativa. In ambito Dangerous Goods MIT è Leader nella Logistica dei radiofarmaci attraverso la sua controllata MITRadiopharma. L’organizzazione dispone di 27 Depositi, 500 collaboratori specializzati tra diretti ed indiretti, per un fatturato che supera i 50 Milioni annui. MIT è fondatore di TENESO , società Network per lo stesso servizio in ambito europeo MITSafetrans è parte del gruppo DP DHL Supply Chain dall’Ottobre 2016

Name: Shipit.fi – Shipit Oy Ab
Description:
Shipit is an easy and reliable service transporting your parcels and pallets throughout the world. You can compare the services of all major transport companies and choose the best way of shipping your goods. 

We only use services of well-known and respected transportation companies. Whatever you are sending – Shipit offers one site service for all your delivery needs. Try it today!

Name: ACF Global Logistics
Description: ACF Global Logistics offers secure, warehouse, packing and fulfillment services in Detroit, Houston, and Laredo, TX. We offer full expedite, LTL, truckload, air, ocean logistics, and customs clearance from our facilities.

Name: 3A International
Description:
3A International was founded in 1995 as a privately-owned International Freight Forwarder specialized in providing tailored services and integrated logistics solutions.
• Two years later, 3A international continued to expand and launched 
its second branch in Alexandria in 1997 .3A further expanded its operation to Port Said and 6th of October to meet the variable needs of its customers- both at the local and global level.

• 3A is a fully licensed EIFFA and FIATA member. In addition to 
that 3A is an authorized “Air Cargo Agent” empowered to act as an 
approved ECAA.

In 2000, 3A has joined JAS Forwarding with the backing of its worldwide network of 360 offices operating in 109 country and over 3000 employees are able to provide a flexible and comprehensive solutions dedicated to meet all customer logistics requirements.

• In 2008, 3A has been awarded the ISO 9001:2000 Certificate, then it
was upgraded to ISO 9001:2008 Certificate in 2010

3A has continuously been chosen by Jas Forwarding as the best exclusive agent from 2007 till 2016 for its qualified performance

3A International provide air service, ocean service, warehousing-packing, custom clearance, projects, storage and insurance.

Name: GIRELLI LOGISTICS GROUP S.R.L.
Description:
GIRELLI LOGISTICS GROUP of Lugagnano di Sona (Verona), has been successfully operating in the transport and logistics sector for over forty years: a consolidated reality in the field of national and international transport, able to meet the needs of a constantly changing market. evolution.


Our Advantages:
- Fast timing
- Precise and friendly service
- Flexibility

Our platforms:
- SONA (Verona) with 4000 square meters of warehouse for integrated logistics, collection and national distribution solutions
- ORADEA (Romania) for daily departures and arrivals
- RADES (Tunisia) for three-weekly departures and arrivals

Name: DPD fresh
Description:
DPD fresh is the first courier service to focus on delivering food products in actively refrigerated bi-temperature (4°C and -18°C) vehicles to all your B2B and B2C customers. This means you no longer need to buy expensive and environmentally unfriendly iso boxes or cooling elements. 

All your delicacies, packed in sturdy and stackable cardboard boxes, are sorted manually and delivered at the right temperature in Belgium, Luxembourg and France, so they arrive at your recipients in the same qualitative condition as in which our driver picked them up the day before.

Producer, distributor or webshop, you can rely on our expertise and quality for delivery to all your clients, while we monitor and follow-up the entire cold chain.

Name: Mail Boxes Etc. Hrvatska
Description: Sustav MBE sa svojih preko 3000 poslovnica širom svijeta nudi uglavnom malim i srednjim poduzećima, ali i većim tvrtkama, usluge dodane vrijednosti koje im omogućuju učinkovitije poslovanje. MBE svojim klijentima omogućava fokusiranje na osnovnu djelatnost preuzimajući dio poslova koji im troše neproporcionalno puno vremena i novca. MBE također nudi klijentima mogućnosti inovacije procesa logistike i marketinga, a u svojim centrima nudi i neke od usluga koje su standardno teže dostupne malim i mikro tvrtkama. Naposljetku, MBE ostvaruje vezu između svojih klijenata i velikih tvrtki, kada bi takva veza u direktnom odnosu, zbog specifičnosti procesa na pojedinoj strani, predstavljala teško ostvarive uvjete jednoj od strana. Upravo zato naš moto i jest "Učinimo nemoguće mogućim".

Name: AP Line Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Your reliable feeder service partner between Karachi and Jebel Ali.

We offer COC, SOC, Reefer, Customs, Inland Transport & NVOCC solutions for seamless cargo movement.

Our expertise & global network ensure efficient, cost-effective shipping.

Contact us for a quote and experience the AP LINE difference!

Name: Business Plane Network
Description: Welcome to the Business Plane Network page!

Name: e-FAST India
Description:
e-FAST India, anchored by NITI Aayog (Govt of India), is a multi-stakeholder platform dedicated to accelerating the adoption of electric freight transportation in India.

Supported by WRI India and a network of over 90 industry and knowledge partners, e-FAST India (Electric Freight Accelerator for Sustainable Transport in India) co-creates effective solutions for freight electrification while addressing stakeholders' concerns.

Join us in revolutionising India's freight sector for a greener future!

Name: Erixmar
Description: Erixmar is an Italian company that since 1986 offers tailor-made solutions from the integrated logistics projects to air, sea and road transport.

Name: Plannive Logistics
Description:

At Plannive Logistics, we are redefining the logistics industry with cutting-edge solutions that seamlessly integrate technology, data, and innovation. As a forward-thinking freight forwarding company based in Karachi, Pakistan, we cater to businesses worldwide by providing agile, reliable, and cost-effective logistics services. Whether it's transportation, warehousing, or integrated supply chain management, we leverage strategic partnerships, advanced technologies, and a customer-first approach to deliver superior logistics solutions that meet the dynamic needs of global trade.

With our commitment to disruption and continuous improvement, we empower businesses to streamline their operations, accelerate growth, and drive sustainability. Let us help you navigate the complexities of modern logistics with the solutions you deserve.

Our Services:
• Ocean Freight Services
• Air Freight Cargo
• Courier Services
• Break Bulk and Project Cargo
• Warehousing and Storage
• Transportation Services
• End-to-End Supply Chain Solutions

Core Values:
• Customer-First Approach
• Innovation and Agility
• Reliability and Integrity
• Collaboration and Empowerment
• Global Reach, Local Expertise

Mission Statement:
Our mission at Plannive Logistics is to deliver innovative, data-driven logistics solutions that empower businesses to succeed in today’s fast-paced global marketplace. We strive to optimize every aspect of the supply chain, offering end-to-end services that provide reliability, speed, and cost-effectiveness. By embracing emerging technologies, nurturing global partnerships, and remaining agile, we aim to exceed our customers’ expectations and redefine the future of logistics.

Name: RednBlue
Description:
RednBlue was founded in 2017 with a clear purpose: to transform the online shopping experience in Panama.
What began as a solution to import products from abroad has evolved into multiple sub-brands, all united by one goal: to consistently deliver a legendary experience.

We operate through four specialized sub-brands:

Online Shopping
We facilitate purchases from international stores using our U.S. address. We provide excellent customer service and a transit time of 2 to 3 days from Miami to Panama.

RednBlue Logistics
We manage nationwide deliveries between branches and door-to-door shipments across Panama. We also offer special transport services for large-volume cargo using trucks or containers.

RednBlue Imports
We specialize in importing large or wholesale products from anywhere in the world to Panama.

Zelta (Software Division)
We create custom technology solutions: web portals, mobile apps, POS systems, AI-powered bots, cloud architectures, APIs, electronic invoicing, and tailor-made digital products.

Our values — commitment, integrity, adaptability, and teamwork — guide everything we do.

Across all our sub-brands, we uphold a single promise: A legendary experience, from beginning to end.

Name: Aramex New Zealand
Description:
At Aramex New Zealand our couriers are really going places. With 18 Regional Franchises and more than 300 Courier Franchisees, our network reaches every region in New Zealand, and beyond.

We offer competitive prices and reliable, scheduled courier services. Our delivery systems are backed up by the latest technology and real-time track and trace facilities making Aramex New Zealand the delivery partner of choice for businesses of all sizes. With easy integrations to leading e-commerce sites, our online delivery portal makes sending easy for thousands of online businesses.

Aramex New Zealand also run Blu Couriers, the largest crowdsourced delivery model in NZ. Parcel Connect is another of our innovative brands, offering flexibility and convenience to customers through a network of more than 200 agents across the country. We offer customers the option to collect their parcels when it suits them, from locations including petrol stations and convenience stores.

Now part of leading global transport and logistics company, Aramex, our heritage is firmly rooted in the local community. In 1983, New Zealander Bill McGowan saw a market for a locally owned and operated courier company to provide reliable courier services to businesses in the Hawke’s Bay region. With a passion for freight and logistics and a ‘delight the customer at the door’ mentality, the Fastway Couriers brand was born. 

In 2016, Fastway Couriers became part of the Aramex family, a leading global provider of comprehensive logistics and transportation solutions based in Jordan. Operating in 65 countries and delivering to 220 countries around the world, Aramex employs close to 16,000 people.

In 2019 we underwent a complete re-brand making the transition from Fastway Couriers to Aramex New Zealand officially. We still offer the same friendly, local service, plus a wide range of global opportunities for all customers.

Name: Mail Boxes Etc. UK & Ireland
Description:
Mail Boxes Etc. also known as MBE,* is the only nationwide provider of worldwide express courier services, package delivery, mailbox rental, full litho print and contactless digital print & copy services and more besides, - all under one roof.

We have over 150 stores currently open across the UK and Ireland and are part of a constantly growing global network of 2,600 business service centres in circa 50 countries around the world. The team at Mail Boxes Etc. have the knowledge, expertise and experience to provide you with high quality outsourced business solutions tailored for your specific business needs and associated services, at value-for-money prices.

But Mail Boxes Etc. is not just here for businesses. Our services are available for all customers, whether you want us to collect, pack and send an item you have purchased at auction, that important gift or eBay sale, or even send your personal belongings home at the end of your stay in the UK. We’ll make a single photocopy, sell you book of first class stamps or rent you a mailbox so you can keep your personal mail private. We also offer 'click and collect' solutions for the internet-savvy, online buyer who is too busy to wait in for a delivery at home.

And located either on or just off the high street, from Inverness to Plymouth, Belfast to Cork, we are just around the corner.

Mail Boxes Etc. operates as a franchise business, with business service centres across the UK and Ireland, owned and managed by independent entrepreneurs, supported by experienced service teams from a UK headquarters based in Oxfordshire and a global headquarters based in Milan, Italy.
 
Mail Boxes Etc. is continuing to expand across the UK - if you are looking for a new business opportunity, now is the time to join our established and successful franchise network. Find out more at www.mbe.co.uk/franchise.

Rent a mailbox/virtual office address at www.mbe.co.uk/mailbox

*and even occasionally, although inaccurately, as Mailboxes Etc.

Description:

Пошта пружа универзалне поштанске услуге и поседује ексклузивно право на обављање резервисаних услуга у оквирима одређених лимита по маси и цени, које гарантује држава.

Универзална поштанска услуга је делатност од општег интереса и представља скуп поштанских услуга које се обављају у континуитету на територији Републике Србије, у оквиру прописаног квалитета, по приступачним ценама и под једнаким условима за све кориснике.

Осим Поште Србије комерцијалне услуге обављају и друге компаније које имају одобрење Регулаторне агенције за електронске комуникације и поштанске услуге, с обзиром да у овом сегменту постоји слободна конкуренција.

Поред претежне делатности, Пошта Србије обавља и поштанске активности комерцијалног сервиса, промет и дистрибуцију поштанских марака и вредносница, финансијске делатности, заступање и посредовање у осигурању, телекомуникације (кабловске, бежичне, сателитске и остале телекомуникационе услуге), рачунарско програмирање и информационе услужне делатности повезане са телекомуникацијама, штампање и издавање, друмски превоз терета, складиштење, изнајмљивање некретнина и управљање њима.

Асортиман Поште броји више од 580 услуга високог квалитета, брзине и поузданости. Заступљене су поштанске, пакетске, експрес, финансијске, логистичке, електронске и маркетиншке услуге.

Name: CERTIFER (Belgium)
Description:
Certifer Belgorail is an inspection, testing and certification company, belonging to the Certifer group since 2017, one leader in railway certification with a global presence in 20 countries. 

Specialized in the railway industry, we provide our testing, inspection, and certification services to vehicle and component manufacturers, rail operators, infrastructure managers. 

From its creation, Belgorail has sought to meet the requirements imposed on rail system certification and inspection bodies at both national and international level. These requirements are those applicable to notified bodies, approved bodies operating in a national framework and product inspection and certification bodies.

Since 2004, Belgorail has progressively extended its activities to operate as:
• a Notified Body for European Directive 2008/57/EC
• an officially recognised body for verification of compliance with National Technical Rules in Belgium, France, Luxembourg and Spain (in European terminology a “Designated Body”)
• a entity responsible for coordination and execution of Rolling Stock Testing
• an Inspection Body in the rail sector
• an Independent Safety Assessor (ISA)
• an Independent Assessor (IA or AsBo) in the framework of the Common Safety Methods regulations (Risk Management Methods)  
•a Certification Body for Entities in Charge of Maintenance (ECM certification) and Maintenance Workshops. 
•an ISO 9001 Certification body 
Our company has also established various partnerships that have enabled it to broaden its battery of experts and extend the range of services offered.

Name: Orner E-commerce & Trade Freight Forwarder
Description:
Greetings!
As a dynamic Freight + E-commerce forwarder , we are dedicated to shaping the future of logistics and e-commerce. With a relentless passion for innovation and a commitment to excellence, we lead a talented team to provide cutting-edge solutions in cross-border , Sea & Air express shipments and e-commerce logistics.

 About Orner:

At Orner, we're not just in the business of moving goods; we're in the business of empowering businesses to thrive. Our specialized focus on air shipments and e-commerce logistics allows us to deliver unparalleled speed, reliability, and efficiency to our clients. We understand that in today's fast-paced world, every minute counts, and every delivery must be flawless. Orner rises to this challenge by combining advanced technology with industry expertise to ensure your goods reach their destination seamlessly.

 Our Creative Approach:

In a rapidly evolving Cross-border e-commerce & freight logistics landscape, creativity is key. Our role involves constantly exploring innovative strategies, fostering collaboration, and nurturing an environment of continuous improvement. We take pride in crafting solutions that not only meet our clients' immediate needs but also anticipate their future challenges.

 Our Vision:

At Orner, we envision a world where businesses of all sizes can expand their reach without borders, where logistics is a catalyst for growth, and where sustainability is a fundamental principle. We are committed to making this vision a reality by embracing emerging technologies, optimizing supply chains, and championing sustainability initiatives.

 Let's Connect:

We are always eager to connect with like-minded professionals, industry enthusiasts, and potential collaborators. Whether you're looking to discuss the latest trends in Freight and e-commerce logistics, explore potential partnerships, or simply engage in meaningful conversations about the industry, don't hesitate to reach out. Let's connect!

Name: NMT International Shipping UK Ltd.
Description:
NMT Shipping UK specialises in the worldwide shipment of of cars, trucks, trailers and other self-propelled or rolling cargo. Specialising in global RoRo (Roll on/Roll off) shipping, we are also your complete logistics provider, also moving your cargo via Air, Courier, LCL, FCL, Road and Container. Our independence means we can respond with speed and agility, at competitive prices. Our experience enables us to plan with precision and deliver an exceptional service and our knowledge ensures you get the right solution every time. 

NMT UK - YOUR DOORWAY TO THE WORLD
Founded in 2006 just outside the Port of Southampton, NMT International Shipping UK started life as a highly specialised RoRo shipping company. We now have five offices across the UK and continue to transport all types of wheeled and tracked machinery, globally in many different aspects. 
 
As the requirements of our customers have changed, NMT has adapted to meet the challenge. We now also offer containers, road haulage, air freight and pallet cargo, With the support of our huge global network, whatever you need moving and wherever it needs to go, you can be confident that NMT UK has the solution.

MORE THAN JUST A SHIPPING COMPANY 
We don't just move your cargo, we can guide you too. Helping you navigate the often rough waters around the industry. In particular, the confusing terminology used in goods transportation. From FCR to waybill and DPP to LCL, we can provide advice and guidance on what all these terms mean. It's our business to ensure you have all the information you need to make the right decisions for your business.

Name: epacking
Description:
Troska o środowisko jest głównym motorem działania epacking. Wszystkie dostępne w naszej ofercie opakowania i wypełniacze wykonane są w 100% z papieru. Działanie w duchu eco poświadczają również uzyskane przez nas certyfikaty, w tym FSC.

Ekologiczny surowiec
Materiał naszych produktów to w 100% biodegradowalny papier dostępny również z certyfikatem FSC, poświadczającym pozyskiwanie surowca z legalnych źródeł.

Profesjonalne doradztwo
Zastanawiasz się, który produkt najlepiej spełni Twoje potrzeby? Zaproponujemy Ci optymalne rozwiązanie.

Bezpłatne próbki
Przed podjęciem decyzji otrzymasz próbki materiałów do bliższego zapoznania się z ich właściwościami.

Name: FLUDIS
Description:

Articulés à la cyclo-logistique, notamment avec notre flotte de vélo-cargos, la logistique et le transport fluvial deviennent de véritables outils performants tant économiquement qu'environnementalement.

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour plus d'informations sur nos offres


FLUDIS offers innovative, carbon-free urban logistics solutions.
Our barges are transformed into mobile agencies, offering concrete solutions for modal shift in dense, complex urban environments.
Combined with cyclo-logistics, in particular with our Cyclofret fleet, river logistics and transport become truly efficient tools, both economically and environmentally.

Please do not hesitate to contact us for further information on our offers.

Name: Dietrich-Logistics Internacional S.A.S.
Description:
La compañía alemana Karl Heinz Dietrich GmbH & Co KG realizaba operaciones de transporte internacional de carga en Colombia con agentes desde la década de los 90. En el año 2001, tras ganar la licitación de transporte para SIEMENS S.A. en Colombia, contrata a Ricardo Ramírez como encargado de la operación logística de este proyecto.
 
Al transcurrir los años, comienza a expandirse la operación y los negocios hasta que en el año 2005, su Presidente, el Sr. Hans Ulrich Dietrich, otorga poder especial a Ricardo Ramírez para crear junto con el Sr. Fernando Herrera la agencia de carga DIETRICH-LOGISTICS Internacional Ltda. Esta compañía es fundada el 2 de enero de 2006 actuando primordialmente como agente de  Karl Heinz Dietrich GmbH & Co KG.
 
En el año 2008 ya alcanza a manejar negocios para más de 100 clientes y su crecimiento continúa constante en el ámbito de transporte de carga internacional en el país. Cuenta con oficinas en Bogotá, Buenaventura, Cartagena.

Para ello, contamos con tecnología de vanguardia aplicada a los sistemas de clasificación, manipulación y seguimiento de envíos. Speedel powers businesses with rapid, reliable, and transparent same day delivery solutions – 24/7/365 across the UK. From urgent local drops to critical national moves, we keep your world moving.

Technology is at the core of our operation. Our intelligent delivery management system and in-house tech capability enable complete visibility, seamless workflows, and fast, flexible problem-solving – helping you stay ahead in a fast-moving world.

We’re customer-focused, innovation-driven, and sustainability-minded. Whether it’s UK same day, European road freight, or global On Board Courier services, our expert team delivers with precision, care and confidence.

Our Purpose
To transform challenges into triumphs with rapid, reliable and transparent delivery solutions.

Our Vision
To shape a future where time and distance are no longer barriers to business success.

Discover more: www.speedel.co.uk

Name: Veldwerk Koerier
Description:
Wij zijn een koeriersbedrijf, dat de focus heeft op drie woorden die de kern van onze identiteit vatten:

• Partnerschap (met klanten, collega’s en leveranciers)
• Ontzorging (van elke partner)
• Toewijding (aan iedere partner en aan alles wat we doen)

We zijn sinds 1988 gevestigd in het Westland, maar hebben door intensieve samenwerking met onze partners de beschikking over een landelijk dekkend netwerk.

Alle transporten worden vanuit De Lier ingepland en gecoördineerd door een kundig en enthousiast team van planners dat 24 uur per dag, 7 dagen per week telefonisch bereikbaar is. We beantwoorden graag alle vragen en staan altijd klaar om mee te denken in elke logistieke uitdaging.

In het boekje ‘De reis zonder eind’ beschrijft onze directeur Fabian van Velden waarom we geloven in ons bestaansrecht en hoe we dit uiteindelijk door mogen geven aan toekomstige generaties.

Het is niet ons doel om positieve reviews te verzamelen, maar dit is wel het logische resultaat van wie we zijn. Wij willen bijzonder zijn en blijven in een wereld die soms lijkt te verharden.

Name: Averbei
Description:
A Averbei Tecnologia é uma empresa especializada em averbação para seguros de transporte de cargas.

Unimos simplicidade e inovação para cada tipo de operação logística, com um diferencial fundamental para o setor de seguros, já que somos a única que cumpre integralmente as regras da totalidade dos embarques averbados, por meio da nossa tecnologia exclusiva, que entrega 100% de acurácia para os processos de averbação.

Somos a mais completa solução para Transportadores, Embarcadores, Corretores e Companhias de Seguros, já que, ao oferecermos um processo de averbação à prova de falhas, promovemos uma maior segurança para empresas que transportam, eliminando as chances de negativa de indenização por falta de averbação, além de uma melhor gestão e incremento de prêmio a corretores e seguradoras.

Como outro diferencial, contamos com um suporte técnico especialista, disponível em escala 24 por 7, formado por profissionais técnicos, com atendimento cordial que visa solução e o sucesso dos nossos clientes.

Temos como propósito revolucionar, integrar e simplificar o ecossistema de transporte de cargas, construindo um legado de eficiência por meio de tecnologias disruptivas.

Nossa missão é promover segurança e tranquilidade, integrando a jornada do transporte de cargas e gerando ganhos reais de eficiência ao ecossistema.

Já nossos valores, são formados pelo que chamamos de TRIPLO "i": INICIATIVA E INTELIGÊNCIA PARA GERAR INOVAÇÃO!

Name: JNK Express Koerier
Description:
JNK Express Koerier, gevestigd in Deinze, is gespecialiseerd in het transport van alle mogelijke zendingen, van (confidentieel) documentenvervoer tot transport van delicate goederen, zowel voor particulieren als voor bedrijven, nationaal en internationaal, en dit aan zeer scherpe tarieven. We gaan dan ook geen enkele uitdaging uit de weg. 

Flexibiliteit, veiligheid, accuraatheid en discretie zijn de belangrijkste pijlers binnen onze werkwijze, waarbij zowel U als uw wensen centraal staan.

We bieden u de garantie dat, op uw verzoek, uw zending wordt opgehaald waar en wanneer u dat wenst en deze wordt dan in de beste omstandigheden en op een uiterst snelle manier op de juiste bestemming afgeleverd, zowel in binnen- als buitenland.

Uitstekende service is eveneens een kernwaarde binnen ons bedrijf. We streven er dan ook naar om in te spelen op uw behoeftes om zo een grote klantentevredenheid te realiseren. We bieden u dan ook een persoonlijke - en klantgerichte service.

Express- en koerierdienst
JNK Express Koerier verzorgt al uw spoedtransporten, zowel in binnen- als buitenland. U neemt contact op met ons (dit kan 24 op 24 en 7 op 7) voor uw spoedopdracht en wij zorgen voor een passende oplossing rekening houdende met al uw specifieke wensen. We rijden rechtstreeks van laadadres naar het losadres, zonder tussenkomst van andere opdrachten. Desgewenst krijgt u een telefonische bevestiging, zowel bij het laden als direct na het lossen van de zending.

Vaste opdrachten en op maat samengestelde projecten
JNK Express Koerier biedt u eveneens assistentie bij regelmatig terugkerende zendingen. In samenspraak en op basis van uw noden en verwachtingen bieden wij u een professioneel antwoord voor uw specifiek project. Twijfel dus niet om ons te contacteren voor maatwerk!

Name: Transportes Maçaneiro
Description:
A Transportes Maçaneiro foi fundada em 1946 na cidade de Major Gercino/SC pelo Sr. José Augusto Maçaneiro. Na ocasião, a empresa tornou-se pioneira na região no transporte e distribuição de produtos alimentícios.



Na década de 80, diante da crescente demanda nos negócios, a família transferiu-se para Tijucas/SC. Os filhos do Sr. José Augusto passaram a conviver em meio aos caminhões e, anos mais tarde, começaram a viajar pelo Brasil como motoristas de seus próprios veículos.



Em 1º de Fevereiro de 1995, também na cidade de Tijucas/SC, o Sr. Sélio Maçaneiro, um dos filhos do Sr. José Augusto, fundou a Transportes SELGEMAY, empresa que assumiria e daria continuidade as atividades do grupo Maçaneiro de Transportes após o falecimento do Sr. José Augusto Maçaneiro no ano 2.000.



Há 70 anos no mercado, a Transportes Maçaneiro vem atuando no ramo de transportes de cargas em todo o Brasil e mantendo viva a tradição passada de pai para filho.



Sempre mantendo seus princípios: Honestidade e Rapidez, a Transportes Maçaneiro está hoje no mercado nacional para diferenciar-se de seus concorrentes e destacar-se junto a seus clientes, para assim garantir o sucesso de suas atividades.

Name: Cavok Air
Description:
Cavok Air is a Ukrainian cargo airline, operating since 2012, with a fleet of Antonov AN-12 aircraft, built to handle demanding cargo operations worldwide. 
 
We specialise in air cargo transportation, handling everything from standard and oversized freight to dangerous goods and time-critical charter missions. 

With 24/7 flight operations, global route planning, and comprehensive permit support, we ensure every shipment moves safely, smoothly, and on schedule. 

Our focus is simple - to provide reliable, efficient air cargo solutions for partners across Europe, the Middle East, the Indian subcontinent, Southeast Asia, Australia, Africa, and the Americas.

Name: Apex Time Critical
Description:
Apex Time Critical is a leading provider of urgent logistics solutions. We specialize in time-critical deliveries, emergency freight transportation, and expedited shipping services.

When you absolutely, positively need to get it there on time, Apex Time Critical delivers. We provide customized logistics solutions for clients across diverse industries who require urgent or emergency freight transport. Our experienced team can mobilize within hours to coordinate timely pickups, transport, and delivery - even for challenging locations or unusual cargo.
What sets Apex Time Critical apart is our commitment to responsive, reliable service. We understand that when your supply chain faces unexpected disruptions, delays can be costly. You need a logistics partner you can trust to get your freight or equipment delivered on-time, without exceptions. We have the expertise, resources, and nationwide network to expedite shipments of any size or complexity.
When you need it now, call on Apex Time Critical for proven expedited transportation solutions. We're ready 24/7 to mobilize our resources and expertise so you can meet your tightest deadlines and keep operations running smoothly.

Name: Schumacher Cargo Logistics
Description:
Since 1977, Schumacher Cargo Logistics has been one of the leading international car shipping and international movers in the USA. From our headquarters in Los Angeles, California, we operate 5 US warehouse locations, 1 in the UK, and have built up a trusted moving network of agents in over 50 countries around the globe.

Schumacher Cargo's dedicated divisions offer international shipping services worldwide for LCL, FCL and air freight with a specialization in international vehicle shipping and household goods international moving. These services cater to both import and export clients, as we also have our own expert staff of import coordinators.

At Schumacher Cargo, our goal is to provide comprehensive international moving services at a great price while exceeding client’s expectations which makes the overall shipping experience positive for all parties.

Name: Speedy AD
Description:
Since 1998, when Speedy was founded, we have proved as the leading courier company in Bulgaria. Speedy has a logistics network with nearly 1000 pick-up points and more than 1 500 vehicles.
Speedy offers a full range of courier and postal services in Bulgaria and Europe and is part of DPD’s European network. Speedy delivers more than 40 million parcels a year. 
One of our main goals in human capital is to find, attract and retain talented and motivated people seeking career development in Bulgaria. By combining best of the world practices in human resources management, Speedy offers its employees professional development, competitive starting salary, employee training, improvement of qualification and incentives throughout multiple motivation programs. 
Today, we have more than 2 000 employees and the company is expanding. 
Having that in mind, we are looking for new and energetic people to become part of our big family.

Name: Coolway trans
Description:
At Coolway Trans, we stand out as Australia’s premier temperature-controlled service provider for a multitude of reasons:

Comprehensive Transport Solutions: We offer tailored transport solutions to meet all your freight needs. Whether it’s full truck load or few cartons to deliver, we have you covered.

Nationwide Coverage: With operations running 24/7, 365 days a year, we serve across all regions – metro, out of metro, regional, and interstate. No matter where you are, we ensure prompt and reliable service.

Reliability and Timeliness: Your transport needs are our top priority. We take pride in our commitment to delivering on time, every time. When we promise a delivery, we mean it, ensuring your goods reach their destination precisely when you need them.

Customized Solutions: We understand that every client has unique freight requirements. That’s why we work closely with you to develop the most effective and cost-efficient delivery solutions tailored to your specific needs. Your freight wish is our command.

Exceptional Customer Service: At Coolway Trans, customer satisfaction is paramount. Our dedicated team is always available to assist you, providing personalized support and ensuring a smooth and hassle-free experience every step of the way.

Choose Coolway Trans for unparalleled expertise, reliability, and customer-centric service. Experience the difference with Australia’s leading refrigeration service provider.

We believe in the concept that our valued customer’s time and management effort is better spent focusing on their core business with Mainline taking out all of the hassle that can come with ‘Warehousing and Distribution’.

Name: Faster Log
Description:
A Faster Log é uma transportadora especializada em cargas secas, fundada em Osasco (SP), com operação nacional.

Crescemos colocando pessoas no centro, inovação no caminho e excelência em cada entrega.

Atuamos em 22 estados, com foco em performance, segurança e gestão inteligente, atendendo empresas de médio e grande porte por meio de rotas dedicadas e malha fracionada (last mile), com forte presença nos estados de São Paulo e Minas Gerais.

Nossa operação realiza mais de 3 milhões de entregas por ano, com uma frota ativa de mais de 300 veículos diariamente e um banco de mais de 2.000 motoristas homologados, garantindo capilaridade, eficiência e confiabilidade em cada etapa.

Combinamos agilidade, disciplina e atenção aos detalhes, da coleta à entrega, oferecendo soluções logísticas alinhadas às necessidades de cada cliente. Entre nossos principais parceiros estão grandes marcas do varejo e da indústria, como Mercado Livre, Amazon, Shopee, Petlove, Nuvemshop, DHL, Shein, Fast Shop, Giga Atacado, Yoki, entre outras.

Nosso crescimento é guiado pela colaboração, responsabilidade e cuidado com as pessoas, incentivando novas ideias, fortalecendo o trabalho em equipe e celebrando cada conquista como um único time.

Acreditamos que a logística se constrói com gestão, cultura e confiança.

Name: Galardi Group Naxco
Description:
La Galardi nasce negli anni '50 ed oggi è una delle principali aziende di spedizioni in Italia.
Specializzata in trasporti internazionali terrestri, aerei e marittimi.
Da più di 40 anni è fra le aziende leader sul territorio italiano, con personale altamente qualificato che dedica molta attenzione a quanto accade sul panorama mondiale e costantemente impegnato ad ampliare e migliorare la propria rete di corrispondenti nel mondo.

Galardi è da molti anni garanzia di servizio e qualità nel settore della moda: tessuti, scarpe, borse, abbigliamento in appesi, senza trascurare e prestando la stessa attenzione a qualunque altro genere di merci, dai chimici agli industriali, macchinari, etc. fino alle merci deperibili.

Siamo in grado di ritirare merci da ogni parte d'Italia, consolidandola nelle nostre piattaforme, che sono equipaggiate per accogliere ogni tipo di merce.

Siamo agenti IATA, così come spedizionieri doganali riconosciuti, e siamo dotati di un funzionale sistema informatico collegato, oltre che alle nostre piattaforme, anche con le maggiori compagnie aeree e marittime per monitorare i movimenti delle spedizioni.

La Galardi può offrire anche, nelle proprie piattaforme servizi di:
- Logistica
- Pallettizzazione
- Stoccaggio
- Imballaggio
- Picking

From air freight and sea freight to land transportation and warehousing, we offer end-to-end solutions designed to streamline your operations and maximize efficiency.

What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction and our relentless pursuit of excellence in everything we do. With a focus on innovation, reliability, and personalized service, we strive to exceed our clients' expectations and deliver value that goes beyond transportation.

As a company based in the UAE, we have a deep understanding of the local market dynamics and the global logistics landscape. Whether you're a small startup or a multinational corporation, you can trust us to provide the expertise and support you need to navigate the complexities of international trade and achieve your business goals.

Name: Open Forwarders
Description: Open Forwarders commercialise des logiciels métiers et offre des services d'externalisation aux transitaires (Freight Forwarders). Nous sommes neutres et ne sommes affiliés à aucun transitaire ou transporteur. Nos collaborateurs sont notre plus grand atout. C'est pourquoi nous accordons une attention particulière au recrutement et au développement de notre équipe. Nous sélectionnons des professionnels qualifiés et talentueux, et nous investissons dans leur formation et leur croissance professionnelle pour garantir leur succès et le vôtre. Chez Open Forwarders, nous comprenons l'importance de l'efficacité dans vos opérations en back-office. Nous mettons en œuvre des processus optimisés et des technologies de pointe pour vous offrir une gestion fluide et transparente de vos activités logistiques. Que vous soyez actif dans le transport maritime, le transport aérien, le transport routier, notre équipe expérimentée et dévouée est prête à relever tous les défis que vous rencontrez. Avec une approche centrée sur vos besoins, nous proposons des solutions sur mesure pour vous permettre d'atteindre vos objectifs commerciaux. L'externalisation avec Open Forwarders vous offre plusieurs avantages significatifs. En externalisant vos opérations non essentielles, vous pouvez vous concentrer sur votre cœur de métier et vos activités stratégiques. Vous bénéficiez également de coûts réduits et d'une plus grande flexibilité pour répondre aux fluctuations du marché. Notre collaboration avec des leaders de la digitalisation dans le secteur du transport international, nous permet de vous offrir des technologies de pointe pour optimiser vos processus. Nous vous apportons les meilleurs outils pour relever les défis actuels de l'industrie du transport et améliorer votre efficacité opérationnelle.

We also offer a full range of Mail sort and Publishing services for UK mail. We can offer potential clients competitive tariffs for international post. Partnerships with overseas postal authorities give us lower costs and reduced delivery times.

Our E-commerce division handles storage and mail order at our Heathrow & Gloucester warehouses. With innovative technology and management, we reduce real-time order picking times for clients. From account management to picking list requirements, we will despatch to your requirements. Regular stock reporting comes as standard and we work with our clients to find the best solution.

We also offer a full range of the UK and International courier services. Our clients are able to access the world’s best carriers at discounted rates. This can prove more cost effective in some cases for the despatch of bulk orders. We also have the facilities to collect material from anywhere in the world.

We are also proud to announce due to continuous growth, Flostream have secured a second facility in Gloucester to provide further resources & solutions for all new & existing customers of Flostream Ltd.

La Società DEFENDINI LOGISTICA S.r.l., in data 7 dicembre 2012 ha acquisito il ramo d’azienda dell’Agenzia Defendini S.r.l. A.S. 1/2011 Tribunale di Torino.
Defendini nasce a Torino ed è presente con successo nel settore delle Spedizioni Espresse fin dal 1926, una realtà che unisce tradizione a modernità offrendo ai Suoi Clienti una vasta gamma di servizi che spaziano dal corriere espresso nazionale al recapito di plichi e pacchi urbani urgenti, dalla gestione degli uffici posta in outsourcing al recapito di corrispondenza ordinaria, dal trattamento di archivi ottici e cartacei alla logistica integrata. 
Dal 1998 Defendini gestisce le notifiche della Polizia Municipale di Torino. Attualmente Defendini si occupa della gestione delle notifiche per conto di numerosi Comuni tra cui quelli di Cuneo, Orbassano, Collegno, Caselle Torinese, Rivoli, Piossasco, Carmagnola, Unione Comuni Net e del servizio postale di Comuni tra i quali Collegno, Chieri, Venaria Reale.
Nel Gennaio 2004 Defendini, prima azienda in Italia, ha ampliato la propria presenza sul territorio assumendo dimensioni nazionali per l’esecuzione degli appalti di notificazione di cartelle esattoriali. 
Quotidianamente gli addetti al recapito sul territorio distribuiscono e movimentano le spedizioni di posta, corriere e trasporti dedicati.

Name: U-Freight Phils., Inc
Description:
U-Freight Philippines is a full service logistics company that started out in 1977 as a local freight forwarding business. Today, we are ISO 9002 certified and serve more than 100 countries worldwide, thanks to the considerable support given by over 1,100 experienced transportation professionals in distribution and supply chain management.
 
Our one-stop shop services were made possible by the Customs Memorandum Order (CMO 22-93), granted to us by the Philippine Bureau of Customs. Now we can transfer under guard (TUG) shipments consigned to U-Freight Philippines from the aircraft straight to our own customs bonded warehouse – this ensures security and faster processing. We also make sure that our customers have the ability to monitor their shipments from the point of purchase to delivery. We provide them with real-time status and other customized reports via e-mail such as pre-alerts, cycle-time reports, daily summary shipments, and proof of arrival and delivery. The process of conceptualizing even more products and services is continuous because we know how fast our clients' needs change and we want to be right there with them when they face their own challenges.

I Nostri Servizi
Offriamo una gamma completa di soluzioni logistiche, tra cui:
•	Trasporto su lunga percorrenza: Affidabile e puntuale.
•	Smistamento dell'ultimo miglio: Con l'uso di van ecologici.
•	Soluzioni di logistica personalizzate: Flessibili e sostenibili.
La Nostra Missione
Siamo pronti a soddisfare le esigenze di trasporto dei nostri clienti sia in Italia che all'estero. La nostra dedizione al servizio di alta qualità e la nostra attenzione alla sostenibilità ambientale ci rendono un leader nel settore dei trasporti.
Valori e Partnership
•	Qualità del Servizio: Impegno costante per l'eccellenza.
•	Sostenibilità Ambientale: Pratiche ecologicamente responsabili.
•	Partnership Solide: Collaborazioni durature con i nostri clienti e partner.
Le Nostre Soluzioni
Nuova Express Line si concentra sulla creazione di partnership solide e durature offrendo servizi personalizzati per soddisfare le specifiche esigenze di trasporto di ogni cliente. Dalla pianificazione delle spedizioni alla gestione della catena di approvvigionamento, forniamo soluzioni complete e affidabili per garantire performance e risultati ottimali.

Analisi della Flotta
La nostra flotta è composta da mezzi di ultima generazione per ottimizzare i consumi, ridurre l'impatto ambientale e massimizzare le performance. Ci impegniamo a utilizzare veicoli all'avanguardia che soddisfano i più elevati standard di efficienza energetica e riduzione delle emissioni.
Composizione della Flotta
•	Truck Euro 6: 150 unità
•	Van Euro 6: 400 unità
•	Electric Van: 10 unità
•	Semi rimorchi frigo: 50 unità
•	Semi rimorchi cassonati: 150 unità

Whether you ship via truck, rail, air, or sea, and whether your goods travel locally or globally, ICC’s comprehensive logistics solutions ensure cost-effective and efficient transportation and logistics management. Trust ICC Logistics to transform your logistics into a strategic asset.

Apart from freight service, we have diversified into tailor mode services, contributing to the continual growth of our business while offering excellent service to the respective industries and thus building good acquaintances with our customers. Name: ECOFLUV
Description:
Ecofluv est une entreprise durable de transport fluvial de marchandises, de récupération de boues et de déchets fluviaux par bateau à propulsion  électrique.
Ce bateau fluvial entièrement autonome en terme d'équipements de manutention est destiné à la logistique urbaine et peut accéder sur près de 35 quais entre Lyon Sud et Villefrance-sur-Saône. 
Sa zone couverte peut accueillir 125 tonnes de fret par trajet, soit 99 emplacements sous forme de palettes, rolls... Il peut également transporter des véhicules d'une largeur maximale de 2m et d'une hauteur maximale de 2,40 m pour éviter les ruptures de charge.
Equipé par ailleurs d'un système de récupération des eaux usée, il peut pomper jusqu'à 86 m3 de boues et innove ainsi dans la prestation de service destinée aux bateaux fluviaux.
Le webservice en ligne (www.ecofluv.fr) permet de réserver des emplacements, des créneaux de pompage des boues et de livraison d'AdBlue aux fluviaux, et de suivre les commandes.

Name: Palmsped Cargo Kft.
Description:
As a road haulage company, Palmsped Cargo has been helping the stable operation and development of the supply chain for almost 20 years. The profession of faith is to fulfil the requirements of customers with maximum attention to their needs. It is important to the company that the transport of goods is carried out reliably, economically and with quality service.
It has a large, well-established and controlled fleet of subcontractors throughout Europe.
Internationally and domestically, it carries out over 6,000 transport assignments per year, organising the road transport of more than 150,000 pallets and 100,000 tonnes of goods.

Közúti szállítmányozóként a Palmsped Cargo Kft. közel 20 éve segíti az ellátási lánc stabil működését és fejlődését. Hitvallása, hogy a megbízók elvárásait maximálisan szem előtt tartva, kiemelt gondossággal teljesítse az igényeiket. Fontos a cég számára, hogy az áruszállítás megbízhatóan, gazdaságosan és minőségi szolgáltatással valósuljon meg.
Széleskörű, stabilan kiépített és ellenőrzött alvállalkozói flottával egész Európán belül biztosítja az áruszállítás megoldását.
Nemzetközi és belföldi viszonylatban évente 6000 db fuvarfeladat felett teljesít, több mint 150.000 raklap és 100.000 tonna áru közúti szállításának megszervezését végzi.

Atendemos empresas de vários setores e segmentos, com destaque para e-commerce, varejo, transportadoras, operadores logísticos, logística promocional e instituições financeiras.  

Nossa área de atuação principal Porto Alegre/RS e Região Metropolitana, mas também atendemos o interior do Rio Grande do Sul.

Possuímos estrutura física-operacional para atender às necessidades de seus clientes e parceiros, além de contar com a flexibilização na utilização de veículos, tais como motos, carros, utilitários, etc.

Name: Peri Logistics
Description:
Peri Logistics is a digitally enabled logistics solutions provider backed by Expolanka Holdings PLC, one of Sri Lanka’s largest and most respected conglomerates.

With deep industry expertise and a strong foundation in airfreight and supply chain management, Peri Logistics delivers comprehensive logistics solutions to a wide range of industries. We specialize in perishables, pharmaceuticals, technology products, fast fashion, and time-sensitive cargo, ensuring precision and reliability at every stage.

As a holistic logistics and transport management partner, we enable seamless cargo movement from origin to destination, handling diverse commodities from fresh produce and temperature-controlled goods to high-value and time-critical shipments.

Supported by a strong global network, advanced technology platforms, and strategic partnerships, Peri Logistics ensures compliant, efficient, and transparent logistics solutions across international markets. Our operations are designed to support scalability, visibility, and performance, empowering our customers to grow with confidence in global trade.

Name: Orange Distribution Solutions Inc.
Description: Orange Distribution Solutions, Inc. (OrangeDS) is a full service Global Ecommerce Logistics organization, that offers reliable and customized solutions for U.S. Domestic and International ecommerce shippers. Our distribution facilities are strategically located throughout the United States, London, UK and India. Our delivery network extends beyond 220+ countries and territories. Name: eCourier.com.bd
Description:
eCourier Limited is a Bangladeshi logistics company which started its operations in  2014 with the idea to provide support for online merchants and e-commerce platforms. eCourier is licensed by the Ministry of Post & Telecommunication of the Government of Bangladesh.
eCourier provides unique delivery services with the promise of same day and next day delivery with our own fleet of delivery vans, bikes and cycles. In this digital era, we know the value of digitization of every services. Hence, we provide parcel tracking online and SMS booster among many other services. From your eCourier wallet you can conveniently spend it on SMS booster service provided by us to perform SMS marketing, brand/product awareness and offer updates about your company/brand. Another useful service that we provide is storage space for your valuable goods for which we also provide modern packaging before delivering it to customers after they order.

Name: Courier Logistics Ltd
Description:
Established in 1994, Courier Logistics started with two small ageing vans and one big ambition to succeed. Customers were gained and retained through consistently high levels of professional service and value for money. With year on year growth, we now employ over 100 staff and have a turnover in excess of £10 million.

Like most businesses, we have had to earn the trust and confidence of our customers. Some use us daily, some weekly and some just occasionally but each one is just as important to us.

Courier Logistics has based its business model on its ability to deliver any size of parcel to anywhere in the world. Clever partnerships with companies such as APC and Pallet Track ensure the best options are available to Courier Logistic's clients through a single source solution.

Pasaportes y Paquetes Especializados - Servicios especializados para la distribución a domicilio y personalizada de: pasaportes, tarjetas de crédito, documentos certificados y legales.

Correo, Mensajería y Distribución - Servicios de distribución de paquetes, valijas y transporte de Carga Liviana a nivel internacional.

Subcontratación de Personal - Con el objetivo de continuar brindando a nuestros clientes el total respaldo y apoyo para la gestión de control de su personal de línea, ofrecemos el servicio de subcontratación, administración y asignación de personal a nivel nacional.

Name: ZOOMenLinea
Description:
Desde 1976 impulsando el desarrollo y la conectividad

ZOOM evoluciona a la par del mercado venezolano. El modelo de servicios logísticos, de distribución y financieros, cuenta con el respaldo de una infraestructura tecnológica, 
La ZOOMred hoy abarca más de 250 rutas activas y más de 300 oficinas (propias y aliadas) en todo el  país, potenciadas por tecnología de punta, flota propia y un equipo comprometido de más de 1500 colaboradores a escala nacional.

La compañía cuenta con más de 10.000 m² para almacenamiento, control de inventario y despachos nacionales. ZOOM conectamos a Venezuela con el mundo, a través de envíos internacionales a más de 220 países, ofreciendo soluciones como logística de comercio electrónico gracias al casillero internacional con una sucursal en Miami para envíos aéreos y marítimos a Venezuela.

Casa de Cambio ZOOM, agente exclusivo de Western Union en Venezuela desde 1992, líder en el mercado de remesas, es el servicio que ayuda a los venezolanos dentro y fuera del país, a cubrir sus necesidades más básicas con el envío y recepción de dinero.  

ZOOM sigue aportándole a Venezuela y ahora más que nunca está aquí para apoyar las iniciativas que redunden en el desarrollo sostenible de nuestro país.

Name: Aloha Air Cargo
Description:
Aloha Air Cargo strives to provide fast, convenient, economical, and reliable cargo service throughout the State of Hawaii. From the convenience of our Same Day Express, Loveable Pet Air Service and Aloha FlexShip, Aloha is committed to meeting your cargo needs with the care and attention Hawaii has come to trust.

The warm hearts, familiar faces, and superior service of Aloha’s ohana have helped to foster close relationships with many shippers, clients and business owners since 1985, when the cargo division began. It is due to this aloha spirit and attention to service that Aloha’s regular shippers trust only them for their shipping needs.

Aloha Air Cargo handles over 70% of all interisland air cargo shipped to and from all major airport locations: Honolulu, Oahu; Kahului, Maui; Lihue, Kauai; and Hilo and Kailua-Kona on the Island of Hawaii. Through partnerships with other Hawaii airlines and international carriers, Aloha can also arrange shipments from any Hawaii city to any destination worldwide. And yet, even as the most experienced air cargo shipper in Hawaii, Aloha continues to improve its operations by running more efficiently, consistently and above all, safely.

In total, Aloha has over 450 dedicated employees – comprised of some of Hawaii’s top cargo agents, pilots, mechanics, engineers and other shipping-industry professionals – making it a major employer, offering
important skill-based jobs within the Hawaii economy.

Aloha Air Cargo is the air cargo operator of choice for local businesses, just as Aloha Airlines was the local people’s airline. It is this pride and dedication in what they do that drives Aloha to ensure that every piece of cargo they handle gets to its destination on time, as it was tendered, and with full satisfaction to the customer. It’s not every day that a local company can perpetuate the spirit of Hawaii with integrity and the fond memory of its predecessor. Today and into the future, we proudly say, “We are Aloha.”

Name: Pronk Multiservice
Description:

Pronk Multiservice continues to grow due to the reputation it has created over the past 3 decades as a specialist known for its high-end services, uncompromising quality, and an impeccable on-time delivery of services and products.

Our own information technology solutions and many years of experience in logistics guarantee us a solid place among our European partners and allow us to compete internationally. 

Connecting Slovenia and reaching out into the world. Rapidly, reliably and with quality – we carry everything.

Name: TRANSEOP
Description:
Transeop es  una  plataforma web y móvil que conecta de forma eficiente a empresas que quieren enviar mercancías a nivel nacional e internacional con una amplia red de transportistas. 

Transeop nace con el objetivo de simplificar y hacer más eficiente, el transporte de mercancías. Con Transeop cualquier empresa podrá realizar un envío de manera rápida y sencilla. Siempre con unos precios muy competitivos, ya que Transeop  es especialista en aprovechar los huecos libres de nuestros transportistas y sus retornos vacíos para asignarles cargas.

Transeop pone a su disposición una plataforma web sencilla e intuitiva, en la cual en cuestión de minutos podrá publicar sus mercancías, y despreocuparse de buscar un transportista, nosotros hacemos el trabajo por usted, también podrá realizar un seguimiento de la carga en todo momento. 

Para nuestros transportistas les proveemos de una plataforma móvil, con la cual podrán encontrar la carga que más se adapte a su vehículo, así como recibir cargas y gestionarlas de una forma muy intuitiva.

Si quieres contactar con nosotros, visítanos en: www.transeop.com

Description:
SkyBag is a courier company dedicated to providing the best possible delivery service and we're proud to have established a reputation for honest, reliable and excellent service with a keen focus on security and cost effectiveness.
We work with all sizes of business, from small and medium-sized company's right up to major blue chip corporation. Our clients cover all industry and commerce sectors including banking, telecommunications, motor, medical, pharmaceutical and financial, we provide a cost-effective and reliable back-up service.
We have the system, experience and couriers to handle everything from a simple daily local courier delivery to the most demanding, multi-drop contracts. we guarantee that no matter what size your business or what industry it's in, we have the solution to all your transport and logistics issues.
We operate both time-critical same-day deliveries and express next-day deliveries across the Egypt.
Our Vision to become the most admired courier industry company in the industry through innovation, professionalism, commitment and teamwork by delivering superior values and advantage to our customers, franchisees, employees and society at large.
Company is taking the mission to become the leader in the courier industry in Egypt by 2020 with high global visibility by providing 100% delight to our customers, exploring the talent of our employees with opportunities for growth and wholehearted cooperation of our franchisees.
Our  courier service covers all Egypt. We are specialized in pick up from door to door delivery important documents and small parcels locally for individuals and different kind of business same-day deliveries and express next-day deliveries.

Name: Loomis Express
Description:
From deliveries to the Alaskan Gold Rush in 1905 through armored cars to ground and courier service, the Loomis brand has a long history of providing Canadian clients with high quality domestic service.

100% Canadian means that Loomis Express is able to focus on developing, streamlining and adapting to the unique logistical needs and characteristics of the Canadian marketplace.

There are many things that set us apart at PACK & SEND – but none more important than giving customers the power of choice. No other logistics company offers such a wide selection of transport and packaging solutions – through multiple sales channels.  

PACK & SEND brings services to its customers through a vast network of convenient Retail Service Centres, Logistics Fulfilment Centres, Call Centre, Online Courier Booking systems and Online Retail Integrations.

These capabilities allow us to tailor personalised and unique logistics solutions for our clients like no other.  Our customers include e-commerce companies, small businesses, large companies, government departments and individual consumers.  We cater for the one-off small volume job to the requirements of large volume regular senders.

Name: Nationex
Description:
From a simple local delivery company based in Longueuil, Quebec, Nationex is now one of the largest Quebec-owned transport companies. It has 20 depots and 3 automated sorting centers in Quebec and Ontario. Its fleet of over 350 trucks delivers nearly 10 million parcels a year.  Despite its expansion, Nationex has always remained a family-run business.

*details at https://www.nationex.com/en/News

Name: Airtrans Cargo LLC
Description:
Established in 2011, Airtrans Cargo LLC. is a Dubai-based global supply chain logistics company that provides a variety of services, including air freight forwarding, ocean freight forwarding, road freight forwarding, supply chain management, transportation management, warehousing, and distribution services efficiently and seamlessly. We take pride in delivering solutions to clients that are reliable, quick, and add value to their business.

Since our inception, we have consistently been able to provide customers in the United Arab Emirates with an incredible portfolio of logistics and transportation solutions that have time and again proved to be beneficial and efficient. Our personalized and professional approach to serving customers has enabled us to become one of the most trusted and successful companies in the UAE.
Airtrans Cargo LLC provides cost-effective and reliable inbound and outbound services to customers. This is made possible through our team which comprises professionals who work closely with customers in understanding their needs. As a part of our services, we analyze your networks, shipping methods, and other aspects of your business to eliminate redundancy and bring in improvements. Our healthy purchasing power that comes from our direct contacts with all major air, land, and ocean carriers means you can look forward to getting assured and efficient services from us, anytime.
