Name: Aramex Australia
Description:
Aramex is a multinational logistics, courier, freight and package delivery company operating in 70 countries. With global headquarters in Dubai, Aramex is a publicly listed company on the NASDAQ stock exchange. With 29 Regional Franchises and more than 800 Courier Franchisees, the Aramex Australia network reaches far and wide. More than 25,000 Aussie businesses trust Aramex to deliver.

Our network spans from Cairns to Sydney to Perth and almost everywhere in between. We offer competitive prices and reliable, scheduled courier services. Our delivery systems are backed up by the latest technology and real-time track and trace facilities, making Aramex Australia the delivery partner of choice for Aussie businesses of all sizes. With easy integrations to leading e-commerce sites, our online delivery portal makes sending easy.

Aramex Australia pioneered Blu Couriers, the largest crowdsourced delivery model in Australia. Parcel Connect is another of our innovative brands, offering flexibility and convenience to customers through a network of more than 800 agents. We offer customers the option to collect their parcels when it suits them, from locations including newsagents and convenience stores.

Name: J3Flex
Description:
História J3FLEX - Fundada em 2010 por 2 amigos Josúe e Carlos (J DE JOSUÉ E 3 DE C CARLOS) Trabalharam durante 15 anos fazendo entregas como motoboys. Durante esse período de 2010 a 2020 a empresa que era de moto frete tinha somente 8 funcionários para fazerem entregas expressas de ponta a ponta. Foi ai que em Agosto de 2020 fizeram uma parceria com o Mercado Livre, e começaram a realizar as entregas do Mercado Livre FLEX. Então sairam de 8 funcionários entregadores para mais de 858 entregadores em 2024.

Atualmente temos 14 anos no mercado

3 sedes, 1 no parque novo mundo período da tarde, 2 na vila guilherme período da manhã, e a 3  em Minas Gerais

+12 milhões de entrega já realizadas de 2020 a 2024


+27 mil empresas já atendidas de 2020 a 2024

Nossos maiores clientes e cases de Sucesso - Mercado Livre Flex somo uma Empresa homologada e credenciada - Somos a maior transportadora Flex da América Latina

Somos especialistas em entregas rápidas de E-commerce, Loja Online e Marketplace 

Parceiros Marketplace: Mercado Livre e Shopee

Principais Clientes renomados no mercado de E-commerce - Dutra Máquinas; Feira da Madrugada; Yasmin Beauty; Bumbum Cream; Hidratei; Adoro meu carro; Vans; Schultz; Arezzo; Ana Capri; Clube Melissa; Havaianas; The Cereal; FOM; Planeta do Bebê.

Name: InXpress India
Description:
InXpress is a multi-national freight company which is an authorized sales partner with global super brand DHL and the domestic carrier Blue Dart providing savings and exceptional service to small and medium sized businesses. InXpress offers exceptional buying power through bulk buying and its extensive international network. 

Since 1999, InXpress have developed an international franchise system through sustained growth that has made InXpress one of the world's largest worldwide express parcel delivery and transportation franchise systems. Our international and domestic services operate throughout the US, UK, Asia Pacific, Africa and Europe. 

InXpress offers unique international and domestic shipping solutions for our SME customers and exclusive bulk buying rates packaged with innovative technology solutions and genuine personalized customer service all on one invoice. 

Our exclusive buying power provides SME's with a strong competitive advantage for obtaining the best online shipping quotes, normally reserved only for large corporations. 

Globally InXpress continues to expand aggressively, currently operating in 15 countries, with more customers now enjoying these savings than ever before. We currently have franchising opportunities to be a part of the InXpress team. 

InXpress saves you time, effort and money by providing unique solutions for express, freight and mail services through world-class carriers you know and trust. 

If you are interested in finding out how we can assist your business, or becoming a franchise business partner, please visit our website: www.inxpress.in or call us on 8657738302 / 9372299362
 
Email: franchise.in@inxpress.com

Name: Viva Group Transportes
Description:
Somos uma empresa nacional de transportes, com 20 anos de experiência. Em nossa rota de crescimento, já realizamos mais de 01 milhão de entregas seguras e qualificadas, assegurando a dinâmica de negócios públicos e privados, nos estados de São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro e Goiás.

Com o que há de mais moderno no mercado, nossas soluções de transporte são completas e permitem desde o trânsito de documentos e objetos, até medicamentos, materiais biológicos e pessoas – garantindo sua entrega segura, onde você desejar.

Name: EASYVESSEL
Description:
EASYVESSEL is the online portal to connect Importers/Exporters with multiple Freight Forwarders to get the best Freight Rate with 0% commission.

EASYVESSEL: The Future of Online Freight Rates
Freight can be tricky. EASYVESSEL makes it easy. 
EASYVESSEL is the future. EASYVESSEL is transforming the traditional freight industry by moving its operations online. We connect Exporters and Importers with reliable multiple Freight Forwarders to help them find the best freight rates while save time and money. With a few clicks, businesses find the best freight rates with No hassles. It's a big marketplace, but also clear and transparent. Behind the scenes, top tech ensures everything runs smoothly. It's all about making freight simple and trustworthy. What makes EASYVESSEL special is its massive network. It's like having a huge directory of reliable freight experts at your fingertips.
In a nutshell, EASYVESSEL is all about making freight rates simple, efficient, and accessible. Say goodbye to the old way of doing things and hello to EASYVESSEL.

Name: NEPS - Simplifying Logistics
Description:
Established in 2014, NEPS Logistics provides specialist same day delivery services for the North East’s automotive, engineering and manufacturing industries. 

With an expansive fleet of over 50 vehicles and a dedicated team of 60 members, we handle the transportation of pallets, crates, machinery and crucial parts. Partnering with some of the region’s most prominent manufacturers including Unipres, Atlas Copco and Osbit, we specialise in time-critical, express delivery services. 

Operating 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, we provide a fully tracked and secure service by assigning each van exclusively to a single client's goods, ensuring commercial confidentiality. Prioritising security, we implement robust measures to safeguard every consignment, offering peace of mind for our clients throughout their logistics process.

Effectively positioned on Gateshead's Team Valley Trading Estate, we have fast and easy access to major transportation links, including the A1, A19 and Port of Tyne, enabling the swift movement of your goods regionally, nationally and into mainland Europe.

Our team of friendly and uniformed drivers, each equipped with years of dedicated experience in same-day logistics and haulage, uphold the highest of industry standards, providing our clients with a reliable and trustworthy partner for their transportation needs.

Our fleet also includes truck operations, as well as collaborating closely with major freight forwarders across the UK, to accommodate larger-scale shipments and heavier loads, offering our clients a comprehensive solution.

Playing an essential role in the North East and wider UK’s supply chain ecosystem, we’re committed to offering time critical transportation, ensuring the rapid movement of your goods with efficiency and reliability.

Name: Surindera Transport Carriers
Description:
With the maturing of supply chains and shifting of logistics business from unorganised to the organised sector, we are focused on meeting the need to improve performance and predictability through fast, secure, and reliable transport solutions for your business.

Our scope of operations covers National, Regional and Intra-state routes and our services will include Full Truck Load, Part Truck Load on a ad-hoc vehicle placements across different vehicle size categories. 

Operationally, we will be working on Hybrid model i.e. own and attached fleet as that gives us the critical control required to deliver a highly consistent and reliable service.

Name: Globex (FedEx Maroc)

At Vector SpA, an Italian, family-run company, we have been handling international freight forwarding since 1978.
Our strategic location near Milan’s two international airports and several important Italian seaports, has allowed and still allows us to continue growing at an exponential rate within our sector – giving us an edge in our industry.

While maintaining our independent, family-run company spirit, we guarantee our clients the best possible solutions, all highly-customized and at very competitive rates.

We offer a variety of solutions for both air and sea ffshipments worldwide, including express and special deliveries. Our know-how, dynamic approach, professional reputation and passion for what we do are the secrets to our success.

Deținem o rețea de transport colete în 23 de țări europene. Iar ca parte a grupului Geopost, lider european în curierat, oferim acces clienților noștri la peste 132.000 de puncte fixe de livrare în toată Europa și cele mai mici tarife la livrări internaționale.

Name: Egypt Express
Description:
Egypt Express (EE) is a joint stock and an ISO 9001:2008 certified company, registered in Egypt. The company was established in 1998 and has been a Global Service Participant (GSP) of FedEx since inception and provides both international and domestic service from and into Egypt. As GSP of FedEx, it is mandated for international outbound service across 220 countries on the FedEx network, and for the inbound has the mandate to delivery FedEx shipments across Egypt. 
EE has presence in all major cities and towns across Egypt to provide overnight domestic delivery of shipments ranging from half kg document to a full truck load; this has been possible with extensive, reliable and efficient domestic distribution systems connecting seamlessly across all locations in Egypt. EE is undisputedly a preferred employer in Egypt, as it is committed to best employee practices, gender equality and equal opportunity to all staff. EE is playing a major role in supporting the industrial growth by providing efficient Express, Freight and Logistics services and has ongoing plans to grow the supply chain solution business.

Name: Emkay Line
Description:
Over the past three decades the management of Emkay has fashioned special niche for themselves in the shipping industry, with its strong commitment to customer quality standard, through uncompromising efficiency in all facets of its service operations across Indian Sub continent, Gulf, Far East, China, Africa and Europe. The group is carrying with itself a vast shipping experience. It represents Liner Agencies. It also deals with LCL Consolidation, Air Cargo, Afghan Cargo, Supply Chain, Warehousing and Logistics.
The idea to establish a NVOCC / BOX Operator is initiated by the group back in 2008, when one of its Principal, a leading shipping company, opened its own offices. Considering this business challenge the management of Emkay decided to incorporate "EMKAY LINES".
Considering the growing business demands of its Corporate Customer and to capture the untapped global shipping market, Emkay also started its separate dedicated division of "EMKAY LOGISTICS".
The blended shipping experience of the key management personals of Emkay and newly hired qualified, energetic and experienced human resource helped it to achieve the remarkable position in the world. Within a span of very short time Emkay is now covering 03 continents i.e Asia, Africa, Europe and South America.
Our core strength is our healthy financial standing with insignificant liabilities, volume discount arrangements with various ports, long term healthy business relationships with leading Main lines, leading leasing companies, Feeder and Terminal Operators.

Name: Bolt logistics
Description:
شركة بولت للخدمات اللوجيستية، هي شركة رائدة في مجال نقل البضائع داخل مصر، تقدم حلولاً لوجيستية متكاملة وفعّالة. بفضل أسطولنا المتنوع من السيارات الجامبو و الدبابة وخدماتنا المتميزة، نضمن نقل بضاعتك بأمان وسرعة من المصنع أو المخزن مباشرةً إلى يد المستلم . كما اننا نوفر ايضا نقل الأثاث المنزلي و الاجهزة المنزلية و المواد المواد الغذائية و البضائع المختلفة كما اننا نوفر خدماتنا للسفارات و الفنادق و جميع الشركات و المدارس و المِؤسسات .نوفر خدمة عملاء متاحة على مدار الساعة، إمكانية متابعة الشحنات بسهولة، وباقات تنافسية تناسب جميع احتياجات النقل. نلتزم بأعلى معايير الجودة والأمان في التعامل مع بضائعك، مع توفير خدمة الدفع الشهري. مرخصون من جهاز تنظيم النقل برخصة رقم ٦٦٥ لسنة ٢٠٢٢، ونعمل وفقاً لضوابط ضريبة القيمة المضافة والفاتورة الإلكترونية. 
نمتلك أيضا رخصة بريدية تؤهلنا لتقديم الخدمات البريدية المختلفة  بمعايير متفوقة.

Bolt Logistics Company, a leader in the field of goods transportation within Egypt, offers comprehensive and effective logistic solutions. Thanks to our diverse fleet of jumbo and pickup van vehicles, and our outstanding services, we guarantee the safe and speedy transportation of your shipment from the factory or warehouse directly to the recipient's hands. We also provide transportation for household furniture, home appliances and food & beverages and other various products. Additionally, we offer our services to embassies, hotels, companies, schools, and institutions. We provide around-the-clock customer service, easy shipment tracking, and competitive packages that meet all transportation needs. De grands intégrateurs européens et mondiaux se partagent aujourd’hui la plus grande part du marché de la logistique. Face à cette concentration, Prévoté assume le choix de l’indépendance et de la proximité et vous propose une solide alternative, à taille humaine.

Depuis 70 ans, notre groupe familial a construit une offre complète de services de transport, de
logistique, de location de véhicules industriels avec ou sans conducteur, de messagerie et de distribution, grâce à son expérience, son expertise et à son appartenance aux meilleurs réseaux en Europe.

A l’instar des grands opérateurs, Prévoté vous offre une large gamme de prestations, la souplesse et l’adaptabilité en plus.

Name: ShipperBee
Description: ShipperBee is a first-of-its-kind end-to-end delivery system that is a better, simpler, greener way to ship. We cut hub-and-spoke distribution centers out of the equation to save shippers money, end regional delivery delays, and reduce carbon emissions by 75% per parcel. Our collaborative delivery driver network of certified, background checked and rated drivers – commuters, stay-at-home parents, students, retirees, roadtrippers – deliver parcels using a network of innovative, smart, interconnected transfer mailboxes called Hives. Our Hives are located at strategic locations throughout North America and are WiFi connected, fully weatherproof, camera equipped and are virtually indestructible, keeping parcels safe and secure between drivers and final delivery.

Our specialized distribution network ensures swift and efficient parcel delivery across the Midwest, supported by skilled drivers dedicated to precise, timely, and conscientious delivery. We offer not only the creation of a customized transportation program for our customers but also its ongoing refinement to keep pace with their changing business needs. Our customers, spanning from healthcare providers to family-owned businesses, trust us to help them keep their most important promises.

Name: Unalog - União Alterosa Logística
Description:
Desde 2005 trabalhando com logística urgente nos modais aéreo e rodoviário. Especialista em entregas com menos de 24 horas. Criou um modelo único de logística onde os processos são simples, rápidos e confiáveis. 
Siga nosso instagram: @unalog.personalizada

Since 2005 working with urgent logistics in air and road modalities. Specialist in deliveries with less than 24 hours. Serves the market of environmental laboratories, food analysis laboratories and urgent loads in the industrial automotive industry. Created a unique logistics model where processes are simple, fast and reliable.

Name: VPL
Description:
VPL is the control center for care in motion. Our platform gives health systems and pharmacies total command of their logistics so critical supplies and medications are visible, connected, and on time. 

A late delivery isn’t just a delay—it’s a missed dose, a disrupted supply chain, a patient let down. 

Built from the ground up for the complexities of healthcare, our platform replaces silos and workarounds with a single source of truth. This means couriers, carriers, suppliers, and systems consolidated under one roof. With radical transparency, sweeping integrations, and always-on audit readiness, VPL eliminates the guesswork in shipping and replaces it with clarity, control, and confidence. 

That’s why hundreds of health systems and pharmacies trust VPL to streamline workflows, engineer efficiencies, and drive smarter spending.

Name: San Marino Mail Italia
Description: San Marino Mail Italia is today the reference point in the delivery of B2C and B2B packages in Europe, thanks to a deep knowledge of the sector and to an experience gained in over 15 years of activity. The core business of the company is the delivery of packages in the so-called "last mile", an important and conclusive factor in the sales process for individuals and businesses. The activity is based on the founding values of the company: flexibility, dynamism and transparency. Concepts that over time have allowed San Marino Mail to devise an innovative business model, which envisages the assignment of delivery to the most competent and efficient distributors in each country and in each market. The mission of the company consists, in fact, in implementing a model designed to meet the modern distribution needs of individuals, particularly in the e-commerce sector, in addition to managing the logistics phases in the delivery of B2B shipments. The experience gained over the years, the deep knowledge of international regulations, the continuous research of innovative distribution systems, allow San Marino Mail Italia to select, from time to time, the most suitable distributor for the specific needs of each customer.

Name: Airways Freight Corporation
Description:

International air and ocean (FCL,LCL)

Name: Parcelhero
Description:
Welcome to Parcelhero - the UK's favourite international parcel delivery service!

Parcelhero is renowned for being an outstanding UK courier and international parcel courier because we don't compromise on service - despite having the cheapest prices of any UK courier. By bringing together the worlds' biggest and most reputable carriers under one roof we provide you with a superior and comprehensive portfolio of cheap courier services that you can really trust to deliver! 

Our reliable delivery services are available to over 220 countries worldwide and include: Express, economy, timed and same-day delivery courier options to suit every budget.

Parcelhero offers the fastest transit times of any online courier services and we can collect from most countries same day - all you need to do is tell us your requirements. We even help you produce the shipping documents you need in only a few clicks.

However, Parcelhero is much more than the cheapest parcel delivery company in the UK. Our exceptional customer service is what really sets us apart from our competitors. You don't need to be a shipping expert to make use of Parcelhero's delivery services because our customer service team are all experts in their field and their wealth of industry knowledge is available to you if you have any questions about your parcel delivery.

Unlike many other online parcel delivery services, you can also contact Parcelhero via telephone - and you can rest assured that Parcelhero staff are always professional, polite and friendly - no matter what your query may be. But don’t just take our word for it, check our reviews on the independent website TrustPilot.

If you need a reliable service that's quick, cost effective and easy to use, and that can give you expert advice when you need it, then you don't just need a cheap parcel delivery company, you need a Parcelhero!

Name: City-Link Express
Description:
Founded in 1979 as the first local courier company in Malaysia, City-Link Express provides package express delivery. The company has expanded to integrate other related services, namely air and ocean freight, warehousing, third party logistics, supply chain management and corporate mailroom management.

Today, City-Link Express have about three thousand employees manning more than a hundred branches and stations throughout Asia. Our extensive network consist of  branches in every major town and express centres in strategic locations throughout the region.

Name: Best One logistics
Description: From the beginning, we aim to provide seamless experience for our clients and provide logistics services with sustainable performance all over Saudi Arabia

Name: DeliveryZone
Description:
We are recognized as an innovative courier service company based in Abu Dhabi, utilizing the latest and most sophisticated technology to transform the traditional way of package delivery across the middle east. Our inception in the business of courier services has nullified the conventional method of shipment by most courier companies, which involves supplying your physical address before you receive or send packages.

Our cutting-edge technological tools enable you to send and receive packages without providing your physical address. Just a few clicks on our website dashboard or mobile app will allow you to keep real-time tracking of your package till you receive it.

Name: Trustbend Packers & Movers
Description: Our dedicated team is here to simplify your relocation journey. Name: FNC Americas LLC - Global Freight Forwarding & Logistics Network
Description:
Welcome to FNC Americas LLC, a vetted global network of over 500+ freight and logistics leaders across more than 100 countries. Our mission is to create meaningful connections among freight forwarders worldwide, fostering collaboration, continuous learning, and collective growth.

With the expansion of our headquarters in Singapore to include global offices in the UK and USA, we have significantly strengthened our international presence. Drive IDS’s group companies to realise their full potential by providing strategic oversight and supporting both businesses to deliver their expected performance.

Conosciamo molto bene le potenzialità dello strumento del marketing venendo incontro ad aziende e privati che molto spesso non adottano in maniera esatta questo strumento.

Integraa Srl nasce per rispondere a queste esigenze, collegando tra loro le varie forme di comunicazione, per avere il controllo di tutto con un semplice click.

Il controllo ed una corretta gestione delle procedure, oggi più che mai è vitale per le piccole imprese e fondamentale per quelle medio grandi che devono gestire flussi di invii massivi. Per assolvere a questa esigenza abbiamo portato alla luce l’idea geniale, nuova ed innovativa di una piattaforma informatica altamente qualificata i i nostri clienti.

Dopo la seconda guerra mondiale 14 uffici in Europa orientale sono stati nazionalizzati e il Gruppo ha ampliato la sua rete di uffici in altri continenti a partire dalla seconda metà del 20° secolo.
Nel 21° secolo il Gruppo si è sviluppato principalmente nell'area asiatica.

>>> Smart Container Loop develops and operates sustainable transport systems with reusable containers https://smartcontainerloop.de

>>> Multiloop ensures greater sustainability in E-Commerce with reusable cartons and shipping bags (joint venture with Fiege) https://www.multiloop.com

Name: MR Brasil Express
Description:
O ano era 2005... surgia como uma empresa de entrega de documentos, a MR Brasil Express, nascida na Baixada Fluminense, mais precisamente na cidade de Duque de Caxias no estado do Rio de Janeiro.

A MR crescia e evoluia dia após dia, e em 2009 adquiriu seu primeiro caminhão, um Ford Cargo 1415, ano 98, que integra valentemente a nossa frota até os dias de hoje, e assim começava a saga da nossa empresa, que hoje possui mais de 80 veículos e se destaca no transporte rodoviário de cargas de alto valor, com implementos (baú) blindados e tecnologias de ponta que nos proporcionam 24 horas de rastreabilidade.

Seus sócios, os irmãos Rodrigo e Renato, com muita humildade, seriedade, honestidade e fé... veem a MR despontando a cada ano, tornando-se referência neste nicho do segmento do TRC, fruto da paixão pelos caminhões, da dedicação diária ao trabalho e da proximidade que mantém com seus mais de 120 colaboradores, clientes e fornecedores.

MR Brasil Express

Tenemos claro, que en los tiempos que corren, la importancia de una entrega en tiempo y forma, es muchas veces el punto clave para la generación de un negocio. Los tiempos de tránsito y convenios de estos “gigantes” de la logística, con los distintos países son variadísimos y muchas veces extremadamente distintos. Ahí está la experiencia y previsibilidad de TAKSA para el logro de sus objetivos.

En TAKSA pensamos día a día la mejor forma de resolver las necesidades de nuestros clientes. Sabemos que el cierre de un negocio de ellos es la apertura del nuestro, por lo que cada envío lo personalizamos como propio.

Nuestra amplitud de medios junto a nuestra experiencia es lo que intentamos transmitir a nuestros clientes,  en una sola palabra.

CONFIANZA

Es lo que hemos logrado con trabajo, seriedad y humildad e intentamos seguir demostrando con nuestra labor diaria.

Name: Daygard Logistics Group
Description:
The Daygard Logistics Group of Companies include NVOCC’s Freight Movers International (“FMI”) and Cargo Movers International (“CMI”), as well as customs clearance division, Daygard Clearances (“DGC”)

In 2003, FMI was formed to primarily handle imports from China and by 2004 FMI had expanded to include imports and exports to/from many areas.

Over time, strong relationships have been built with some of the biggest agents in their respective countries, leading to substantial year-on-year growth, and this led to the formation of CMI and then the formation of our Customs clearance brand DGC

In the years since it was formed, the Daygard Logistics Group has become one of the largest independent NVOCC’s in the UK covering all major trade lanes and with more direct weekly services than most in the market. A major difference between Daygard and its competitors is that the majority of cargo handled by the FMI and CMI brands are on terms controlled in the UK, meaning better control of the charges the clients pay.

Con esta tecnología de punta buscamos cumplir, día a día, nuestro objetivo: Entregas perfectas.

Name: Bombino Group
Description:
Swift, Safe and Secure: Our Passion!
We at Bombino Express believe if you can’t transport swiftly, you shouldn’t transport at all! In today’s world speed is the underlying criteria for any business: But it doesn’t end with just speed, your goods should also reach safe and secure! Bombino Express delivers with speed and surety. To achieve both security and speed, much groundwork and infrastructure has been laid out in the last nineteen years and a reliable and solid foundation built: Today we can affirm with total assurance, we will live to your expectations of being swift, safe and secure.

Bombino Express is one of the leading courier companies in India. It was formed in 1995 when industries and corporate expanding under the economic liberalization needed a dependable courier service, that had an extensive network and was time bound and trustworthy in its delivery; here Bombino’s excelled and it’s share in the market has grown by leaps and bounds. 
Bombino Express offers cost effective, door to door express and logistics services to and from India, USA, UK, Middle East and the rest of the world. 

We believe in keeping a constant tab on your needs as a customer, and in anticipating emerging trends, also expanding strategically and constantly updating cutting-edge technologies and state-of-the-art tracking systems. All this has given Bombino Express’ excellent reach speed, punctuality and above all competitive rate efficiencies. What's more, with our pre-clearance system, we send electronic copies of documents to foreign customs clearance even before the goods land; this ensures zero lag-time once the parcels reach their destinations.


VISION
“We aspire to become the globally preferred & admired Logistics solutions provider.”

Mission
“Delight customers with quality service through investing in innovation, technology and in our people to develop and deliver comprehensive customized logistics solutions.”

Our app empowers users to post their service requests, spanning a wide range of needs, including transportation, personal assistance, giveaways, and much more. Whether you're stranded and need a lift, require help with tasks, or simply want to give back to the community, our app provides a seamless solution.


Here's how it works: Users looking for assistance can post their service requests, specifying the type of help they need, the location, and any relevant details. On the other hand, individuals who are willing and able to provide that assistance can browse these requests and offer their services. It's a platform that fosters collaboration, trust, and mutual benefit.


What sets us apart is that those who extend their help also have the opportunity to earn money for their assistance. Whether you're a professional driver offering transportation services, a handyman helping with household tasks, or someone simply looking to lend a hand, our app ensures that your efforts are rewarded.


Our platform is designed to be user-friendly, secure, and transparent. We prioritize safety and reliability, implementing measures to verify users and facilitate secure transactions. Additionally, users can rate and review each other, fostering a sense of trust within the community.


Join our app today and experience the power of coming together to help one another while also earning money for your valuable assistance. It's a place where community spirit and financial reward intersect, creating a unique and fulfilling experience for all.

Our history and extensive network of correspondents in Italy and worldwide allow us to follow the goods every step of the way. Cigisped's strength is the presence of its agents in the ports of destination. This ensures maximum assistance and highly qualified consultancy for all discharge operations.
The company headquarters is in Genoa, Italy. Cigisped's consolidated position in the international market is ensured by our sales and operations network composed of agents and correspondents. This allows us to follow every stage of the shipment. Cigisped has representative offices in USA, Asia, and Europe.

- Ngày 01/6/2007 Thủ tướng Chính phủ đã ban hành Quyết định 674/QĐ-TTg ngày 01/6/2007 về phê duyệt Đề án thành lập Tổng công ty Bưu chính Việt Nam. Theo đó Tổng công ty Bưu chính Việt Nam là Tổng công ty nhà nước, do Nhà nước thành lập, hoạt động chuyên về lĩnh vực Bưu chính, hạch toán kinh tế độc lập và được Nhà nước giao vốn thông qua Tập đoàn, Hội đồng thành viên Tập đoàn VNPT là đại diện chủ sở hữu Nhà nước tại Tổng công ty và là Hội đồng thành viên của Tổng công ty. Thực hiện Quyết định 674/QĐ-TTg của Thủ tướng Chính phủ, ngày 15/6/2007 Bộ Bưu chính Viễn Thông (nay là Bộ Thông tin và Truyền thông) đã ban hành Quyết định số 16/2007/QĐ-TCCB-BBCVT về việc thành lập Tổng công ty Bưu chính Việt Nam.
- Ngày 16/11/2012 Thủ tướng Chính phủ đã ban hành Quyết định số 1746/QĐ-TTg về việc chuyển quyền đại diện chủ sở hữu nhà nước tại Tổng công ty Bưu chính Việt Nam từ Tập đoàn Bưu chính Viễn thông Việt Nam về Bộ Thông tin và Truyền thông. Name: FAST.EST S.R.L.
Description: FAST.EST SRL U.S. Nasce nel 1999. L'esperienza nel mondo dell' home delivery tecnico inizia già nel 1989 attraverso servizi dedicati al mondo dei negozi specializzati nella vendita di elettrodomestici, e di video hi-fi / climatizzazione. Il know how acquisito, quindi, è quello del servizio di alta qualità richiesto dal cliente del punto vendita di prossimità , ossia del negozio padronale. All'inizio degli anni '90 , con l'arrivo della grande distribuzione, Fast.Est ha saputo trasformare il proprio DNA diventando , difatto, il partner ideale in grado di formare operatori attrezzati in grado di seguire le catene , senza mutare la propria natura di corriere tecnico legato al servizio di qualità che ha sempre contraddistinto il negozio padronale. Un fattore rilevante è stato quello di creare, per prima in Italia, una piattaforma informatica in grado di integrarsi con la grande distribuzione , e con i primi canali Online, e capace di gestire i servizi affidati ma anche il flusso di rifiuti ( raee) con tutto il processo documentale e relative autorizzazioni. Oggi Fast.Est, in costante espansione, vanta sedi DIRETTE su buona parte del territorio nazionale. E' dotata di tutte le autorizzazioni di legge per eseguire trasporti conto terzi , installazioni certificate di tutti i tipi ( dal clima al collegamento gas), e per tracciare in modo certo la filiera Raee. Grazie al supporto del fondo di investimento JZI International , Fast.Est s.r.l. continua a crescere doppia cifra senza tralasciare il proprio codice etico e la cura di tutti i propri clienti. Formazione del personale ,della flotta , e delle attrezzature, sono sempre al centro dell'attenzione assieme alla costante assistenza dei distributori off e online tramite una rete di capoarea dedicati. il nostro motto, "you can ask, we go fast!", descrive la nostra mission. il nostro obiettivo? essere il primo technical Courier specializzato nel mondo dell'elettrodomestico e dei prodotti voluminosi in Italia ,e non solo!

Name: PT. Titipan Kilat Surabaya (TIKI)
Description:
PT. Titipan Kilat Surabaya adalah perusahaan jasa pengiriman yang membantu mengembangkan jaringan usaha PT. Citra Van Titipan Kilat (TIKI) untuk area Jawa Timur. Hingga saat ini, TIKI memiliki jaringan operasional yang meliputi 65 kota besar di Indonesia, didukung oleh lebih dari 500 kantor perwakilan, lebih dari 3200 gerai dan lebih dari 12.000 karyawan di seluruh Indonesia. 

Produk dan pelayanan TIKI telah diakui dan meraih berbagai penghargaan meliputi Superbrands Indonesia 2017 dari Superbrands Indonesia, Netizen Courier Service Choice 2017 dari Majalah Warta Ekonomi, Top Brand Award dari Frontier dan Majalah Marketing, Service Quality Award 2016 dari Service Excellence, Pertama di Indonesia TIKI Self Service Machine dari Tras n Co, Indonesia Digital Popular Brand Award 2016 dari Tras n Co, Indonesia E-Commerce Brand Award 2016, Indonesia Wow Brand 2015 dari Markplus, dan Indonesia Most Favorite Women Brand 2015 dari MarkPlus.

Di tahun 2018, TIKI kembali dipercaya untuk meraih penghargaan antara lain Penghargaan “Indonesia Business Development Award 2018” kategori “The Best Freight Forwarding Company in Service and Customer Satisfaction of the Year 2018” oleh Indonesia Development Achievement Foundation, pada Oktober 2018; Top Brand Category: Courier Service “ in recognition of outstanding achievement in building the top brand “; SQ Category : Courier “For achieving excellent total service quality satisfaction based on customer perception survey SQIndex 2018 dan SQIndex 2019“.

TIKI percaya bahwa eksistensi bisnisnya tidak terlepas dari dukungan dan kepercayaan dari masyarakat. Untuk itu, TIKI memiliki komitmen untuk menjalankan tanggung jawab perusahaan yang difokuskan pada dua area yaitu pendidikan dan bidang sosial. Dalam menjalankan komitmennya, TIKI bekerjasama dengan berbagai mitra seperti Yayasan Pengembang Perpustakaan Indonesia, 1001 Buku dan santunan regular untuk anak yatim dan tuna netra.

Ecco il motivo per cui, con orgoglio, possiamo dirti che ti offriamo un servizio di spedizione comodo, ben organizzato e memorabile.

We also advise and consult on the classification and regulatory requirements for your shipment.“We are able to pack, raise documentation and complete all necessary customs requirements, while strategically planning the most efficient transport routes for all your consignments – globally.”

In a world of heightened security and constantly changing work environments, the subject of shipping dangerous goods has become a minefield of complicated regulations and restrictions. This automatically creates demand for the specialist knowledge and experience that Hazmat Global Support Services has to offer.

We serve all major industries and can handle even the most restricted dangerous consignments whilst acknowledging global safety standards, and ensuring compliance with all relevant transport regulations and legislation.

Our strict ethical codes and the implementation of policies and globally recognised systems allows us to work in a safe and compliant manner to fulfil our customer’s requirements without exposing them to potentially litigious situations. We see it as our responsibility to ensure that public safety and the environment are always consider whilst offering a superior, quality service to our clients.

Agregamos valor al incluir una aplicación móvil capaz de Rastrear los envíos, Calcular el precio de importación de forma independiente y en línea, asi como Prealertar las compras realizadas.

Liberty Express USA es reconocida por las autoridades estadounidenses como empresa de transporte internacional, lo que implica que las mercancías recibidas en el warehouse, son despachadas al exterior; por tanto el warehouse de Doral, FL es certificado exento de impuesto de venta de Florida, evitando el pago obligatorio de 7% de IV

En adición, se ofrece el servicio de devoluciones flete Gratis hacia USA, para aquellos casos de inconformidad o garantía.

Importación Comercial B2B

Servicio de importación aérea / marítima de materia prima y producto terminado

Liberty Express pone a disposición +54 puertos distribuidos en 3 continentes, con capacidad para recibir, identificar, procesar y embarcar via marítima hacia Costa Rica, todas la compras internacionales requerida por su organización.

Name: Novex Delivery Solutions
Description:
Novex Delivery Solutions has become a leader in providing premium same day delivery solutions utilizing electric and hybrid vehicles and industry leading sustainable operations and logistics management.

Novex is a B.C. owned and operated company, which has been servicing the Lower Mainland's same-day delivery needs for over 40 years. We are now one of the largest local same-day couriers in the Lower Mainland and have expanded into the Freight division. We are comprised of an experienced team of drivers, customer service representatives and dispatches with over 100 delivery vehicles making over 2000 deliveries per day.

We have laid out a strategic plan to become a truly sustainable organization creating a triple bottom line that includes social, economic and environmental targets. We understand that the nature of our business contributes to the growing environmental problem and in accepting our responsibility we have made a commitment to do the right thing and consistently focus on creating a sustainable company.  We are the first courier of our kind to take our commitment to the earth, to our people and to our communities to this level.

Name: JTL Logistics
Description:
JTL Logistics was born from a simple start in the streets of Cairo — one bicycle, a few shipments, and a vision shared by three founders who believed hard work could build something real. We grew the company the same way we built our reputation: step by step, with no external funding, no shortcuts, and a deep focus on client trust.

From those early days, JTL has evolved into a reliable last-mile delivery partner for e-commerce brands, designers, retailers, and growing businesses across Egypt. Our work is grounded in operational discipline, customer care, and a belief that every delivery represents someone’s promise to their customer.

Unlike companies built in boardrooms, JTL was shaped in the field — learning from the streets, the hubs, the couriers, and the daily challenges of urban delivery. That’s why our systems, our people, and our culture are built for real-world speed, accuracy, and accountability.

Today, JTL continues to expand with a simple mission:
make last-mile delivery smoother, faster, and more dependable for every business we serve.

Whether it’s shipments, returns, fulfillment support, or customer experience, we aim to create a delivery journey that feels effortless for the client and trustworthy for the end customer.

Open to new partnerships, collaborations, and growth opportunities in last-mile delivery and e-commerce enablement.

Contemporaneamente, avvalendoci della collaborazione di importanti e consolidati partners locali, gestiamo diverse attività con diverse tipologie di container nei principali porti italiani.
Il gruppo Kukla opera nel settore dei trasporti e della logistica in Europa e nel mondo dal 1941, ritagliandosi un importante spazio, specialmente in talune nicchie di mercato, e guadagnandosi la fiducia di importanti clienti europei. Questo ci ha portato ad acquisire oggi una consolidata esperienza nel mondo dei trasporti internazionali, con una struttura capillare di filiali, uffici di rappresentanza e partners con personale poliglotta e altamente professionale.

Name: Global Mission Shipping Company
Description:
We are simply a couple of guys who sat down and talked about the struggles of shipping packages to missionaries overseas. We heard from many missionary moms expressing their frustration at the whole process of going to the post office, paying a bunch of money, and hoping that their son or daughters package would arrive within the next two months! Sometimes it wouldn’t ever arrive! No-one from the post office had any idea where the package might be, and a quick, easy answer would usually be, “It’s most likely stuck in customs”. All that time and money and care would go down the drain!! There simply had to be an easier way to ship quickly, be able to trace packages and not break the bank!

This website is a culmination of over 15 years experience in the International and Domestic Shipping Industry. In looking at the success of many wholesale-to-the-public companies (such as Costco) we decided that perhaps shipping parcels could be done with the same concept: putting together a large buying group (missionary parents, relatives, and friends) as a single buying entity, allowing this entity to negotiate a very large shipping discount that can be accessed by a single portal (website) and a vehicle to do so (Global Mission Shipping). Membership is free and it is open to the public. This is the idea behind Global Mission Shipping.

Meanwhile, the last mile is the most complex , expensive part of the delivery and with a lot of delivery actors that you can’t reach and they can’t reach you.
We are solving that with AI and Machine Learning to optimize routes, spaces, experiences, behaviors.
We believe in local impact with global reach, we aim to revolutionize last mile delivery and ecommerce with innovation, precision, sustainability, a seamless and personalized user experience.
We provide not only our unique softwares but as well the service.

Name: InXpress Auvergne
Description:
Vous cherchez une solution simple, rapide et économique pour expédier vos colis en France et à l'international ? Découvrez InXpress, les experts en transport et logistique !

**Qui sommes-nous ?**

InXpress est une entreprise spécialisée dans le transport express de colis, de matières dangereuses et de palettes. Nous travaillons avec les leaders du secteur, tels que DHL, UPS, FEDEX, GLS, et bien d'autres, pour vous offrir les meilleurs services au meilleur prix.

**Nos services**

Avec InXpress, vous pouvez :

- Comparer et choisir le transporteur le plus adapté à vos besoins, en fonction du poids, du volume, de la destination et du délai de livraison de vos colis.
- Gérer toutes vos expéditions via une seule plateforme, notre logiciel propriétaire webship+. Vous pouvez suivre vos colis en temps réel, imprimer vos étiquettes, gérer vos documents douaniers, etc.
- Recevoir une unique facture mensuelle, peu importe le nombre de colis ou le réseau utilisé. Vous bénéficiez d'une tarification claire et transparente, sans frais cachés ni surprises.

**Nos avantages**

En choisissant InXpress, vous profitez de :

- Des tarifs exclusifs, grâce à notre réseau international de plus de 500 centres sur 5 continents et plus de 25 ans d'expérience. Vous économisez jusqu'à 25% sur vos coûts d'expédition, dès le premier colis !
- Des services de qualité, avec les géants du transport express. Vos colis sont livrés en toute sécurité et dans les meilleurs délais, en France et vers 220 pays.
- Des conseils d'experts, sans frais supplémentaires. Nos équipes vous accompagnent dans vos défis logistiques, de l'emballage au suivi, en passant par la douane et la livraison.

**Nos coordonnées**

Vous souhaitez en savoir plus sur nos services ou demander un devis personnalisé ? Contactez-nous dès maintenant !

 Tél. : 0955 008 008
 Portable : 06 37 53 88 03

Name: EshopWedrop
Description:
EshopWedrop is revolutionising the way consumers shop and buy products online.

Our fully integrated, International cross-border, online delivery service provides consumers worldwide with the freedom and ease to purchase from online retailers in Europe, USA and soon Asia - then have the goods delivered to their country quickly and at a low cost. 

How our service works:
Upon signing up at relevant EshopWedrop website the consumers receive their ‘Personal Delivery Addresses’ for the UK, USA, Poland, Italy, France, Germany and soon Hong Kong and China. When shopping on the e-tailers websites, instead of consumers using their own address, their ‘Personal EshopWedrop delivery address’ and unique EshopWedrop reference number are entered. The ordered items will then arrive at the EshopWedrop warehouse and the team will then prepare and execute the delivery of the parcels to the consumer.

Benefits of using EshopWedrop:

Cost effective rates - Low cost International parcel delivery rates.

Easy to Use - Less time shipping means more time enjoying your new items.

More choices - Access to quality products and iconic brands at low prices.

Parcel tracking - Consumers can easily track the journey of your parcel.

High quality customer care - A global service supported with high quality and caring customer support.

#explorenewmarkets

Na vastidão de Angola, erguemos as asas da inovação e sustentabilidade. Não somos apenas entregas; somos promessas cumpridas ao planeta, viajando e promovendo a responsabilidade ambiental, não apenas transportando encomendas, mas carregando sobre duas rodas a transformação verde.

Em uma Angola que se move à diversificação econômica, nossa missão é ser a voz da consciência ecológica, navegando pelas estradas da inovação sustentável, onde cada entrega não apenas alcança, mas também preserva o futuro do nosso planeta. Reduzindo a emissão de gases de efeito estufa enquanto geramos oportunidades para jovens locais, fomentando a economia Local e Circular. **GOOBIKE-ENTREGAS VERDES** - Revolucionando a logística urbana através de soluções de transporte sustentáveis e ágeis.

According to our company, one of the basic conditions for reliable transportation and meeting deadlines is the appropriate technical background and vehicle fleet. Thanks to our modern vehicles, our clients' goods can be delivered safely and without quality deterioration anywhere within Hungary and abroad. With our boxed, insulated superstructure vehicles, we can ensure the cooling of transported goods and cargo down to 0-5 °C and -20 °C in accordance with the regulations. Our vehicle fleet is equipped with the WebEye tracking system, supplemented with a temperature control and cargo space monitoring sensor, so we can always convey the most accurate information to our Clients.

JTL Logistics started with a simple idea, a bicycle, and a vision shared by three former partners—John, Taha, and Loai (JTL). Unlike other shipping companies, we did not raise any kind of investment. Instead, we built JTL from the inside out, growing organically through hard work, operational excellence, and customer trust.

Forniamo servizi specifici legati all’e-commerce e colleghiamo le tue piattaforme al WMS del magazzino per importare gli ordini.
È disponibile un servizio per ordini personalizzati che prevede anche l’imballaggio del pacco da spedire, e, nel caso di occasioni particolari, dell’impacchettamento dedicato.

Il nostro servizio Customer Service gestisce ogni spedizione, controlla e risponde ad ogni richiesta del cliente, dando supporto nella gestione degli ordini e delle spedizioni.

The company also offers freight management, labelling and dispatching software, ecommerce freight management, B2B and B2C least-cost carrier routing, international inbound and outbound drop shipping, and air and sea freight. 

In addition, Couriers and Freight has a full in-house team of software development and integration specialists.

At Global Shipping, our mission is clear: to deliver an excellent service in shipping agency, harbor, and logistics operations, achieving the highest standards of quality, efficiency, and competitiveness. Embracing a vision of sustained growth and global prominence, we remain dedicated to our core values of excellence, innovation, and social responsibility.

Passel offers three levels of service:

On-Demand – Delivery inside 90 minutes from booking.

Same Day – Delivery before 9pm.

Name: MONIPORT
Description:
Somos una empresa dedicada a brindar el mejor servicio logístico integral en comercio internacional.

MONIPORT S.A. inicio sus actividades en el año 1991 como Consultoría Aduanera y de Comercio Internacional de la mano de su fundador y actual presidente Daniel Domingo Monin.
En los años siguientes se fueron incorporando en forma gradual los actuales directores de la sociedad, constituyéndose en una empresa familiar en la que se conjugan la experiencia de la primera generación con el vigor y el empuje de la segunda.

Entendiendo las necesidades de nuestros clientes y observando la realidad y evolución del comercio internacional, en el año 2003 se desarrollo el Depto. de Cargas Internacionales con la finalidad de brindar un servicio integral y de un mayor valor agregado.

Gracias a la excelencia y seriedad del servicio brindado, fundado en el compromiso y profesionalismo de su Staff, año a año vio crecer tanto el volumen de sus clientes como el de sus operaciones, constituyéndose en uno de los referentes actuales en la actividad.

•	Большой собственный автопарк.
•	Экономия вашего времени.
•	Индивидуальный подход.

•	Забота о ваших интересах.
•	Система скидок.
•	Мониторинг груза на протяжении всего пути.

ООО "Еврооптавто" выступает как интегратор спутниковых систем и в направлении транспортной логистики и основными задачами, на данный момент, являются аналитика перевозок и эксплуатации автотранспорта.
***
Company E-Auto (LLC "Eurooptauto") was founded in March 2012. The main activity of the company is transportation and freight forwarding. The company was founded as a general transporter of chain stores "Euroopt" to meet the needs of the network in the movement of goods in the stores, the delivery of goods to distribution (logistics) centers. 
Today company E-auto renders transport services not only to chain stores "Euroopt", "HIT", "Groshik" and to other major manufacturers, both in Belarus and abroad. 
Currently, one of the company's goals is to automate the processes, thus providing enhanced information on the state of transportation on request. 
Our company acts as an integrator of satellite systems. At the moment the main challenges in the direction of transport logistics are analytics of traffic and operation of vehicles.

Name: Logisticians Global Freight
Description:
At Logisticians Global Freight, we redefine freight forwarding with our unparalleled expertise in Dangerous Goods (DG) Cargo. As a global leader in logistics, we specialize in the safe, efficient, and compliant transportation of hazardous materials, ensuring your goods reach their destination securely—no matter how complex the journey.

Our Expertise: Dangerous Goods (DG) Cargo
Navigating the logistics of DG Cargo requires a deep understanding of international regulations, rigorous safety protocols, and precise handling procedures. Our team is not just experienced; we are certified experts in the transportation of hazardous materials. From flammable liquids and gases to corrosive substances and toxic chemicals, we manage every detail with meticulous care, adhering to global safety standards like IATA, IMDG, and ADR.

Global Network, Local Expertise
With a robust global network and local expertise in major markets, Logisticians Global Freight offers seamless door-to-door service across continents. Our partnerships with leading carriers and our in-depth knowledge of international trade routes enable us to deliver customized solutions that minimize risk and optimize efficiency.

Compliance and Safety First
Safety and compliance are at the core of our operations. We invest continuously in training and technology to stay ahead of the latest regulations and industry best practices. Our commitment to safety is not just about meeting standards—it’s about exceeding them. We take pride in providing peace of mind to our clients, knowing that their DG Cargo is handled with the utmost care and professionalism.

Name: Push Innovation
Description:
Before we got into the product fulfillment game, we were prominent advertisers with many of the same concerns you have: Who can I trust with my precious cargo? Where can I find the best prices? Does my dream fulfillment center exist in the real world?

We spent years scouring the industry for our perfect match – the one that could do it all, the one we could trust with our entire portfolio, the one that could give us the best return on our investment. After what felt like an eternity of bad dates, we’ve pretty much seen and heard it all.

Marathon networking connected us to the whole gamut of professionals in sourcing, packaging, mailing, printing, customer service, and logistics, opening our eyes to a bevy of uncoordinated solutions. Experience with the main shipping and fulfillment players taught us what pitfalls to expect - mountains of paperwork and red tape, line item fees, upfront costs, holiday delays, mislabeled products, and every possible mishap you could think of in between. To get the results we wanted, it seemed we would have to do it ourselves.

So about a dozen campaigns ago, we decided to combine our vast network of connections with our hard-earned savvy and put them to the ultimate test. We founded Push Innovation, our very own fulfillment center. 

In the very first year of operation, we grew from a small storage room to two full-fledged warehouses.  Apparently, we got a lot of things right. 

Business expansion continues today, and we’re constantly adding new services and products to keep up with industry trends and new talent to better serve our fellow advertisers. From products and packing to shipping and customer support, we’re ready to serve you and your online direct response campaign.

Name: UP bastaunclick!
Description:
UP – Basta un click rappresenta una svolta innovativa nel settore della logistica collaborativa, offrendo una soluzione smart, sostenibile ed efficiente per la spedizione di pacchi. Fondata nel 2022 da Raffaele Scarlatti e Samuele Bacci e sviluppata da Easyray, questa piattaforma digitale si propone di trasformare ogni viaggio in un’opportunità concreta di consegna, ottimizzando risorse e abbattendo i costi tradizionali.

Attraverso la sua applicazione mobile, disponibile su iOS e Android, UP consente agli utenti di assumere tre ruoli distinti ma complementari: il creatore, che pubblica una spedizione; il driver, che accetta di trasportare il pacco durante un proprio percorso già pianificato; e il validatore, ovvero il destinatario che conferma l’avvenuta consegna tramite un sistema digitale basato su QR code.

Questa modalità di spedizione peer-to-peer non solo riduce drasticamente i costi per chi spedisce, ma promuove anche un modello di mobilità sostenibile grazie a un sistema di incentivi dedicato a chi utilizza mezzi di trasporto a basso impatto ambientale. Il programma Ecopoint valorizza e premia concretamente le scelte green, contribuendo a un approccio responsabile e attento alle sfide ambientali.

UP si distingue per la capacità di coniugare innovazione tecnologica e sostenibilità ambientale, grazie a funzionalità come la chat multilingue, il tracciamento digitale e uno storico completo delle spedizioni. Name: Summum Motis
Description:
Summum Motis is Cincinnati's Courier Service. We charge as little as half of what other companies cost because we are independently owned. We have the best completion rate in Cincinnati. We provide friendly, reliable, and affordable service.


How Is Summum Motis So Much Less Expensive Than the Competition?

Summum Motis was founded to provide customers a courier service that is reliable and fairly priced. Founder Ben Cooper, throughout his many years of experience, noticed that the courier industry has many layers of redundancy, costing the customer money. Drivers are independent contractors working for courier companies, who are then contracted to logistics companies. This structure has its merits for large, irregular, or nationwide deliveries, but it only hurts customers with regular small package delivery needs. Ben is changing that by creating a courier service without a separate logistics company for small package deliveries within 100 miles of Cincinnati. By eliminating the unnecessary red tape, Summum Motis is able to charge as little as half of the other courier services.


Who Can Benefit Most From Using Summum Motis?

Ben has many years of experience providing courier services for the medical, pharmaceutical, and veterinary fields. Doctors, dentists, optometrists, veterinarians, laboratories, and pharmacies have all trusted him and he hasn’t let them down - Ben has the highest completion rate in the city. Any business within 100 miles of Cincinnati needing reliable small package delivery could greatly benefit from the increased security and decreased cost of Summum Motis.

Name: MMRL Logistics
Description:
MMRL offers a comprehensive range of transportation services in USA with a strong emphasis on quality, flexibility, and competitive pricing. Our services include Full Truckload (FTL), Less than Truckload (LTL), Reefer, Project Cargo, Long Term Contracts (LTCs), and Oversize shipments. With specialization in Drayage, we guarantee to surpass any existing rates from US ports while providing all-inclusive pricing, eliminating uncertainties associated with additional expenses.

Furthermore, our assistance extends to customs clearance at US ports through our established network of customs brokers. We also provide comprehensive services for transloading and warehousing solutions across North America. Leveraging our extensive network of over a thousand carriers nationwide, we consistently deliver reliable service to our clients.

Our commitment to excellence is reinforced by stringent Service Level Agreements (SLAs) with our trucking partners, ensuring consistent high-quality service delivery. With over 45 years of management experience, we specialize in offering comprehensive drayage, transloading, and warehousing solutions across the United States. Our strategic partnerships enable direct coverage of freight and drayage in key markets such as Norfolk, VA; New York/New Jersey; Houston, TX; and Los Angeles, CA, while also ensuring reliable services in other markets through trusted carrier providers.

Our specialty is Drayage. We will beat any rates you are currently running from any US ports. Moreover for Drayage we provide an all in rate to our customers. Unlike other Drayage providers who send an invoice for various charges after delivery of the container eg Chassis fee, congestion fee, etc, MMRL will give a rate which includes all accessorial charges so there is no uncertainty about the cost of transportation.

We eager to explore potential business collaborations with you. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any further questions.

Name: EBC Logistica & Trasporti
Velocity
Description:
Velocity is een fietskoeriersbedrijf en bestaat bijna 20 jaar. Nijmegen en omgeving zijn ons werkterrein. We zijn actief op het gebied van zakelijke post (bezorgen, ophalen en frankeren), pakketten (ophalen, verzenden en bezorgen), medicijnen (bezorgen), bodediensten, losse (spoed)ritten en verspreidingen (waaronder huis-aan-huismailings voor non-profitorganisaties).
We fungeren als een duurzame stadshub voor de op- en overslag van inkomende en uitgaande zendingen en goederen voor de (binnen)stad. Voor lokale bierbrouwers bezorgen we bv. wekelijks bier in en om de binnenstad. In 2025 mag de binnenstad van Nijmegen alleen nog emissievrij bevoorraad worden. Wij hebben het sinds 2002 nog nooit anders gedaan.

Daarnaast vervoeren we van alles wat je maar kunt bedenken per fiets. Zo vervangen we de posters in een groot deel van de bushokjes in Nijmegen, bezorgen we brood voor twee biologische bakkers, doen we veel spoedritten voor laboratoria en vervoeren we bagage van hotel naar hotel voor een reisorganisatie. 

We doen bijna al ons werk op de fiets. Medicijnen en post meestal op een koeriersfiets, eventueel met een aanhangertje. Pakketten en grotere hoeveelheden post vooral met cargobikes (Bullitts en Velove Armadillo). Een deel van onze cargobikes is elektrisch ondersteund. We rijden dagelijks 1 pakketroute met een elektrische bestelauto.

Wij geloven in een duurzame, sociale en leefbare wereld. We zijn een hecht team van betrokken, zelfstandige medewerkers. De werksfeer is informeel. Persoonlijk contact is belangrijk: binnen het bedrijf en daarbuiten (met klanten en samenwerkingspartners). We hebben een relatief platte organisatiestructuur; medewerkers krijgen veel vertrouwen en eigen verantwoordelijkheid. In piekperiodes (vooral juni en december) en bij spoedopdrachten zetten we samen onze schouders eronder. Met z’n allen de klus klaren geeft altijd weer een kick.

La actual situación del mercado de transporte y la logística ofrece al consumidor una importante variedad de productos y servicios. Optimal Logistics garantiza el mejor producto con relación a sus necesidades de transporte y logística. 

Prestamos especial atención en marcar un claro itinerario y acompañar a nuestros clientes en sus proyectos de empresa, de este modo conseguimos conocer desde dentro las necesidades que nos son dadas a conocer, Optimal Logistics ofrece un asesoramiento integral así como mejorar todos los procesos logísticos y operativos que las actualmente viene precisándose, y que en muchos de los casos no pueden ser solucionados por los proveedores de transporte habituales.

Más de 20 años en el sector del transporte y la logística avanzada avalan nuestra actividad.

Desfragmentamos y volvemos a consolidar para Vd los flujos de transporte. 

No aportamos seguridad en nuestras prestaciones, si no absolutas GARANTÍAS de  que Vd está accediendo a los mejores servicios y productos del mercado, respaldados por Optimal Logistics

Aplicamos la lógica a sus proyectos de envíos, utilizamos los mejores canales para procurarle el mejor servicio, e implementamos todas las garantías para su absoluta tranquilidad.

Nuestra labor no se detiene ni está limitada con respecto a la logística solicitada, también aportamos todas las soluciones, medios y herramientas necesarias para poner a disposición de Vd un servicio logístico integral que consolida el transporte, la logística y los nuevos canales tecnológicos de comunicación y comercialización.

Hemos realizado un largo camino para poder llegar a ofrecerle nuestros servicios. Nos sentimos orgullosos de poder aportar y poner a su disposición todos nuestros conocimientos logísticos y servicios, descubrirá un nuevo concepto de logística creada en exclusiva por y para Vd.
Location: Arganda del Rey, Comunidad de Madrid

Name: Geen Stress Amsterdam
Description:
Wij doen gewoon.
We hoeven niet in de spotlights te staan. Laat ons maar lekker op de achtergrond werken. Wij houden van actie en dan pas praatjes.
Geen mooie marketing poespas, al die opschmuk. Geen grote ego's, geen dikke Porsche's voor de eigenaar. Geen extern kapitaal.
Wat wel?
Eerlijke bedrijfsvoering. Goede voorwaarden voor onze mensen. Keiharde dikke elektrische fietsen bij lokale ondernemers vandaan. En hart voor de zaak. Voor de klanten en voor de stad.

Ons team is samengesteld uit diversiteit. Mensen die weten wat het is om kansen te grijpen en daar het meeste van te maken omdat deze voor ons niet altijd voor de hand lagen.
We zijn er misschien niet voor de grote webshops. Niet voor de Bol.coms, niet voor de Wehkamps van de wereld. Maar wel voor de lokale MKB'er, voor de lokale ondernemer met een webshop en klanten in Amsterdam.

Bij ons geen volumekortingen maar eerlijke straight-up prijzen. 

Geen Gehannes, Geen Gedoe, Geen Stress.

Name: CIFFA - Chinese International Freight Forwarders Alliance
Description:
‘Trade has long been a powerful engine for China’s economy. Chinese jobs and prosperity depend on the business we do with other countries. In fact, trade is equivalent to more than 60 percent of our country’s GDP and one in five Chinese jobs is related to exports.”
As a vital component of China’s global supply chain, member firms of the Chinese International Freight Forwarders Alliance (CIFFA) facilitate the movement of goods around the world. 
Freight forwarders provide a vital link in China’s global supply chains, enhancing export capabilities and assisting in the delivery of competitive solutions to China’s importing and exporting communities.
Freight forwarding is all about the smooth flow of international trade.
Ever Wonder What Freight Forwarders Do? 
The freight forwarder is the party who ensures that internationally traded goods move from point of origin to point of destination to arrive:
At the right place,
At the right time,
In good order and condition,
At the most economic cost.
CIFFA Regular Freight Forwarding Members
Only regular members are allowed to display the CIFFA logo and to operate business under the CIFFA STCs, bringing the integrity and authority of the CIFFA brand to customer relationship. Click here for a list of CIFFA members.

Der Versender spart sich den Rechercheaufwand und bekommt Preise und Konditionen, die er alleine kaum realisieren kann. Beispielsweise werden im „Profi-Paketversand" schon ab einem Versandvolumen von nur 50 Paketen pro Monat Sonderkonditionen gewährt. Name: Lusifrota - Transportes e Logística
Description:
A Lusifrota é uma empresa do Grupo Lusiaves, fundada em 1987, com sede na Zona Industrial da Zicofa, Cova das Faias - Leiria. Inicialmente criada para dar uma resposta mais profissionalizada e adequada às necessidades das empresas do Grupo Lusiaves, tem como atividade principal o transporte rodoviário de produtos e mercadorias por conta de outrem.
 
O facto de estar associada a um Grupo tão diversificado em termos de atividades operacionais, faz da Lusifrota uma empresa altamente especializada e capacitada para corresponder com as mais distintas tipologias de transporte e com um elevado nível de serviço, atuando sobretudo no setor do transporte de carga geral, produtos alimentares (quer ao nível do retalho quer, sobretudo, ao nível da grande distribuição), subprodutos e aves vivas, bem como no setor do transporte a granel de cereal e de alimentos para produção animal.
 
Para dar resposta a todas as solicitações que recebe, a Lusifrota dispõe de uma frota moderna (com uma idade média que ronda os 5 anos) distribuída de norte a sul do país e composta por mais de 300 viaturas, predominantemente pesadas, com soluções ao nível de equipamentos rígidos e articulados e que vão desde os frigoríficos, passando pelas cisternas, cubas com sem-fim, basculantes, carga geral entre outros.
 
Na Lusifrota defendemos e promovemos políticas de melhoria contínua sempre com foco na minimização de impactos ambientais, assumindo um compromisso forte e permanente na transição energética e na redução de emissões de CO2, através de vários mecanismos que nos dão suporte para atingir estes objetivos, como sejam a formação constante e permanente, a transformação digital com ferramentas que reforçam esta missão ou mesmo com uma política de renovação de frota através da aquisição de viaturas novas cada vez menos poluentes (donde se destacam os pesados movidos a gás) e cada vez mais eficientes.

•2015: Vi väljer att lämna den franchisekedja vi tillhört i olika former sedan 1986 och bildar Riksbud. Vi lämnar kedjan på eget initiativ och skapar ett eget varumärke som Riksbud. Hos oss är det alltid enkelt och krångelfritt. Du märker skillnaden redan vid skärmen. Där kan du enkelt förstå skillnaden mellan olika produkter och beställa precis det bud du behöver till ett riktigt bra pris. Sedan kan du egentligen glömma alltihop. Känn dig trygg när vi representerar dig, ditt varumärke eller bara flyttar ett paket inom firman.
Ge oss adressen. Vi fixar resten.

Riksbuds mål är att tillsammans med våra partners lösa vardagslogistiken för dig lokalt, regionalt och i hela landet:


Möjligheterna är många. Utmana oss gärna så fixar vi resten.

Mercian is also a member of the Pallex group, providing solutions for larger shipments, with a range of services across the UK and Europe for palletised freight, and options for next day and economy, our tariffs provide full, half and quarter rates to anywhere within the UK and Europe. We also provide solutions for storage and fulfilment from our large hub in the heart of Herefordshire, utilising our multiple delivery options to provide a seamless transition from pick to delivery. Our focus is on the service our customers receive, and our aim is to make the delivery process as smooth and problem free as possible, regardless if the item is a small bag of documents, or a large pallet. We believe people work with people, and you will always find a friendly and helpful response to any request from the team at Mercian Logistics, the local business with the global reach.

We are part of Cathay Investments.

Name: ЧП "КАТА-ЛОГ"
Description:
Компания «КАТА-ЛОГ» - надежная, стабильная компания, работающая на рынке грузоперевозок уже на протяжении четырех лет. За это время мы сумели зарекомендовать себя как ответственного партнера, всегда выполняющего взятые на себя обязательства.

Миссия нашей компании состоит в том, чтобы создавать такие условия и такие услуги, при которых любой товар в самые оптимальные сроки и по лучшей цене будет надежно доставлен в любую точку мира. Разрабатывая качественные и необходимые обществу услуги, мы объединяем континенты прочными нитями деловых и личных коммуникаций. Приобретая опыт в международном пространстве, мы предлагаем Вам действительно лучший сервис. Мы участвуем в Вашем успехе, развиваясь и совершенствуясь вместе с Вами.

Мы дорожим нашими клиентами и поэтому в качестве своей цели видим своевременную и бережную доставку Ваших грузов. Постоянно анализируя рынок грузоперевозок, мы разрабатываем и совершенствуем новые услуги, чтобы Вы могли доверить нам все заботы по транспортировке.

Мы это команда профессионалов, которая готова применив весь свой опыт обеспечить надежность, бережность транспортировки груза в любую точку мира точно в указанные сроки.

С компанией «КАТА – ЛОГ» вы забудете о моральных и материальных потерях связанных с доставкой груза, так как в нашей компании работают высококвалифицированные специалисты знающие свое дело, и ценящие доверие клиентов. Кроме того, транспортируемые нами грузы страхуются надежными компаниями.

Обратившись к нам, вы останетесь довольны индивидуальным подходом к решению проблем клиентов и ответственным отношением к общему делу.

Независимо от того, какой груз и куда Вам нужно доставить, в лице транспортной компании «КАТА – ЛОГ» Вы всегда найдете надежного партнера.

Met meer dan 30 jaar ervaring zijn we een betrouwbare koeriersdienst. Wij brengen ver dichtbij. Hoe? We hebben een slim netwerk in Nederland, in Europa en in de rest van de wereld. De rest van de wereld volgt snel.

Wat u ook wilt verzenden: KDZ Express is altijd in control. En u dus ook. Wij houden u op de hoogte van de status van uw zending. Bij eventuele problemen reageren we proactief. En we bieden altijd een oplossing.

Name: Reliable Couriers
Description:
Reliable Couriers is a same day courier service company originally located in Phoenix, AZ but since then has spread to over 20 different major cities . All of our drivers are bonded and equipped with GPS so your package will make it to its destination on time and intact.

Same Day Delivery:
Our company focuses specifically on same day delivery, meaning wherever your package needs to go the same day we can get it done; also since we are open 24 hours a day we will always be on call to deliver whatever you need us to at any time of day or night.

Hot Shot Courier: 
The majority of our deliveries are hot shot courier jobs, which means we pick up at point A and deliver directly to point B with no stops in between. This helps all of our clients who have need of time sensitive deliveries and can't wait for their packages.

Medical Courier Service:
Many of our clients require STAT, routine, pharmaceutical, medical goods, or specimen delivery. Rest assured that all of your medical goods and supplies will be delivered on time and in the proper white glove manner, while always having a chain of custody on said products.

Legal Courier Service:
Our company also employs drivers who are specifically legal couriers and can file legal paperwork at the courts throughout the greater Phoenix area. We can also print and accept any legal paperwork that you would need to file and then return a certified copy to you that has been stamped by the clerk of courts.

Полный спектр услуг, оказываемый ИП «ТЭК Алатау Transport», включает:
•	транспортировка генеральных, крупногабаритных, опасных, акцизных и нестандартных грузов из/в стран(ы) СНГ, Европы, Средней Азии, Китая
•	транспортировка генеральных, крупногабаритных, опасных, акцизных и нестандартных грузов по территории Республики Казахстан
•	контейнерные перевозки из стран Америки, Европы, Юго-Восточной Азии и Китая. 
•	экспортно-импортные, транзитные перевозки грузов железнодорожным, автомобильным, авиационным и морским транспортом
•	консолидация и хранение сборных грузов на складах стран Таможенного союза и Европы
•	обеспечение таможенного сопровождения грузов 
•	таможенная очистка грузов в Республике Казахстан
•	пассажирские перевозки по РК
•	страхование рисков

	Основной принцип нашей  компании – максимальный учет интересов заказчика, сочетающийся с гибкой политикой цен, формой оплаты, с надежным и оперативным оказанием полного комплекса услуг по транспортировке груза.

Name: ØSTKRAN AS
Description:
Østkran AS har vært en garantist for sikkerhet og presisjon i over 20 år. Vår moderne bilpark løser de fleste løfte og transportoppgaver. Sammen med tett oppfølgning og kunnskap sørger vi for løsninger som er tilpasset kunden sine behov.

Forløperen til Østkran AS ble startet i 1998 av Thomas Fredriksen. Med bare en kranbil utførte han all slags løfte- og transportoppdrag i Østlandsområdet. I 2005 etablerte Thomas Øst Kran & Transport AS. Samtidig som han kjøpte inn flere kranbiler, kjørte han for det meste for TAB (transportsentralen Asker og Bærum), og Bautas (som i dag er Ramirent). Firmaet hadde en jevn vekst, kundene ble flere og jobbene mer krevende i årene som fulgte. For å bli bedre rustet i kampen om større og mer krevende oppdrag utvidet han tjenestetilbudet til også å omfatte transport av maskiner, brakker og rigging av moduler. 
I 2017 fusjonerte Øst Kran & Transport AS med Veikran AS, og endret navn til Østkran AS. 

Med kunnskapsrike og erfarne folk ved roret har vi videreført og spesialisert våre aktiviteter innenfor de samme tjenesteområdene. 

Kravene fra våre kunder er i konstant endring, og det er nødvendig med en stor grad av fleksibilitet og streben etter innovative løsninger i måten vi utfører våre tjenester på. Det er særlig dette vi har lykkes med.

Det er flere grunner til at vi har lykkes:

Et godt arbeidsmiljø og trivsel er avgjørende for hvordan enhver bedrift leverer til kundene. Derfor er det like viktig for oss å ha gode rutiner for hvordan vi utfører våre oppdrag. Med HMS i høysete leverer vi punktlige, pålitelige og sikre løsninger som er tilpasset kundene sine behov.

Ønsker du mer informasjon eller om du vil ha et uforpliktende tilbud, er det bare å ta kontakt med oss. Vi tilbyr et pålitelig og gjensidig lønnsomt kundeforhold. Og garanterer levering av alle våre oppdrag til avtalt tid og alltid til konkurransedyktige priser!

At CourieMate, we specialize in providing seamless and efficient fulfillment services tailored to the unique needs of e-commerce providers across Uganda and Tanzania. What sets CourieMate apart is our deep understanding of the local market in Uganda and Tanzania. Our team of logistics experts knows the terrain, infrastructure, and specific needs of businesses operating in these regions. This local expertise, combined with our dedication to innovation, enables us to offer a service that is both tailored and scalable. Whether you are a small business looking to streamline your operations or a larger e-commerce platform seeking to optimize delivery performance, CourieMate is your trusted partner.

Our mission is to help e-commerce businesses thrive by reducing delivery times, minimizing costs, and enhancing the overall customer experience. We believe that efficient logistics is the backbone of successful online retail, and we’re here to ensure that your products reach your customers quickly and securely, every time.

Join us at CourieMate as we continue to revolutionize last mile delivery in East Africa, driving growth and supporting the region's thriving e-commerce industry.
