Name: Fietskoeriers Apeldoorn
Description:
Fietskoeriers Apeldoorn, de naam geeft al weg waar we goed in zijn; namelijk: Fietsen en koerierswerk.
We bezorgen post en pakket op de meest milieuvriendelijke wijze, namelijk per fiets.

Met ons sportieve team van 7 fietskoeriers weten we altijd en overal de snelste weg. Omdat we alles op de fiets bezorgen hebben we geen hoge kosten zoals een dure verzekering, duur onderhoud of brandstof.
Hierdoor kunnen wij onze diensten lekker goedkoop aanbieden. Dat is niet alleen goed voor uw portemonnee, maar ook nog eens veel beter voor het milieu.

Elke rit die wij rijden scheelt weer een auto op de weg. En laat dat nou net een van onze speerpunten zijn. Minder auto's (en dus meer fietsers) in de stad!
Dit creëert een schonere leefomgeving, een beter straatbeeld en gezondere inwoners.

Op dit moment bieden wij maatwerk voor meer dan 30 bedrijven in Apeldoorn. Wij fietsen voor grote bedrijven en instellingen zoals: Bam Techniek, Accres en ZOA. Ook de retail, slagers en apothekers maken gebruik van onze diensten om snel en betrouwbaar een pakket bezorgd te hebben.

Of het nou een spoedpakket is die binnen 60 minuten binnen Apeldoorn bezorgd moet worden, een vaste zending is, of bijvoorbeeld de Haal-en Brengservice is... Fietskoeriers Apeldoorn bezorgt uw zending op betrouwbare, snelle en milieuvriendelijke wijze.

Name: Drop Ship Logistics
Description:
Drop Ship Logistics was developed exclusively for the direct mail industry to simplify the logistics of drop shipping direct mail to US Post Offices.  The proprietary system provides transportation quotes and analysis, schedules pick ups, processes payments, and updates shipment status automatically.

Drop Ship Logistics has embraced a work-sharing program that the USPS launched in 1991.  The operational concept, perfected over a 10-year period, has met today's technology and has developed into what is now available to you.

Drop Shipping or Zone Skipping is available to U.S. Mailers preparing Standard business mail.  A significant postage savings is realized when a prepared mailing is delivered to the Destination Post Office.  Once the mail arrives at the Post Office, it is processed and delivered to your customers.  The process of bypassing your local Post Office and the USPS transportation channels allows for a much quicker delivery of time-sensitive mailings.  Drop Shipping allows the opportunity to target in-home delivery dates more accurately. 

Destination Entry Discounts
Destination NDC (BMC):	  $0.033/piece  ($33/1,000 pieces)	 
Destination SCF:	  $0.043/piece  ($43/1,000 pieces)	 
Destination DDU:	  Delivery and Every Door Direct Mail (EDDM) service available

Name: FLS FREIGHT & LOGISTIC SERVICES
Description:
Somos un agente de cargas internacional, proveedor de logística integral y miembro IATA localizado en Uruguay, fundado en el año 2001.
Con más de 21 años presentes en el mercado Uruguayo, hemos conseguido la confianza de nuestros clientes, el apoyo de nuestros proveedores y el respeto en el rubro por nuestro profesionalismo en el manejo de todo tipo de mercaderías.
Gracias a contar con un equipo de trabajo heterogéneo formado por profesionales con trayectoria en el rubro y amplia experiencia en el sector de servicios, al igual que por jóvenes dinámicos y con vocación por el servicio, alcanzamos ser uno de los líderes en el sector en el país.
Especializados particularmente en el manejo de cargas perecibles y peligrosas por vía aérea, marítima o carretera, somos responsables de las exportaciones del caviar Uruguayo al mundo, trabajamos para toda la industria frigorifica ademas de productos químicos para empresas de gran renombre entre otros, aconsejándolos en cada paso de la cadena logística.

Misión
Ofrecer un rango completo de servicios de logística de exportación e importación por aire, océano (FCL&LCL) y tierra .
Brindar a nuestros clientes nos solo el transporte internacional, sino el asesoramiento sobre el manejo de las cargas, la documentación de transporte, el despacho de aduana, la utilización de los depósitos, zonas francas y el transporte local. Asimismo procuramos ofrecer un servicio integral de logística internacional a cada cliente, acompañándolo en toda la cadena logística o solo en las partes de la cadena que el cliente lo requiera.
Nuestro sello distintivo es atender las necesidades de nuestros clientes, dándoles seguimiento y asistencia. Basados en nuestra experticia y comunicación con el cliente, nos intentamos anticipar a sus requerimientos, creando las sinergias apropiadas para prevenir los problemas o solucionarlos con la máxima seriedad, costos competitivos y mejores garantías en cada una de sus actividades.

 Un transport responsable :
Nous optimisons nos trajets pour limiter les kilomètres à vide, réduisant ainsi notre impact en CO₂.

 Nos valeurs :
 Réactivité : Chargement rapide et délais maîtrisés.

 Transparence : Un service premium avec un accompagnement personnalisé.

Name: DS Cargo
Description:
DS CARGO surge como Freight Forwarder con una gran perspectiva de crecimiento y potencial, apoyado en DESEX SRL, una empresa de Despachantes de Aduana con más de 30 años de presencia en el mercado y una amplia variedad de oferta de servicios de comercio exterior. A la fecha, contamos con atención a empresas internacionales de primera categoría, así como también a  pequeñas y medianas empresas. 
Nuestra política se basa en ofrecer respuestas integrales en todas las áreas del comercio exterior y brindar una atención personalizada y a la medida de la necesidad de cada cliente. 
Nuestra fortaleza radica en un amplio conocimiento en legislación y materia aduanera, además de una  capacidad operativa óptima en todas las aduanas, terminales portuarias y depósitos fiscales, ya que contamos con corresponsalías en las aduanas de todo el país y oficinas propias en la provincia de San Juan. 
Nuestras soluciones no se limitan sólo al despacho de la mercadería o a la contratación de un flete, ya que nos ocupamos de la carga desde el momento de partida en su punto de entrega en origen hasta la liberación y posterior entrega de la misma en su país de destino. 

Además, nos especializamos en exportación de Mercancías Peligrosas o Carga IMO, ya que somos operadores con firma habilitada ante Prefectura Naval Argentina y poseemos una amplia experiencia en exportación de mercaderías peligrosas: realizamos toda la gestión ante P.N.A. y nos ocupamos de la puesta a bordo carga IMO, con especialización en isotanques de industria química. 
Nuestra visión como DS CARGO es marcar la diferencia y distinguirnos en materia de comercio exterior ofreciendo un servicio integral y de excelencia.
Nuestra misión es brindar un conocimiento íntegro en materia y operativa aduanera, con el respaldo y garantía de Desex SRL como backup company, y la capacidad de poder adaptarnos tanto a las demandas de empresas multinacionales como a aquellas medianas y jóvenes que buscan un espacio en comercio exterior.

Name: Marsan Logistica SRL
Description:
Marsan es una empresa joven con más de 80 camionetas a su disposición, dedicada a brindar logística y distribución de paquetería proveniente de Mercado Libre o bien, de ventas a granel de aquellas empresas que estén interesadas en el servicio. Abarcamos todas las zonas: Caba Norte Sur y Oeste.
Al encontrarnos en pleno proceso de expansión y adaptación a los nuevos escenarios que el mundo presenta, nos resulta interesante contarles que actualmente nos estamos encargando de la distribución de Envíos Flex, que entendemos que es un sistema muy útil para aumentar la rentabilidad de tu negocio/empresa/local y satisfacer la necesidad principal del cliente: tener su producto en el día.
Como tambien nos ha ocurrido que hay empresas y locales que no lo tienen activado le damos la misma opción de precios! con los mismos beneficios.

¿En qué consiste?
Nuestra forma de trabajo consiste en retirar aquellos paquetes que nuestros clientes venden a través de Mercado Libre, otorgándoles la opción de extender el horario de ventas hasta las 13;30 hs. Luego destinamos una camioneta para ir a retirar los mismos a su local par luego llevarlos a nuestro depósito con el fin de distribuir a los choferes las zonas que deben entregar los mismos. Esto permite tener una planificacion y organizacion certera de entregar los productos en tiempo y forma.

Name: Kango Express Inc.
Description:
Kango Express launched in the summer of 2015 and offers customers worldwide a new and exciting option for shipping packages to themselves, friends, and family.  Customers can shop online in the U.S., U.K., Korea, Hong Kong, Japan and direct their packages to our local warehouse, where our staff will perform free resizing to reduce each package's overall size and cost.  Kango Express offers its customers an expedited shipping option directly to their home/office or a more economical consolidation shipping option where their packages can be picked up at our local Kango office.  Throughout the shipping process, customers can count on the support of a team dedicated to making their shopping and shipping experience second to none.

As a company, Kango Express values excellent customer service, financial responsibility, integrity, respect, and community involvement.  Our ownership and management have been involved in the international package forwarding business for over 15 years.

Currently, Kango is looking for franchise partners to open local Kango offices worldwide.  If you are interested and would like more information, please contact us at info@kangoexpress.com

Name: Cargobus
Description:
The best freight frequency in Estonia!
Reliable parcel delivery on buses for over 30 years!

Cargobus, the oldest company of the Mootor Grupp, was established in December 1991 and started its operations in March 1992. Cargobus is the oldest privately held parcel transport company operating in the Estonian market.

As part of a large group that is a leader and trendsetter in the transport sector, we have the best knowledge to provide the service, synergy between different companies in the group and modern IT solutions.

Our parcel delivery is unique because we use a network of buses, terminals, parcel points and, if necessary, couriers and vans to deliver shipments.

Freight transport in regular buses, ie sending a parcel with a bus driver, works on the principle of transport sharing. In Estonia, this allows shipments to be delivered within a few hours, offering the best possible freight frequency and price. The use of regular buses also helps us to leave a smaller ecological footprint.

The parcel is sent from Tallinn to Tartu at least 12 times a day, from Tallinn to Pärnu at least 9 times a day and from Tallinn to Narva at least 6 times a day. We cooperate with about 20 bus companies and use up to 600 bus lines for freight transport every day. We have 13 terminals and several parcel points all over Estonia, in addition to terminals in Latvia and Lithuania.

To make sending a parcel and tracking a shipment even easier, we offer a web-based shipping and tracking system.

Fast since 1992

Taipak Enterprises Ltd. was established in 2003. For over a decade, we have been helping our customers with their flexible packaging needs. Our goal has always been to take the time to truly understand the customers’ needs today and anticipate future growth.

Strengthening TricorBraun’s Flexibles Offering
Taipak and Pacific Bag will be combined to create TricorBraun Flex and will continue to operate out of existing locations in Vancouver, Seattle, Calgary, Toronto, and Philadelphia.

“By combining Pacific Bag and Taipak’s flexibles expertise, paired with TricorBraun’s capabilities and resources, we can provide exceptional products and services based on our customers’ evolving packaging needs,” said Carruthers.

TricorBraun acquired Taipak in 2017, representing the company’s first move into flexible packaging in its 117-year history.

“Taipak was an important milestone for our business and in the 13 months since, the team has integrated seamlessly, delivering exceptional solutions for our customers, and continued their history of strong growth,” said Carruthers.

“This past year with TricorBraun has been exceptional,” said Joey Lin, Taipak’s founder and general manager. “We’ve been able to continue to grow our business while upholding our ‘get it done’ approach. Our Taipak team is excited to work with Pacific Bag and provide our customers with flexible packaging services unmatched in the industry.”

Новый терминал – совместный проект М.В. Карго с крупнейшей американской корпорацией Cargill. Общая стоимость проекта составит $150 млн. Это – один из самых больших инвестиционных проектов, реализуемых в Украине в последние годы. В строительстве участвуют ЕБРР и МФК – общая сумма кредита от этих организаций составит $74 млн.

Успешная реализация проекта такого уровня наверняка станет хорошим сигналом и для других крупных инвесторов, рассматривающих возможности работы в Украине.

Новый терминал сможет обеспечивать более 10% экспорта украинских зерновых в год. Работа терминала будет приносить государству как минимум 600 млн гривен в год. На терминале будет создано более 500 рабочих мест.

Запуск терминала запланирован на март 2018 года.

Name: Yellow Squad Inc
Description:
Yellow Squad Inc. is a family-oriented transportation company with deep roots in logistics and over 34 years of experience keeping wheels on the road and goods in motion. Our journey began in Spain, where we proudly served businesses across Spain and neighboring countries. In 2009, we moved into Canada, starting as an owner-operator with Bison Transport, building a strong reputation for reliability and dedication.

In 2019, we transitioned into the Last Mile delivery sector, partnering with brands like IKEA, Peloton, Tonal, and local furniture retailers. This experience sharpened not only our delivery operations but also our commitment to customer satisfaction, ensuring every product arrives safely and every client feels supported.

By 2025, we took the next step forward, obtaining our DOT and MC authority to offer B2B freight and expedite package delivery solutions. Today, Yellow Squad Inc. provides businesses with an all-in-one logistics partner—from last mile delivery to freight solutions—designed to simplify operations and add value at every stage of the supply chain.

Our mission is clear: to become one of the most reliable transportation companies for medium-sized businesses, while steadily expanding our capacity to serve larger enterprises as we grow. At Yellow Squad Inc., reliability, family values, and customer care are at the core of everything we deliver.

Name: TransporConnect
Description:
TransporConnect, c'est une passerelle numérique entre transporteurs et expéditeurs sur les corridors Djibouti-Éthiopie et à l'intérieur du pays (Djibouti). Avec TransporConnect, simplifiez vos opérations logistiques en vous permettant de gérer tous vos transports des marchandises en quelques clics, de la recherche de transporteurs à la gestion des paiements. 

TransporConnect, c’est une startup qui va révolutionner le paysage logistique en tant que première plateforme digitale spécialisée dans la mise en relation entre les transporteurs et les expéditeurs. Notre plateforme offre un processus fluide de réservation en ligne, simplifiant le parcours de nos utilisateurs, de la demande ou l’offre des services à la gestion des paiements en garantissant la sécurité des transactions. 

Faciliter le commerce dans le continent africain en éliminant les barrières logistiques qui font face au transport routier de marchandises est notre mission, car beaucoup des pays sont enclavés et en Afrique le délai des livraisons est deux fois plus longue que la moyenne mondiale comme c’est un secteur fragmenté et qui utilise des outils obsolètes. Chez TransporConnect, nous croyons en la puissance de la connectivité pour réduire les tracas et les retards.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette révolution logistique !

A empresa oferece soluções de logística integrada, flexíveis e customizadas para todos os clientes, aproveitando sua localização próxima ao Porto de Santos e às principais rodovias de São Paulo. Essa posição favorece as operações de transporte rodoviário, importação e exportação de produtos.

A Torina Logística se compromete com o bem-estar de seus colaboradores, clientes e da comunidade, buscando melhorias contínuas através do uso de ferramentas de gestão e tecnologia, com ética e responsabilidade.

MISSÃO
 
Fornecer soluções logísticas integradas personalizadas, com alta qualidade, pontualidade e eficiência, garantindo a satisfação total dos nossos clientes e parceiros de negócios.
  
VISÃO
 
Ser reconhecido como líder no setor logístico, oferecendo soluções inovadoras e de excelência que impulsionam o crescimento dos nossos clientes, através de nossos processos, tecnologias e expertise, buscando a máxima eficiência e satisfação em todas as etapas da cadeia de suprimentos.
  
VALORES
 
Excelência
Confiança
Inovação
Responsabilidade Socioambiental
Colaboração

Founded in 2011 in Curitiba, its cyclists have already cycled the equivalent of more than 20 laps around the world in deliveries, avoiding more than 17 tons of carbon dioxide in the atmosphere. In 2012, it was elected one of the three most sustainable organizations in the country by the Greenbest Award 2012. In 2013, it started its franchise process and, in 2016, it was the first bike delivery company to have its own delivery APP. Today, we are the largest sustainable delivery company in Brazil, present in cities in the South, Southeast and Midwest of the country.

The EcoBike Courier is the best solution to replace motorcycle couriers in large urban centers. Bikers are more agile, pass silently by your side and deliver safely and without polluting the environment, making fast deliveries with uniformed cyclists who serve customers with a smile on their face.

Name: Icelogistic
Description:
Icelogistic is a Polish transport and logistics company specializing in international refrigerated and temperature-controlled transport (LTL and FTL). We operate our own cross-docking centers in Poland and Greece.
For over 10 years, we have been supporting manufacturers, distributors, and retail chains in the efficient and safe flow of goods across Europe.

We operate a modern fleet of over 40 refrigerated Renault/DAF & Schmitz combinations, compliant with GDP, ATP/FRC, and Euro 6 standards, as well as a network of over 200 trusted contract carriers.
Each trailer is thermally mapped, calibrated (±0.5°C), and equipped with a telematics monitoring system and real-time temperature recording, ensuring full control over the cargo and compliance with the highest quality standards.

Our specialization covers the food, FMCG, and pharmaceutical sectors, where precision, punctuality, and safety are paramount.
We handle full and partial truckload shipments across Southern and Central Europe.
Our key routes include: Hungary, Bulgaria, Romania, Greece and its islands, as well as Serbia, North Macedonia, Albania, Turkey, and other EU countries.

We are distinguished by safety, flexibility, and a partnership approach.
Our vehicles are true mobile safes—equipped with Carrier refrigeration systems, anti-robbery protections, and TAPA-compliant solutions.

At Icelogistic, we combine modern technology with human responsibility.
Our experienced team ensures punctuality, transparency, and the highest quality of service.
We believe that trust, innovation, and professionalism are the foundation of long-lasting cooperation.

Name: Regresos.com
Description:
Envía fácil y más barato tus cargas a todo México. Aprovecha nuestra plataforma y sácale provecho a los regresos vacíos.

Misión

Impulsar la eficiencia del sector transporte de los países en los que operamos; proporcionando a nuestra comunidad de usuarios una plataforma de conexión inteligente, práctica y funcional. Y así colaborar en la conformación de una industria rentable y sustentable.

Perfil de la empresa

Somos una plataforma web que conecta personas y empresas que desean enviar mercancías con camiones que, luego de haber realizado un flete, regresan vacíos a su lugar de origen. De ahí nuestro nombre.

A través de Regresos.com se aminora el impacto de mover camiones vacíos y colaboramos para tener un mundo mejor al:

- Reducir las emisiones de CO2 al medio ambiente.
- Disminuir los riesgos de accidentes viales.
- Ayudar a los transportistas a optimizar sus viajes.
- Favorecer la competitividad de las PYMES y personas que requieren enviar carga al obtener mejores precios para sus fletes.

En suma, somos la solución de envíos que nos beneficia a todos.

Descripción

En esta página queremos compartir contigo información referente al autotransporte de carga, además de oportunidades de cargas y regresos vacíos para que ahorres y saques más provecho de nuestro sitio.Mont

Maybe that’s why we racked up so many wins during our time at Amazon:

• Best delivery performance score (Fantastic Plus) 30 weeks in a row.
• DSP of the month, Safety Award and On Time Dispatch
• Multiple driver of the month wins for our drivers.

We specialize in same-day, door to door delivery in the Southern California region including Los Angeles, Orange, Riverside, San Bernardino and San Diego counties. If you’re shipping a perishable food gift box, subscription box, or healthcare package, it needs to arrive today – and Monarch Delivers can make that happen.

Our services include:

• Last Mile Delivery and STAT Courier Services
• Dock-high and grade level doors for shipping and receiving
• Container unloading and cross dock services
• Kitting / Assembly
• Ecommerce order consolidation

Want to join our fast-paced last mile delivery team? We’re also hiring! Visit us at monarchdelivers.com to learn more and apply.

Name: FORWRD - Truck & Load Booking App
Description:
FORWRD is India’s fastest-growing zero-commission digital freight & fleet platform, built to empower transporters, brokers, and fleet owners. We digitize the way you already work—without disrupting your trusted relationships.

In India’s transport industry, trust is everything. That’s why FORWRD is designed around the Private Network Advantage. Instead of exposing your sensitive business details to the open market, you can first share requirements privately with your daily contacts. This keeps rates, loading/unloading points, and other critical details secure, while ensuring your partners get the first opportunity to respond.

And when your private circle can’t fulfill a requirement, simply expand to our wider KYC-verified, Pan-India network. This dual approach helps you cut down empty returns, reduce stress, and save countless hours of phone calls.

What makes FORWRD different?
 Zero Commission: Keep 100% of your profits.
 Private + Open Market Access: Work with trusted partners or expand instantly.
 Verified Users: Every member is KYC-verified, reducing fraud and fake deals.
 Pan-India Reach: Access transporters, brokers, and fleets across every major route.
 Direct, Real-Time Matching: Post loads, find trucks, negotiate rates, and finalize deals in minutes.

Our mission is to build India’s most trusted digital transport community—a platform that protects the livelihoods of transporters, booking agents, and fleet owners while enabling them to grow profitably in a competitive market.

Whether you’re a truck owner looking to reduce empty trips, a broker managing trusted partners, or a booking agent seeking cost efficiency, FORWRD puts your business, privacy, and peace of mind first.

 Ready to grow your transport business?
 Download FORWRD today: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=app.forwrd.main

Name: Radboten
Description:
Wir gestalten City-Logistik neu! Ob taggleich als Same-Day Delivery oder als Express-Zustellung innerhalb von 30 Minuten, wir haben die Antwort auf die steigende Nachfrage nach einer zuverlässigen und umweltfreundlichen Zustellung auf der "letzten Meile." 

Stau zur "Rush Hour?" Fahrverbote? Sperrzeiten für den motorisierten Lieferverkehr und dabei noch die versprochenen Laufzeiten einhalten? Eine fast unmögliche Aufgabe für einen innerstädtischen Lieferdienst, aber nicht für uns! 

Durch den Einsatz von  Fahrradkurier*innen kommen wir immer zügig und zielsicher durch den dichten Stadtverkehr und fahren einfach am Stau vorbei. Damit tragen wir nicht nur einen wichtigen Teil zu einer dringend notwendigen Verkehrswende bei, sondern schonen dabei auch noch die Umwelt: Wir liefern garantiert emissionsfrei aus.

Mit einer unkomplizierten und flexiblen Auftrags-  abwicklung sowie der digitalen Sendungserfassung und einer GPS-gestützten Sendungsverfolgung bieten wir vollkommene Transparenz bei fairen Preisen und schaffen somit einen Mehrwert für Würzburg!

Soll's doch etwas mehr sein? Kein Probelm! Mit speziellen Lastenrädern und je nach Anforderung auch im Gespann mit Schwerlastanhängern, haben wir Zuladungskapazitäten von bis zu 250 kg.

Description:
Créée en 2010 en collaboration avec trois laboratoires spécialisés dans la prothèse dentaire, ADN Transport est votre partenaire pour toute demande de livraison dans les Pays de la Loire et en Bretagne. Depuis, notre structure a su évoluer pour grandir et s’adapter aux contraintes du marché, en mettant toujours un point d’honneur sur la qualité et la précision de notre travail et accompagne de nombreux secteurs d’activité :

- Secteur santé
- Secteur tertiaire
- Livraison et transport de colis divers

Aujourd’hui, ADN Transport répond aux besoins de plus de 1000 clients par jour en constante évolution. Notre portefeuille client ne cesse de grandir en même temps que notre entreprise, nous permettant de développer notre activité et de créer de nouvelles branches professionnelles.

Habituée aux demandes en urgence, notre équipe responsable formée au bons usages est en mesure de vous proposer un service de messagerie express et de maîtriser les flux tendus pour des livraisons au délai extrêmement court de 12 à 24h selon la nature de la demande.

Name: CRAFTER TRANSPORT & LOGISTICS
Description:
Грузоперевозки по России - одно из приоритетных направлений деятельности транспортно-экспедиционной компании «КРАФТЕР». Благодаря собственному автопарку, обширной филиальной сети и отработанной схеме взаимодействия с автоперевозчиками сотрудники компании готовы предоставить грузовой автотранспорт любой грузоподъёмности для перевозки всех возможных грузов по России.
 
Обширная территория нашей страны в совокупности с динамично развивающимися рынками навязывают современному бизнесу правила и время доставки грузов. Вследствие чего становятся актуальными автоперевозки по России. Важным является не только стоимость доставки груза, но и выполнение её точно в срок. Для решения этих задач вы можете обратиться к транспортно-экспедиционной компании «КРАФТЕР», зарекомендовавшей себя ответственным поставщиком логистических услуг.
 
Для выполнения грузоперевозок по России используются тентованные грузовики, изотермические полуприцепы, цистерны для перевозки наливных грузов, малотоннажный и специализированный автотранспорт.
 
Наши основные виды грузоперевозок по России:
 
Малотоннажные перевозки
Грузовые перевозки с/х продукции
Перевозка наливных грузов
Перевозка опасных грузов
Услуги спецтехники

Name: MAIL EXPRESS POSTE PRIVATE SRL
Description:
Mail Express Poste Private è il primo network postale in franchising nato come valida alternativa a Poste Italiane. Era il 1997 quando l’imprenditore Bachisio Ledda presentò per la prima volta un’idea rivoluzionaria alla fiera del franchising di Milano. Quell'idea nel tempo è diventa una rete strutturata di 300 punti vendita in franchising, in grado di offrire servizi postali innovativi, flessibili, caratterizzati da una tempistica definita e da un costo contenuto. Dall’invio di raccomandate alla posta massiva, fino ai servizi complementari di lettershop ( stampa, piega, imbustamento, ecc.) Mail Express Poste Private è “l’ufficio postale” in outsourcing per l’esigenza di un target differenziato.

L’offerta di servizi postali tecnologicamente avanzati e qualitativamente elevati hanno consentito a Mail Express Poste Private di ottenere da settembre 2007 la certificazione di qualità ISO 9001, grazie al controllo costante di tutti i processi e delle possibili criticità.

Nel 2015 Mail Express Poste Private ha inoltre conseguito la certificazione ISO 27001 per garantire la sicurezza nella tecnologia dell'informazione e assicurarne l’integrità, la riservatezza e la disponibilità.

Not all teams are created equally. In college athletics, Division 1 teams are the elite leaders; talent and competition merging to create top-tier athletes, professionals in their sport. That holds true for Division 1 Movers. We are constantly raising the bar beyond the industry standards. Just like Division 1 athletes, our team trains hard, works harder, and keeps moving forward.

Division 1 Moving & Storage was established in 2017 by Jake Harrison and Alec Vozenilek after seeing a unique opportunity to fill a gap in the industry. After Jake’s personal experience of growing up in multiple neighborhoods in the greater DC Metro Area, he noticed the stress that often comes along with moving. Figuring that his genuine care for people and dedication to quality services would provide customers peace of mind, and following in his cousin Alec's footsteps (the owner of D1 Moving in Richmond, VA) he decided to open Division 1 Moving & Storage.

What started with a pickup truck and trailer hitch has steadily grown into a four truck fleet, 10 full-time employees, and a climate-controlled warehouse. Our DC Metro-based service area can deliver anywhere in the continental United States.

Airfreight: When speed is crucial, our airfreight services ensure your cargo reaches its destination quickly and reliably.
Why Choose Rapid Cargo UK Ltd?

Global Network: With a robust network of experienced agents in over 83 countries, we have the reach and expertise to handle your logistics needs worldwide.

We leverage the latest technology and industry best practices to deliver exceptional results every time.

Hep bir adım ilerisini düşleyerek hep daha iyi ve ileriye

Experience a new level of efficiency and accuracy with our truck dispatch services today."

The specialty of Truckage Dispatch Services for carriers is maximizing profitability and streamlining operations. Through effective load matching and route optimization, truck dispatching companies help carriers to maximize the utilization of their assets and reduce downtime. By providing real-time updates and communication, truck dispatching services ensure that carriers are aware of their shipments at all times and can quickly adapt to changes in the market. The use of advanced technology also helps to minimize the risk of lost or damaged shipments, protecting carriers' reputation and bottom line. With a focus on safety and compliance, truck dispatching services provide carriers with peace of mind, allowing them to focus on what they do best - hauling freight.

Along with our worldwide network of agents, we provide fully integrated global logistics solutions and services including customs brokerage, warehousing, distribution and inventory management. Name: Группа компаний НефтеТрансСервис
Description:
«НефтеТрансСервис»  - входит в четверку крупнейших операторов подвижного состава в России. В управлении компании находится более 17 000 нефтебензиновых цистерн и более 37 000 универсальных полувагонов. Ежемесячно парк НТС перевозит более 8 млн. тонн различных грузов по всей территории России, СНГ и стран Балтии. 
Компания начала свою историю в  2006 году, парк НТС насчитывал тогда всего 400 цистерн. Первые контракты были заключены на перевозку светлых нефтепродуктов с ОАО «Роснефть». В условиях молодого, быстро растущего операторского рынка команда НТС в течении первых пяти лет смогла прочно занять место среди лидеров бизнеса. Опыт подобного взрывного роста на сегодняшний день является уникальным в среде грузовых железнодорожных перевозок. За указанный отрезок времени Компания нарастила парк до 15 000 нефтебензиновых цистерн и 20 000 полувагонов. В 2008 г. Компания приобрела имущественный комплекс Смышляевского вагоноремонтного завода, в 2009 заключила договор долгосрочной аренды с ОАО «РЖД» на промывочно – пропарочный комплекс «Дземги» в Хабаровском крае, в 2011 г – договор аренды на промывочно-пропарочную станцию «Нефтяная».
Группа «Нефтетранссервис» известна сегодня на рынке как одна из самых эффективных и высоко технологичных. География деятельности охватывает все регионы России, сеть филиалов включает в себя 29 региональных представительств. Всего в Компании трудится более 1200 человек.

Terry Stumpff’s first contract was delivering mail to 50 local residences in the Rustling Pines sub-division in Midway, Florida. Terry’s business then grew throughout the Panhandle of Florida.

January 2, 2011, TNStumpff Enterprises ventured outside the state of Florida to begin a new USPS Contract Delivery Service (CDS) box delivery route in Alabama. Since that time, TNStumpff Enterprises has grown to be one of the nation’s largest Contract Delivery Service Providers for the United States Postal Service. In February 2013, the business had grown to over 45 USPS contracts nationwide.

On August 5, 2008, TNStumpff Enterprises was honored in recognition of the exemplary service provided to the United States Postal Service with the Eagle Spirit Award. This award is for consistently demonstrating the quality, dedication, leadership, and the spirit embodied by the image of the American Eagle, the namesake of the award.

In providing continuous excellence in service, TNStumpff Enterprises was awarded the Eagle Spirit Award for the second time on August 7, 2012.

Terry truly believes that the employees are the ones who deserve all the accolades and the awards for the service they provide to their customers. The employees are the ones who deliver the mail in a professional, timely, accurate manner, in all types of weather. We make every effort to attract and retain only the finest carriers in the industry.

Description:
Welcome to DGP, your trusted partner in dangerous goods transportation. As a second-generation family business, we have been leaders in providing consulting and packaging services to untrained individuals since 1985.
At DGP, we understand the critical importance of staying ahead of the curve in an industry where transportation regulations for dangerous goods are constantly evolving. That’s why our team of TDG, IATA, and IMDG consultants are rigorously trained and kept updated with the latest regulations and best practices.

Our journey began with a simple mission: to provide specialized services for shippers and freight forwarders dealing with time-sensitive dangerous goods products. We recognize the frustrations and challenges that can arise from shipment delays due to improper packaging or documentation. Hence, our commitment is to alleviate those concerns and ensure the quickest and safest transport of your items by all modes of transport.

Safety and compliance are our paramount concerns. With our dedicated hazmat specialists and consultants, you can trust us to handle your hazardous goods with the utmost care, attention to detail, and urgency. Whether it’s ensuring proper packaging, documentation, or navigating complex regulatory requirements, we are here to provide the expertise you need.

At DGP, exceptional customer service is at the heart of everything we do. We are dedicated to delivering personalized solutions tailored to your specific needs, backed by years of experience and a deep understanding of the dangerous goods industry.

Description:
Az Eurasia Logistics Kft. Japán legnagyobb kereskedelmi cégei közül – SOGO SHOSHA – az Itochu Corporation egyik leányvállalata, melyet 1992-ben Magyarországon alapítottak. Cégünk alapítása óta nyújtunk teljes körű logisztikai szolgáltatásokat, főként Közép illetve Kelet-Európai partnereinknek, úgymint nemzetközi árufuvarozás, vámkezelés, raktározás.

Célunk, hogy üzletfeleink igényeit a legmagasabb színvonalon szolgáljuk ki, szem előtt tartva a 3 kulcsfontosságú alapelvet és az 5 vállalati értéket.

Alapelveink:

1. biztonság, 2. hatékonyság, 3. stabilitás.

 

Felhasználva a több mint 25 éves tapasztalatunkat, melyet a Közép illetve Kelet-Európai megrendelőinkkel történő együttműködés során szereztünk, japán vállalatként mindenre kiterjedő, precíz szolgáltatást tudunk nyújtani partnereinknek.

Továbbá felhasználva az Itochu Corporation által a világban kialakított kereskedelmi kapcsolatokat, nemcsak Közép illetve Kelet-Európai partnereinknek, hanem más országokban is a legmagasabb színvonalon nyújtunk logisztikai szolgáltatásokat. Különös erősségünk a door-to-door szolgáltatás koordinálása Japánban, Kínában, Indiában, Délkelet-Ázsiában és Európa országaiban.

Az Eurasia Logistics Kft. a jövőben is legmagasabb színvonalon szolgálja ki jelenlegi és jövőbeni partnerei igényeit.

Name: ARP LOGISTICA CLINICA SL

We are based in Madrid, Barcelona, Pamplona, Vigo, Valencia and Seville. This allows us to reach any point in Spain in the shortest possible time thanks to our routes.

Name: Transporte y Manejo de Carga de Guatemala
Description:
Somos una empresa guatemalteca líder en soluciones de transporte y manejo de carga, comprometida con ofrecer eficiencia, seguridad y excelencia operativa en cada envío. Ubicados en Guatemala, atendemos rutas nacionales e internacionales con el respaldo de un equipo profesional y una flota moderna.

Nuestra propuesta de valor:
Transporte de carga terrestre, adaptándonos a distintos tipos de mercancía.

Manejo integral de la cadena logística: recogida, consolidación, monitoreo en ruta, almacenamiento y entrega.

Alto estándar de servicio: operadores entrenados, seguimiento permanente, mantenimiento preventivo y cumplimiento de normativas.

Orientación al cliente: soluciones personalizadas, asesoría logística, visibilidad del proceso y cumplimiento de plazos.

Nuestra misión
Brindar soluciones de logística de transporte de carga confiables, seguras y puntuales en todo el territorio nacional e internacional, garantizando a nuestros clientes eficiencia, respaldo y un servicio personalizado que impulse el crecimiento de sus negocios.

Nuestra visión
Ser reconocidos como uno de los principales socios logísticos en transporte y manejo de carga en Guatemala y Centroamérica, distinguidos por la excelencia en el servicio, innovación en procesos y compromiso con la seguridad y sostenibilidad.

Por qué elegirnos

Cobertura amplia: rutas dentro de Guatemala y conexiones hacia y desde la región centroamericana.

Flota preparada: equipos especializados para distintos tipos de carga.

Remove uncertainty of delivery from your life and business!

Description: The world is going through a transitional period. Although it has been paralyzed by the coronavirus for some time, the situation is slowly returning to normal. When people are more inclined to shop online to protect themselves from Coronavirus infection, the product delivery companies are slowing to deliver on time or in the right way. Loss or damage to goods, late delivery, etc. have now become a daily occurrence. Besides, there is the problem of increasing the delivery charge. Small traders are facing more problems particularly. So to make product delivery easy, smooth, and flexible, we, team ParcelX, have taken the initiative to start work in Chattogram. We are "faster than you can imagine." Our goal is to gain the satisfaction and trust of sellers and buyers through fast product delivery in Chattogram city. Everything related to product delivery will be disinfected as part of extra precautions to avoid Coronavirus infection. We are at your service to make the delivery of goods easy, fast, reliable, and smooth with the utmost care in this city. If the product is cash on delivery, the money will reach the seller instantly by Bkash. We want to take the product delivery process of this city to a unique height. We will always be available on the phone, WhatsApp, Messenger.

Name: T.C.E. S.r.l.
Description:
La società T.C.E. Trasporti Commerciali Espressi S.r.l. è stata costituita nel lontano 1985, per volere della famiglia Baldoni.
Nel tempo ha maturato l’esperienza necessaria per offrire consulenza e progettazione nell'ambito del trasporto e della logistica alimentare. 
Il Gruppo T.C.E. con la propria esperienza, soprattutto nel campo della grande distribuzione organizzata, gestisce magazzini e piattaforme logistiche a temperatura controllata rispondenti alle più moderne esigenze per prodotti alimentari, surgelati, freschi, e non; tutto ciò coadiuvati anche da personale qualificato, di lunga esperienza, discrezione e serietà. 
Il parco automezzi di ultima generazione, che consta di cinquanta unità, è composto da camion con volumetrie e portate variabili, dotati di sponde idrauliche, paratie per la doppia temperatura e sistemi di localizzazione satellitare per monitorare in ogni momento la posizione del mezzo, la temperatura della merce e tutti i dati inerenti al viaggio per poter garantire la continuità della catena del freddo e la rintracciabilità di ogni singola spedizione.

La logistica integrata con la distribuzione è il nostro punto forte.

L’azienda, ubicata nella zona industriale di Casale sul Sile (TV), punto strategico e crocevia delle più importanti strade ed autostrade, in un'area di 10.000 mq dove sorgono magazzini e celle frigorifere a temperatura controllata per lo stoccaggio delle merci, dispone di un distributore di carburante e di un autolavaggio per la pulizia e la sanificazione degli automezzi, servizio che viene effettuato dopo ogni viaggio e nel rispetto delle norme HACCP.
Sistema qualità certificato significa darsi degli obiettivi e pianificare come raggiungerli, focalizzando la propria attenzione verso il cliente e verso le sue esigenze. Il personale, altamente qualificato, viene preparato con degli specifici corsi di formazione.

Description:

Notre nouveau process avec une prise en charge des produits ayant un emballage fabricant mais pas de « suremballage d’expédition » associé à un contenant de regroupement spécifique aident nos e-commerçants qui veulent diminuer leur empreinte carbone, optimiser leurs coûts en réduisant les fournitures d’emballages et les volumes transportés, en gagnant du temps dans la préparation de leurs envois.

Cette solution permet d'instaurer un nouveau standard de réception sans « suremballage d’expédition » pour les e-acheteurs tout en leur garantissant la livraison en bon état, la confidentialité des produits commandés contrairement aux solutions existantes qui génèrent des tonnes de déchets d'emballage.

Description:
Kargotur, Nisan 2001 tarihinde İzmir'de kurularak faaliyetlerine başlamıştır. Portföyünü çok kısa zamanda genişleterek hizmet yelpazesini İstanbul, Ankara, Antalya ve Adana bölgelerine ulaştırmış ve ulaştırmaya da devam etmektedir.

Kargotur, genç, dinamik, atılımcı, ileriye dönük beyin takımının güç birliği yapmasıyla ortaya çıkan sinerjisini siz değerli müşterilerine kaliteli hizmet olarak sunmaktadır. Kargotur müşterilerini stratejik ortağı olarak görmektedir.

Kargotur, faaliyet gösterdiği sektörlerde birçok tanınmış ve sektöründe söz sahibi firmaya hizmet vermektedir. Yeniliklere açık, hizmetlerinde müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı kadroya sahip Kargotur gelişip büyüyen ve rakiplerinden önde giden bir firma olmaya devam etmektedir.

-----

Flexibel

Professioneel

Onze chauffeurs zijn voorzien van herkenbare bedrijfskleding en beschikken over diverse certificaten waaronder: GDP (Goede Distributie Praktijk) en VCA (Veiligheid Checklist Aannemers). Daarnaast worden zij regelmatig bijgeschoold om u optimaal van dienst te kunnen zijn. Onze chauffeurs zijn namelijk niet alleen chauffeurs, zij zijn ook (uw) ambassadeurs. Zij zijn immers het verlengstuk van uw organisatie.

Duurzaam
Het hoofdkantoor van Besseling Koeriersdiensten is gevestigd in het centraal gelegen Amersfoort. Besseling Koeriersdiensten beschikt over een eigen wasstraat, een tankstation en een onderhoudsafdeling. Dankzij deze faciliteiten is het jonge wagenpark altijd in optimale staat en kunnen wij de kans op pech onderweg minimaliseren. Alle wagens zijn voorzien van minimaal Euro V motoren en hebben ingebouwde GPS, waardoor tijdens het plannen geen kilometer verloren gaat. Tevens zijn de vrachtwagens voorzien van AdBlue, de koelwagens van zonnepanelen en rijden er diverse Volkswagen Caddy’s op Aardgas. Daarnaast maakt onze wasstraat gebruik van gerecycled grondwater en biologisch afbreekbare schoonmaakmiddelen. Op deze manier draagt Besseling haar steentje bij aan een duurzamere toekomst.

Name: MW Supply
Description:
M W Supply was started in January of 1992 by Mike Williams from his apartment with a $500 loan from his good friend Chad Blakeman, along with a phone and an old 286DX computer. The Company's first client was Mr. Donnie Schaeffer of Midwest Block and Brick (who remains a customer today).

After distributing tie down straps and load bars to private fleets all over the country, it was discovered that the demand for custom cargo control applications was underserved. This culminated in the leasing of a small facility in Dallas along with the purchase of the first sewing machine to manufacture custom cargo nets and tie down straps. Private fleets liked the way MW Supply did business by guaranteeing quality and learning about the fleet's industry whether it was foodservice, building materials or even garment transport. Over time this fact enabled MW Supply to become both a consultant on loading and securement methods as well as a trusted vendor for excellent cargo control and material handling tools.

In 2000 the company broke ground on a 22,500 square foot facility in Glen Rose, Texas. The Company has since added ten industrial sewing machines and boasts metal manufacturing capabilities for load bars, conveyor stands and other material handling tools. In 2006, in an effort to stave off advances from foreign markets on standard products, the Company partnered with a Chinese manufacturer to create a high quality brand for common sizes of tie down straps. This fact allowed us to provide a cheaper solution when clients demanded, while also continuing to offer the highest quality American made solutions as well.

Today MW Supply boasts a full line of cargo control, material handling and safety access solutions to our valued customers who have become our friends. Description:
Welcome to Kolob Express, your trusted international logistics partner specializing in the handling and transportation of bio-pharmaceutical products, including human and animal biological samples, as well as pharmaceutical products in various stages of development.

Your shipments are treated as urgent, receiving dedicated handling and transportation every step of the way.

With years of experience in international logistics, we are prepared to handle a wide variety of shipments, from electronic devices to AOG shipments, spare parts, and stationery. Rest assured, your goods will reach their destination safely and promptly under our care.

Backed by an extensive network of agents and service partners worldwide, we ensure end-to-end monitoring of your shipments. Our logistic coordinators are trained to keep you updated at every stage of the journey.

At Kolob Express, our mission is to be your trusted ally in life science and healthcare logistics. When your shipments are in our hands, you can be confident that they will receive the same level of care and attention as if you were handling them yourself.

Name: Jung Logistics
Description:
Wir sind ein junges und dynamisches Unternehmen mit Hauptsitz in Mittelfranken, welches sich zur Aufgabe gemacht hat Ihr Transportanliegen schnellstmöglich, zum bestmöglichen Preis und zu Ihrer vollsten Zufriedenheit abzuwickeln . Wir legen hierbei gesonderten Wert auf transparente Kommunikation, kurze Entscheidungswege und einer unkomplizierte Abwicklung. 

Die Welt wird schnelllebiger, die Menschheit hektischer. Vor allem die Logistikbranche ist davon sehr betroffen. Das Resultat daraus ist oftmals der Verlust von Zwischenmenschlichkeit, mangelnder Kommunikation und Qualität. Wir als Ihr Logistikpartner möchte Ihnen das Gefühl von vollstem Verständnis vermitteln, auf Ihre individuellen Bedürfnisse eingehen, diese mit höchster Sorgfalt behandeln und resultieren daraus Ihr Anliegen zu Ihrer vollsten Zufriedenheit und zum besten Preis erledigen. Unsere Vision ist es, sich bestens bei uns aufgehoben zu fühlen und Ihr Logistikpartner Nr. 1 zu werden.

Um unserer Vision tagtäglich ein Stückchen näher zu kommen, haben wir uns als Ziel gesetzt transparent und offen mit Ihnen zu kommunizieren, Ihnen stehts die bestmögliche und kostengünstigste Dienstleistung zu liefern und dabei immer zuverlässig zu arbeiten. Um Sie als Kunden zufrieden stellen zu können, arbeiten wir jeden Tag hart daran, Ihre Bedürfnisse mit höchster Sorgfalt zu behandeln. Jeder Einzelne von Ihnen soll ein ein Gefühl von Sicherheit, Wertschätzung und Planungssicherheit in der Zusammenarbeit mit uns bekommen.

Para suprimir uma das principais dificuldades enfrentadas pelos sellers e buyers, as nossas estações atribuem valor ao processo logístico de envio e devolução de encomendas, oferecendo conveniência e segurança. 

Além de melhorar a rotina logística dos marketplaces, nossas máquinas eliminam a burocracia e as longas filas enfrentadas pelos consumidores finais durante as devoluções de produtos.

Nosso compromisso é fornecer capilaridade ao seu negócio através de soluções inovadoras que simplificam e otimizam o processo de logística reversa e envio de encomendas.

Name: e-CMR.com
Description:
e-cmr.com is a modern platform that digitizes transport processes, offering the CMR Electronic Waybill. Our activity began in 2019, and behind the success of e-cmr.com stands a small but dynamic team of 3 technology and logistics enthusiasts who combined their experience to revolutionize the transport industry.

The main goal of our platform is to eliminate paper documents and simplify the work of transport companies. Thanks to e-CMR, our clients can easily create, manage and share transport documents fully digitally, which significantly reduces time and the risk of errors. This service not only facilitates everyday operations, but also allows companies to improve financial liquidity, shortening the payment deadline thanks to quick access to documents after the delivery is completed.

Our platform is a solution that meets the highest security standards. All data is encrypted and available at any time, from anywhere. We have made sure that the e-CMR implementation process is intuitive and fast, which allows companies to immediately benefit from digitalization.

We focus on the development of paperless transport and care for the environment. We believe that thanks to modern digital tools, transport companies can operate more efficiently and ecologically.

Nascia a marca Faster Mail e desde 1999, já atuando em sede própria, atendendo diversas cidades do Interior Gaúcho e as principais cidades do Brasil, começamos a expansão de uma proposta diferenciada de atendimento, focada em grandes clientes corporativos, agregando serviços especiais e inovadores, tais como impressão de dados variáveis, armazenamentos, manuseios, redespachos. Fomos agraciados em 2005 com o terceiro lugar, em âmbito nacional do prêmio Citibank-ACCION e em 2007, fomos premiados pela Câmara Setorial de Transportes do Programa de Qualidade - PGQP.

      Atualmente, estamos passando por um processo de expansão administrativa, com estudos avançados para implantação da rede de Franquias, possibilitando um incremento na malha de cidades atendidas e a efetiva consolidação de nossa proposta.

Our products are regularly exported to USA, Canada, UK, Italy, Germany, Netherlands, Denmark, British Isles, Serbia & Montenegro, Australia, Japan, Dubai, among others and used by most value added Tea exporting companies in Sri Lanka.

Name: Trasporti Musolino S.R.L.
Description:
La storia dell'azienda è collegata a doppio filo alla figura del suo Patron Domenico Musolino che ha iniziato la sua attività negli anni ’60 con pochi mezzi cassonati.

Il suo fiuto imprenditoriale lo ha spinto a orientare l’azienda verso una decisa specializzazione nel settore del trasporto in regime di temperatura controllata. La dedizione verso l’azienda, trasmessa a tutti i suoi dipendenti attraverso i suoi comportamenti, ancora oggi definisce e caratterizza fortemente quella che è la visione aziendale: rispetto, attenzione e cura per il cliente.

Oggi l’azienda e il suo management familiare, mantenendo i principi che la caratterizzano, ha incentrato la sua attività puntando sempre più sull’utilizzo di tecnologie più innovative, sul rispetto della salute e sicurezza sul lavoro, sull’ attenzione verso l’ambiente e sull’etica sociale.

L'azienda viene gestita con il coinvolgimento diretto della proprietà nei settori nevralgici e operativi dell'erogazione del servizio, consentendo, tra l'altro, un particolare dinamismo in termini decisionali ed esecutivi, oltre a offrire una conseguente ed elevata affidabilità nello svolgimento dei servizi.

La nostra sede è situata nella periferia sud di Reggio Calabria, a circa 15 chilometri di distanza in direzione sud dal porto di Villa San Giovanni: disponiamo di piazzale recintato e custodito. La disponibilità e la reperibilità del nostro personale è continua, 24h su 24h.

Name: CINCH LOGISTICS
Description:
CUSTOMS CLEARANCE 
• Are you struggling with customs clearance in Ethiopia? 
• Do you find the clearance process in Ethiopia a nightmare to navigate?
• Or have you had enough of the tedious bureaucracy? 
Look no further than Cinch! Our expert team is made up of personnel with an extensive customs experience, ready and waiting to help you sail through the complex process with ease
Cinch Logistics is committed to providing its clients with the highest level of customs clearance service and support. We understand that the customs clearance process can be complex and time-consuming, and we are here to help you navigate it smoothly. We have qualified professionals with customs experience who are dedicated to providing you with the best possible service in a cost-effective manner.
If you are looking for a reliable and experienced partner for your customs clearance needs, then Cinch Logistics is the perfect choice for you. 
PROJECT CARGO/ TEMPORARY IMPORTATION 
• Are you having difficulty handling your project cargo?
• Are you struggling to deliver oversized cargo to your project site or manufacturing plant in Ethiopia?
• Are you having trouble getting heavy-lift cargo delivered?
• Are you a foreign company in Ethiopia and need help with project cargo logistics?
• Are you in the road construction, mining, irrigation, electric installation, or erecting industries and need a solution for your cargo?
Cinch handle and transport any heavy-lift or oversized import/re-export cargo to its final destination, regardless of the location, complexity, or dimensions. This needs meticulous planning from the beginning in order to avoid excessive costs and manage all regulatory requirements such as taxes and customs compliances.
We have experience in providing dedicated project cargo logistics for industries such as road construction, mining, manufacturing and etc. Our experts assess the scope of the project and coordinates all necessary resources to ensure the most efficient delivery.

Name: covenant logistics co ltd
Description:
Covenant International Freight has set its focus on Door to Door services for more than 10 years now. Professional warehousing services, custom clearance at destination services as well as delivery services are all handled by Covenant’s wholly-owned subsidiaries. We are the true Door to Door specialist. We are the way to deliver!
Covenant International Freight originated from the traditional freight enterprise from Singapore in the early days. We then branched out with our offices in Malaysia, China and Indonesia. Our main undertaking was international air and sea freight, LCL, warehousing, haulage, customs clearance, import & export handling as well as international freight consultation. Name: P-Development Kft.
Description:
A P-Development Kft. évtizedes tapasztalattal rendelkezik a logisztikai szolgáltatások területén, megfelelően képzett és jelentős szakmai gyakorlattal rendelkező munkatársai segítségével (jelenleg kb. 200-210 fővel) folyamatosan magas színvonalú szolgáltatások nyújtására képes. Ezekre az adottságokra építve a Társaság átvállalja a logisztikai tevékenység egészét azoktól a társaságoktól, amelyek felismerik az outsourcing előnyeit. Gazdasági társaságunk regionális logisztikai szolgáltató központ minősítést kapott.

Társaságunk a hazai logisztikai piacon a sikerességét elsősorban rugalmasságának és dinamizmusának köszönheti, melyre alapozva közepes és nagyméretű regionális társaságok, illetve multinacionális cégek leányvállalatainak logisztikai kiszolgálását is biztosítani tudja.

A P-Development Kft. megalakulása -2008 óta a ”Hírös Város” egyik legdinamikusabban fejlődő vállalkozásai közé tartozik. Az elmúlt években a vevői igényekhez igazodva több tízezer négyzetméter korszerű magasraktárt, új vontató és pótkocsi flottát állítottunk Partnereink szolgálatába.

Társaságunk minden dolgozója elkötelezett abban, hogy hosszú távon biztosítsa a cég eredményes működését, fenntartsa és ápolja a cég jó hírnevét. javítsa a cég, és ezen belül saját munkájának eredményességét. Társaságunk jó kapcsolatot ápol mind Kecskemét város Önkormányzatával, mind a helyi hatóságokkal.

Legfőbb célkitűzésünk, hogy a régió versenyképes szolgáltatója legyen. Ennek érdekében arra törekszünk, hogy ügyfeleink elvárásainak minél magasabb színvonalon tudjunk megfelelni, biztosítani tudjuk azokat a kapacitásokat, melyekkel ki tudjuk elégíteni a megnövekedett vevői szolgáltatási igényeket, ugyanakkor szolgáltatásaink racionalizálásával tovább növeljük tevékenységünk hatékonyságát.

Att vara pålitlig och flexibel är inte något vi bara pratar eller skriver om, utan lever upp till. Vi känner ett personligt ansvar för att godset är framme i rätt tid till rätt pengar. Vår flexibilitet och effektiva transporter är direkt avgörande för våra kunder idag.

Om något av våra fordon inte passar just er transport, kan vi med kort varsel och vårt breda samarbete med andra åkerier ta fram en lösning för just ert specifika transportbehov, tveka inte utan kontakta oss så löser vi ert transportbehov.

Nöjda kunder får man inte – man förtjänar dem.

Johan Persson

Name: NeWPOST Project
Description:
Under the PostEurop Corporate Social Responsibility Activities (CSR-C) the Training Working Group, in cooperation with PostEurop, applied for the European Commission Erasmus + Programme: NeWPOST: upgrading the EU Postal Sector with new skills Project. The Project application has been successful and approved by the European Commission. The Project started in November 2018 and will end in July 2021, duration of two and a half years.

The project consortium is led by the Greek partner AKMI S.A, which is an institution specialised in educational services and it includes: PostEurop, the Institute for training personnel in international organisations-Bulgaria, Posta Romana, Bulgarian Post, Hellenic Post, the Greek institute Readlab, the National Agency for vocational education and training from Bulgaria, EUROFED-Romania, and the two qualifications bodies  Eurocert S.A-Greece,  and Eurocert S.A- Romania.

NEWPOST aims to provide a new JOINT Vocational Education and Training (VET) Curricula for the postal sector to deal with the increasing skills mismatch caused using new technologies. The project will enhance those essential skills for the present and future employees to adapt to the new trends, reduce skills gaps, and to match the needs of new IT skills.

The NeWPOST Project will strengthen the overall postal sector and its role in European economy and growth, as it represents almost 1% of EU’s GDP. The strategic cooperation implemented through the projects will target not only the current and future employees, but it will affect Postal Institutions, Post Offices, e-commerce sector and associated partners. Finally, NeWPOST will improve the mobility of workers and the harmonization of competences in the postal sector.

Компания ММ-ТРАНС основана в 2004 году. Специализация компании: международный мувинг и международные грузоперевозки.
Мувинговые услуги ММ-ТРАНС обеспечивают эффективный международный переезд: оптимальную перевозку личных вещей за границу, оптимизацию таможенных платежей, адекватную стоимость.
Международные перевозки личных вещей компании ММ-ТРАНС включают:
•	разборка мебели;
•	упаковка и маркировка имущества;
•	погрузочно–разгрузочные работы;
•	складская обработка и хранение;
•	перевозка от двери до двери;
•	таможенное оформление;
•	оптимизация платежей.
Международные перевозки грузов компания ММ-ТРАНС осуществляет используя международные автоперевозки. Выбирайте грузоперевозки ММ-ТРАНС. Оплачивайте только транспортировку. Дополнительные привилегии:
•	оптимальная доставка
•	гарантия сохранности груза
•	квалифицированное экспедирование
•	упрощение таможенных процедур
•	уменьшение затрат на 20%–45%
•	оптимизация импорта/экспорта
•	увеличение прибыли на 17%–30%
Получайте совершенно БЕСПЛАТНО.
В настоящее время компания ММ-ТРАНС обслуживает более 500 международных и национальных компаний из Европы, Украины, СНГ. На протяжении года мы совершаем более 10 000 грузоперевозок и перевозим около 300 000 тонн всевозможных грузов. Нашу деятельность достоверно отображают следующие показатели:
•	годовой оборот компании = 76 352 000 грн./г.
•	годовой объем перевозок = 268 740 т./г.
•	годовой грузооборот = 632 537 т./км.
Мы продолжаем разработку и внедрение новых методов оптимизации доставки грузов и личных вещей. Повышаем эффективность наших услуг и снижаем расходы клиентов. Имеем безупречную репутацию, а Торгово–промышленная палата Украины присвоила компании ММ-ТРАНС почетное звание "Лидер отрасли".

1996 yılında ticari gümrükleme faaliyetlerine son verip, lisans sahibi bir gümrük müşavirlik firması olarak edindiği deneyim ve uzmanlığı Türkiye'ye geçici olarak gelen yabancıların ya da Türkiye'den ayrılan yabancı personelin, taşınma ve yeniden yerleşme sırasında duydukları özel gümrükleme işlemlerinde kullanmaya başlamıştır. O günden bu yana edindiği deneyimin gücüyle bugün relokasyon alanında Türkiye'nin yetkili tek firması olarak hizmet vermektedir. Firmamız 1995 yılından beri T.C. Gümrük Müsteşarlığı'nın izni ve denetimi ile faaliyet gösteren İstanbul Gümrük Müşavirliği Derneği üyesidir. Yabancı personel lojistiği konusunda Türkiye'de ihtisas sahibi ve lisanslı, ISO9001 kalite uygunluk belgesine sahip tek müşavirlik firması olduğumuzu vurgulamayı gerekli buluyoruz çünkü bu bizi sadece uzman değil aynı zamanda güvenilir kılıyor. 9ekim Şirketler Grubu hizmet standartları ISO9001 belgesi ile kalite güvencesi altına alınmıştır.

Şirketler grubumuzun yapısında gümrük müşavirliği, yabancı personel yerleşim danışmanlığı ve relocation, yabancı bakıcı danışmanlığı, uluslar arası evden eve nakliyat, yabancıdan yabancıya araç satışı ve uluslar arası evcil hayvan taşımacılığı bölümleri bulunmaktadır.

Name: Kolob Express
Description:
Welcome to Kolob Express, your trusted international logistics partner specializing in the handling and transportation of bio-pharmaceutical products, including human and animal biological samples, as well as pharmaceutical products in various stages of development.

Our expertise lies in managing perishable goods that require precise temperature control. At Kolob Express, we offer a wide range of validated packaging solutions tailored to different temperature ranges, ensuring the integrity of your shipments. Count on us not only to advise you on the most suitable packaging but also to provide it, giving you peace of mind knowing that your cargo is in experienced hands.

In addition to bio-pharmaceuticals, we excel in handling foodstuff shipments, whether refrigerated or frozen. Since our specialty lies in cold chain logistics, we approach all our services with an express mindset. Your shipments are treated as urgent, receiving dedicated handling and transportation every step of the way.

With years of experience in international logistics, we are prepared to handle a wide variety of shipments, from electronic devices to AOG shipments, spare parts, and stationery. Rest assured, your goods will reach their destination safely and promptly under our care.

Backed by an extensive network of agents and service partners worldwide, we ensure end-to-end monitoring of your shipments. Our logistic coordinators are trained to keep you updated at every stage of the journey.

At Kolob Express, our mission is to be your trusted ally in life science and healthcare logistics. When your shipments are in our hands, you can be confident that they will receive the same level of care and attention as if you were handling them yourself.

Name: Mila Transport B.V.
Description:
Er was eens…
 
Een jongensboekverhaal willen wij het zelf niet noemen maar af en toe knijpen wij ons zelf best wel eens in de arm. Wat pakweg 12 jaar geleden begon met één simpel busje is uitgegroeid tot een bedrijf wat inmiddels 40 diverse auto’s op de weg heeft en werkt met een trouwe personeelsgroep van een kleine 50 man.

 

De grootte van ons bedrijf is iets waar wij niet bekend om hoeven te staan: een fijne werkgever en zakelijke partner zijn, dát is waarom wij genoemd en geroemd willen worden. Onderscheidend zijn door wie wij zijn, bij Mila Transport staat alles in het teken van de kwaliteit of het nu gaat over de communicatie vanaf kantoor naar de klant of over het wagenpark tot aan de aankleding van onze chauffeurs. Wij gaan voor het beste en niets minder.

 

De visie voor de komende jaren is het verder innoveren van onze systemen om het service niveau naar onze klanten naar een nog hoger plan te kunnen tillen. Verder willen wij het bedrijf zijn waarvan werknemers er trots op zijn dat ze er kunnen werken. Wij zullen alle zeilen bij moeten zetten om de groei die ons bedrijf doormaakt in goede banen te leiden, maar zeg nou zelf? Voor geen enkele uitdaging draaien wij onze hand om dus deze zeker niet!

Name: DECKX Transport
Description:
DeckX is a divison of the TransX Group of Companies established in 1996 to offer open deck services to customers domestically and internationally. 20 years later, we have maintained an excellent reputation as a leading provider of open deck services for the steel, agricultural, oil and gas, construction, aerospace, and mining industries, and including many other specialty manufacturing sectors within North America.

Today, our fleet encompasses approximately 160 trucks and is operated by some of the safest and best flat deck transportation professionals in the industry.

The DeckX fleets are divided over three geographically distinct divisions. The decision of what fleet to join depends on your home location, your work/life balance needs, and the areas that you prefer to run in. These divisions allow for more flexible away-from-home schedule that suits both your family needs and the demanding nature of the profession.
DeckX Eastern Division - Aberfoyle, Ontario:  This division of DeckX accommodates drivers that reside in Eastern Canada. Drivers in this fleet are primarily making runs between eastern Canada and USA, and are home most weekends.
DeckX Western Division - Edmonton, Alberta:  This division of DeckX accommodates drivers that reside in Western Canada.  Drivers in this fleet operate within British Columbia, Alberta, Manitoba, and western USA.
DeckX Line Haul Division - Winnipeg, Manitoba:  This division of DeckX accommodates drivers that reside in Manitoba, Saskatchewan, Alberta, and parts of Ontario. Drivers in this fleet operate most lanes throughout North America. The average trip length for this fleet is approximately 1,200 miles and drivers are on the road for approximately 2 weeks at a time.

Urban Bike Messengers Bologna è il primo Bike Courier della città e

COSA TRASPORTIAMO 
Fino a 10 Kg nelle nostre borse impermeabili: documenti cartacei, lettere, inviti, libri, dvd, cd, composizioni floreali, materiale fotografico, ecc.. 
Oggetti più voluminosi fino a 50 Kg grazie alla nostra bici CARGO da trasporto veloce.

A CHI CI RIVOLGIAMO 
Privati, uffici, esercizi commerciali e aziende. 
Chiunque abbia la necessità di consegnare con urgenza piccoli pacchi nella città di Bologna, con la consapevolezza aggiunta di non recare danno all'ambiente.

Ci distinguiamo dai normali corrieri a Bologna perchè i nostri messengers sono:
AFFIDABILI
Ciclisti professionisti che scelgono di fare questo lavoro perché credono nei valori di UBM Bologna.
VELOCI
Si muovono velocemente nel traffico, anche nelle ore di punta e nelle zone più congestionate.
ECOLOGICI
La bicicletta è un mezzo a impatto zero e una scelta consapevole per migliorare la qualità dell'ambiente e della vita a Bologna. Siamo partner dei nostri clienti nella loro strategia di Responsabilità Sociale.

A BESPOKE COURIER SERVICE YOU CAN TRUST

If you want a courier service that is fast, efficient and tracked - and delivered with the human approach - we can help.

Firmamızda bulunan deneyimli kuryelerimiz ile her türlü gönderi ihtiyacınıza uygun çözümler sunuyoruz. Sadece belge ve paket teslimatı değil, aynı zamanda çiçek, hediye ve yemek siparişlerinin de güvenli bir şekilde teslimatını gerçekleştiriyoruz.

Müşteri memnuniyeti bizim için en önemli önceliklerimiz arasındadır. Bu sebeple, her gönderiyi zamanında ve güvenli bir şekilde teslim etmek için elimizden geleni yapıyoruz. Ayrıca, müşterilerimizin gönderileri hakkında sürekli bilgilendirilmesi ve takip edilmesi için de çaba gösteriyoruz.

Güçlü alt yapımız, deneyimli ekibimiz ve müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı hizmet anlayışımız ile sektördeki rekabeti aşmak için çalışıyoruz. Siz de işlerinizde güvenilir ve hızlı bir kurye hizmeti arıyorsanız, Gökay Kurye olarak bizimle iletişime geçebilirsiniz.

Packages are generally delivered to customers within 10-14 business days after having placed the order with an online merchant.

USA2Everywhere is also a great option for people living in the U.S. who wish to send packages (new or used items) to family and friends back home in one of the countries we serve.  The service is not just for online shopping.

Unlike other companies, USA2Everywhere does not simply resell other courier services like UPS, FedEx or USPS.  Shipments are made to specific countries using our own in house freight service.  This enables USA2Everywhere's customers to enjoy lower costs and a more personal service.  Additionally, with the USA2Everywhere model customers can count on a local staff in the final destination country to provide additional customer service, payment collection, value and services and delivery.

Name: Công Ty TNHH Sản Xuất Hòa Phong (Hòa Phong Pack)
Description:
Hòa Phong được thành lập vào năm 2007 tại Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam. Với sự đầu tư liên tục qua các năm, hiện nay Công Ty TNHH Sản Xuất Hòa Phong đã nhanh chóng tạo dựng tên tuổi như là nhà cung cấp hàng đầu các sản phẩm trong ngành công nghiệp đóng gói bao bì tại VN như màng PE, băng keo, dây đai.

Hiện tại, với công suất sản xuất hàng năm mở rộng hơn 5.000 tấn mỗi năm, Hòa Phong đã trở thành một trong những nhà máy sản xuất màng PE lớn nhất ở Việt Nam. Tại Hồ Chí Minh, Hòa Phong sử dụng hơn 70 chuyên viên vận hành nhà máy sản xuất dây chuyền hiện đại, có tổng diện tích hơn 3.000 mét vuông.

Định hướng trong 3 năm tới, Hòa Phong nâng sản lượng lên 8,500  tấn/ năm, trong đó 6.500 tấn đẩy mạnh tiêu thụ cho thị trường nội địa và 2.000 tấn cho xuất khẩu. Để đạt được mục tiêu này chúng tôi đã và đang đầu tư vào các dự án công nghệ cao, đổi mới, nghiên cứu và phát triển sản phẩm mới. Tất cả những nỗ lực liên tục của chúng tôi đều nhằm phục vụ cho các nhu cầu cao của khách hàng.

TẦM NHÌN

Với sự tin cậy của khách hàng dành cho Hòa Phong. Hòa Phong sẽ phát triển thành nhà cung cấp hàng đầu của VN về ngành công nghiệp bao bì đóng gói và đảm bảo trong tâm trí người dùng “bao bì đóng gói chất lượng tại Việt Nam đều đến từ Hòa Phong”.

SỨ MỆNH

Chúng tôi cung cấp các sản phẩm bao bì tối ưu và mang giá trị tuyệt vời cho khách hàng, nhân viên và đối tác kinh doanh.

THỊ TRƯỜNG & KHÁCH HÀNG CHÍNH

Trụ sở chính tại thành phố Hồ Chí Minh có cơ sở hậu cần hiện đại và kết nối rộng lớn với các thị trường trọng điểm, Hòa Phong phục vụ khắp Việt Nam qua các đại lí của mình tại Hà Nội, Cần Thơ và cả Đà Nẵng. Sản phẩm công ty được sự tín nhiệm của khách hàng trong các ngành: Máy móc gia dụng, Đồ uống, Vật liệu xây dựng, Hàng tiêu dùng, Thực phẩm, Dược phẩm, In ấn và xuất bản, Kho vận, Chế biến gỗ và bất kỳ thị trường nào đòi hỏi pallet,… Từ năm 2012, sản phẩm của công ty đã được xuất khẩu đi các nước tiên tiến như:  Nhật, Mỹ, Úc, Hàn Quốc.

Name: Freight Connect LLC
Description:
Our freight brokerage agency negotiates rates with carriers nationwide to provide optimal costs for your companies transportation needs. Researching freight cost trends daily is an absolute necessity in this industry, and I strive to keep ascending rates below the latest metric. 

We provide service, product planning, implementation, troubleshooting, and dispatching of trucks. We work with multiple distributors to provide trucks for their orders. We plan, coordinate, schedule pickups and deliveries. Additionally, we work with shippers, carriers, and consignees to manage timely schedules. I track and report shipment status to customers, manage multiple deliveries, process spot requests, develop new strategies to improve transportation, and resolve freight discrepancies in a timely manner.

We use load board platforms such as Truckstop and DAT to provide carriers with available shipments, and Trucker Tools to track and locate shipments for on-call updates. Our CRM is powered by Tallgrass Freight Company to provide rate confirmations, BOL, and PODs. Freight Connect LLC partners with Tallgrass Freight's back office to accommodate our shippers and consignees with finance, credit apps and other key administrative duties.

Onboarding new carriers is quick when using our RMIS. With over 50,000 carriers in our database, there will not be an issue assigning the right carrier for your shipping needs. I am committed to getting your product moved adequately and at a low cost. Your freight distribution is my main priority from the time it ships all the way to the consignee's destination. From days' notice to same-day shipment, I can find any type of carrier you need for that load. Contact me at any time of day or night, and let me help cut the freight costs on your loads.

Kami memahami bahwa setiap bisnis memiliki kebutuhan impor yang berbeda-beda. Oleh karena itu, kami menyediakan layanan impor yang dapat disesuaikan dengan kebutuhan bisnis Anda, mulai dari pengiriman regular hingga pengiriman darurat dalam waktu singkat.

Dalam menghadirkan solusi impor terbaik, kami bekerja sama dengan mitra pengiriman yang terpercaya dan memiliki pengalaman dalam mengirimkan barang dari berbagai negara. Kami juga memiliki tim ahli yang siap membantu Anda dalam memenuhi kebutuhan impor bisnis Anda, termasuk dalam hal peraturan dan persyaratan impor yang berlaku.

Kami berkomitmen untuk memberikan layanan impor yang berkualitas dan terpercaya untuk membantu bisnis Anda tumbuh dan berkembang. Jangan ragu untuk menghubungi kami untuk informasi lebih lanjut mengenai layanan impor yang kami tawarkan.

Name: Logistics Express
Description:
Logistics Express es una empresa transitaria que se especializa en ofrecer soluciones de transporte y logística a destinos específicos como Melilla, Ceuta y Gibraltar. Estas regiones, debido a su ubicación geográfica y particularidades políticas, presentan desafíos únicos en términos de logística y transporte, desafíos que Logistics Express maneja con experiencia y eficiencia.

Melilla y Ceuta, siendo ciudades autónomas españolas ubicadas en la costa norteafricana, requieren de una logística especial debido a su posición como enclaves entre Europa y África. Esto implica el manejo de regulaciones aduaneras y de transporte tanto de la Unión Europea como de las autoridades locales. Logistics Express, con su conocimiento profundo de estas regulaciones, garantiza un tránsito fluido y eficiente de mercancías, minimizando los retrasos y costos adicionales para sus clientes.

Gibraltar, por otro lado, es un territorio británico de ultramar situado en el extremo sur de la península ibérica. Las operaciones logísticas en esta área pueden ser complejas, dada su singularidad política y geográfica. Con su proximidad a España y su relación con el Reino Unido, Gibraltar presenta un conjunto único de desafíos logísticos. Logistics Express, con su experiencia, maneja estos desafíos a través de una red de contactos locales y conocimiento especializado en las regulaciones y procedimientos aduaneros.

La compañía utiliza una variedad de modos de transporte, incluyendo transporte terrestre, marítimo y aéreo, para asegurar la entrega eficiente y a tiempo. Se destaca en la adaptación a las necesidades específicas de cada cliente, ofreciendo soluciones personalizadas que abarcan desde el transporte de pequeñas cargas hasta logísticas de proyecto para cargas de gran escala.

En cuanto a tecnología y sostenibilidad, Logistics Express invierte continuamente en innovaciones para mejorar la eficiencia de sus operaciones y reducir su impacto ambiental.

Description:
WINGS Logistics – Sri Lanka was incorporated in 2001 and have now grown rapidly in our ranks highly skilled professionals combining numerous years of experience in the Air and Sea Freight forwarding industry.

Our continuing relationships with major clients in industries such as apparel, retail and consumer electronics have driven us to develop a unique ability to assist them in meeting the demands of their customers. In order to meet and anticipate these demands, we have maximized our relationships to develop a secure local network of carriers and agents in America, Asia, the Pacific Rim and the Indian Sub-Continent.

The success of these alliances and networks is due to our greatest resource; our exceptional and dedicated Wings staff. Our Wings Logistics team through its hard work and determination to get the job done has become an organization with a reputation for consistency, on-time, on-budget, and on the ball. It’s not talk, it’s our people, our staff getting the job done.

This hard work has transformed Wings Logistics into one of the fastest-growing freight forwarders in the industry. Our goal is not to be the fastest or largest, we simply want to be known as one of the best!
